final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates a basic SQS queue with Dead Letter Queue, server-side encryption, access policy, and tags.'

Parameters:
  QueueName:
    Type: String
    Default: BasicQueue
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-zA-Z0-9-_]{1,80}$'
    ConstraintDescription: 'Queue name must consist of alphanumeric characters, hyphens, or underscores and be 1-80 characters long.'
  VisibilityTimeoutSeconds:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 43200
    Description: 'Visibility timeout for messages in seconds.'
  MessageRetentionPeriodSeconds:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1209600
    MinValue: 60
    MaxValue: 1209600
    Description: 'Message retention period in seconds (max 14 days).'

Resources:
  BasicQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Ref QueueName
      VisibilityTimeout: !Ref VisibilityTimeoutSeconds
      MessageRetentionPeriod: !Ref MessageRetentionPeriodSeconds
      DelaySeconds: 0
      ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds: 0
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sqs
      RedrivePolicy:
        deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt DeadLetterQueue.Arn
        maxReceiveCount: 5
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref QueueName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  DeadLetterQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${QueueName}-DLQ'
      VisibilityTimeout: !Ref VisibilityTimeoutSeconds
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 86400
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sqs
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${QueueName}-DLQ'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  QueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref BasicQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: '*'
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
              - sqs:ReceiveMessage
              - sqs:DeleteMessage
              - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
            Resource: !GetAtt BasicQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}'

Outputs:
  QueueUrl:
    Description: 'URL of the SQS queue'
    Value: !Ref BasicQueue
  QueueArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the SQS queue'
    Value: !GetAtt BasicQueue.Arn
  DeadLetterQueueArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Dead Letter Queue'
    Value: !GetAtt DeadLetterQueue.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates a default secure Amazon S3 bucket with security best practices including encryption, public access blocks, versioning, and HTTPS enforcement.'

Resources:
  DefaultBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-default-bucket'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: DefaultBucket
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref DefaultBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyUnsecureObjectTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - s3:*
            Resource:
              - !Sub '${DefaultBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Sid: DenyUnsecureBucketTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            NotAction:
              - s3:ListBucket
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt DefaultBucket.Arn
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the S3 bucket'
    Value: !Ref DefaultBucket
  BucketArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the S3 bucket'
    Value: !GetAtt DefaultBucket.Arn
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-49b0b029' on localstack", 'iac-god-eval-49b0b029: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'DefaultBucket: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'DefaultBucket: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'BucketPolicy: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'BucketPolicy: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-49b0b029: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A']

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Amazon S3 bucket for static website hosting with DeletionPolicy Retain

Resources:
  WebsiteBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-website-bucket-${AWS::StackName}"
      WebsiteConfiguration:
        IndexDocument: index.html
        ErrorDocument: error.html
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: false
        IgnorePublicAcls: false
        BlockPublicPolicy: false
        RestrictPublicBuckets: false
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-website-bucket-${AWS::StackName}"
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: StaticWebsiteHosting

  WebsiteBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref WebsiteBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: PublicReadGetObject
            Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action: s3:GetObject
            Resource: !Sub '${WebsiteBucket.Arn}/*'

Outputs:
  WebsiteURL:
    Description: URL for the static website hosted on S3
    Value: !GetAtt WebsiteBucket.WebsiteURL
  WebsiteDomain:
    Description: S3 bucket domain name
    Value: !GetAtt WebsiteBucket.DomainName

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Creates a single EC2 instance with Amazon Linux 2 in a new VPC.

Parameters:
  KeyName:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Optional name of an existing EC2 KeyPair to enable SSH access (leave blank/empty for no key pair)
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-zA-Z0-9-]*$'
  AmiId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Image::Id
    Default: 'resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2:1'
    Description: AMI ID for Amazon Linux 2 instance (uses SSM resolve for latest)

Conditions:
  UseKeyName: !Not [!Equals [!Ref KeyName, ""]]

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-VPC"

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-IGW"

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet"

  RouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-RouteTable"

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable

  InstanceSG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for EC2 instance allowing SSH
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-InstanceSG"

  Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t3.micro
      ImageId: !Ref AmiId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      KeyName: !If [UseKeyName, !Ref KeyName, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSG
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-Instance"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: LaunchTest

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: Instance ID of the EC2 instance
    Value: !Ref Instance
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-InstanceId"
deploy_logs: None
latest_error_cfn-lint: [W1032] {'ColumnNumber': 7, 'LineNumber': 91}: {'Fn::Join': ['', ['resolve:ssm:', '/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2', ':1']]} is not a 'AWS::EC2::Image.Id' with pattern '^ami-([0-9a-z]{8}|[0-9a-z]{17})$' when 'Fn::Join' is resolved

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for a DynamoDB table storing data related to ArtistId, Concert, and TicketSales with GSI for querying top-selling concerts.'

Resources:
  ArtistConcertTicketsTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ArtistConcertTickets-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: ArtistId
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: Concert
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: TicketSales
          AttributeType: N
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: ArtistId
          KeyType: HASH
        - AttributeName: Concert
          KeyType: RANGE
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
      DeletionProtectionEnabled: true
      GlobalSecondaryIndexes:
        - IndexName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ConcertTicketSalesIndex-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
          KeySchema:
            - AttributeName: Concert
              KeyType: HASH
            - AttributeName: TicketSales
              KeyType: RANGE
          Projection:
            ProjectionType: ALL
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

Outputs:
  TableName:
    Description: The name of the DynamoDB table
    Value: !Ref ArtistConcertTicketsTable
  TableArn:
    Description: The ARN of the DynamoDB table
    Value: !GetAtt ArtistConcertTicketsTable.Arn
  ConcertTicketSalesIndexName:
    Description: The name of the Global Secondary Index
    Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ConcertTicketSalesIndex-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
  ConcertTicketSalesIndexArn:
    Description: The ARN of the Global Secondary Index
    Value: !Sub 'arn:aws:dynamodb:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:table/${AWS::StackName}-ArtistConcertTickets-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}/index/${AWS::StackName}-ConcertTicketSalesIndex-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Basic deployable EC2 instance with SSH access.'

Parameters:
  KeyName:
    Type: AWS::EC2::KeyPair::KeyName
    Description: 'Name of an existing EC2 KeyPair to enable SSH access'
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.micro
    Description: 'EC2 instance type'
  LatestAmiId:
    Type: String
    Default: /aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/al2023-ami-kernel-default-x86_64-hvm-2.0
    Description: 'SSM parameter path for latest AL2023 AMI'
  SSHCidrIp:
    Type: String
    Default: 0.0.0.0/0
    Description: 'CIDR IP range allowed to access EC2 instance via SSH (Security Best Practice: Restrict to your IP)'
  VPCId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC::Id
    Description: 'VPC for Security Group and Instance (select default VPC)'
  SubnetId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet::Id
    Description: 'Public subnet ID in VPCId for EC2 launch and public IP (select default public subnet per AZ)'

Resources:
  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Enable SSH access
      VpcId: !Ref VPCId
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref SSHCidrIp
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-InstanceSecurityGroup'

  MyEC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Sub '{{resolve:ssm:${LatestAmiId}:1}}'
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      KeyName: !Ref KeyName
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      SubnetId: !Ref SubnetId
      AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            DeleteOnTermination: false
            VolumeSize: 8
            VolumeType: gp3
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-MyEC2Instance'

Outputs:
  EC2InstanceId:
    Description: 'Current ID of the EC2 instance'
    Value: !Ref MyEC2Instance
  PublicIp:
    Description: 'Public IP of the EC2 instance'
    Value: !GetAtt MyEC2Instance.PublicIp
deploy_logs: None

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >-
  Deploys a basic t3.micro EC2 instance running Amazon Linux 2 with secure remote
  management capabilities using AWS Systems Manager (SSM) Session Manager. No inbound
  ports open; management via SSM only. Uses region-specific AMIs and minimal security group.

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-BasicSSM-VPC"
        - Key: Project
          Value: BasicSSM

  IGW:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-BasicSSM-IGW"
        - Key: Project
          Value: BasicSSM

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref IGW

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-BasicSSM-PublicSubnet"
        - Key: Project
          Value: BasicSSM

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-BasicSSM-PublicRouteTable"
        - Key: Project
          Value: BasicSSM

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref IGW

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  SSMInstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: !Sub "Minimal security group for SSM access in ${AWS::StackName}"
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-BasicSSM-SG"
        - Key: Project
          Value: BasicSSM

  EC2SSMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: EC2SSMRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: BasicSSM

  EC2SSMInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2SSMRole

  BasicSSMInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT20M
    DependsOn:
      - SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2}}'
      InstanceType: t3.micro
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref SSMInstanceSecurityGroup
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2SSMInstanceProfile
      DisableApiTermination: false
      EbsOptimized: false
      Monitoring: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-BasicSSMInstance"
        - Key: Project
          Value: BasicSSM
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          yum install -y aws-cfn-bootstrap awscli jq
          INSTANCE_ID=$(curl -s http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/instance-id)
          REGION=$(curl -s http://169.254.169.254/latest/dynamic/instance-identity/document | jq -r .region)
          /opt/amazon/ssm/amazon-ssm-agent/bin/amazon-ssm-agent -update
          until aws ssm describe-instance-information --region $REGION --instance-information-filter-list "[{\"Key\":\"InstanceIds\",\"Values\":[\"$INSTANCE_ID\"]}]" --query 'InstanceInformationList[0].PingStatus' --output text 2>/dev/null | grep -q "Online"; do
            echo "Waiting for instance to be online in SSM..."
            sleep 30
          done
          /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e 0 --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource BasicSSMInstance --region ${AWS::Region}

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: EC2 Instance ID
    Value: !Ref BasicSSMInstance
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-InstanceId"

  PublicIp:
    Description: Public IP address of the EC2 instance
    Value: !GetAtt BasicSSMInstance.PublicIp
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicIp"

  SSMSessionManagerConnectCommand:
    Description: AWS CLI command to connect to the instance using SSM Session Manager
    Value: !Sub "aws ssm start-session --target ${BasicSSMInstance}"
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-SSMConnectCommand"
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-fb266652' on localstack", 'iac-god-eval-fb266652: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'VPC: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'VPC: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'PublicRouteTable: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'PublicRouteTable: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'PublicSubnet: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'PublicSubnet: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'SubnetRouteTableAssociation: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'SubnetRouteTableAssociation: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'EC2SSMRole: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'EC2SSMRole: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'EC2SSMInstanceProfile: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'EC2SSMInstanceProfile: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'SSMInstanceSecurityGroup: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'SSMInstanceSecurityGroup: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'BasicSSMInstance: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'BasicSSMInstance: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'IGW: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'IGW: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'DefaultRoute: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'DefaultRoute: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'VPCGatewayAttachment: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'VPCGatewayAttachment: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-fb266652: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A']

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates an EC2 instance with ephemeral instance store volume using the latest Amazon Linux 2 AMI from SSM Parameter Store, SSH key pair, and security group for SSH access in an existing default VPC and subnet.'
Parameters:
  VPCId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC::Id
    Description: Existing default VPC ID
    Default: 'vpc-12345678'
  SubnetId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet::Id
    Description: Existing default subnet ID
    Default: 'subnet-12345678'
  SSHAccessCIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 0.0.0.0/0
    Description: CIDR IP range for SSH access (parameterized for security)
    AllowedPattern: ^((\d{1,3}\.){3}\d{1,3})(/([0-9]|[1-2]\d|3[0-2]))$
Resources:
  SSHKeyPair:
    Type: AWS::EC2::KeyPair
    Properties:
      KeyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-key'
      KeyType: rsa
      KeyFormat: pem
  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Enable SSH access
      VpcId: !Ref VPCId
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref SSHAccessCIDR
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
  EphemeralInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2}}'
      InstanceType: m5d.large
      KeyName: !Ref SSHKeyPair
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      SubnetId: !Ref SubnetId
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 8
            VolumeType: gp3
            Encrypted: true
            DeleteOnTermination: true
        - DeviceName: /dev/sdb
          VirtualName: ephemeral0
      Monitoring: false
      DisableApiTermination: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Instance'
Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: ID of the EC2 instance
    Value: !Ref EphemeralInstance
  PublicIp:
    Description: Public IP address of the EC2 instance
    Value: !GetAtt EphemeralInstance.PublicIp
  KeyName:
    Description: Name of the SSH key pair
    Value: !Ref SSHKeyPair
  SecurityGroupId:
    Description: ID of the security group
    Value: !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: DynamoDB table for mobile notifications reporting with GSI on type and sentTime, pay-per-request billing, TTL auto-expiry, and server-side encryption.

Resources:
  MobileNotificationsTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-MobileNotificationsTable"
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: notificationId
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: sentTime
          AttributeType: N
        - AttributeName: type
          AttributeType: S
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: notificationId
          KeyType: HASH
        - AttributeName: sentTime
          KeyType: RANGE
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      TimeToLiveSpecification:
        AttributeName: ttl
        Enabled: true
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
      GlobalSecondaryIndexes:
        - IndexName: TypeSentTimeIndex
          KeySchema:
            - AttributeName: type
              KeyType: HASH
            - AttributeName: sentTime
              KeyType: RANGE
          Projection:
            ProjectionType: ALL
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

Outputs:
  MobileNotificationsTableName:
    Description: The name of the MobileNotificationsTable
    Value: !Ref MobileNotificationsTable
  TypeSentTimeIndexArn:
    Description: ARN of the TypeSentTimeIndex Global Secondary Index
    Value: !Sub "${MobileNotificationsTable.Arn}/index/TypeSentTimeIndex"

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'provisions an EC2 instance with EIP and SSH access in the default VPC.'

Parameters:
  KeyName:
    Type: String
    Description: 'SSH key pair name'
    NoEcho: true
    Default: ''
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.micro
  SSHCidrIp:
    Type: String
    Description: 'to restrict to specific IP for security'
    Default: 0.0.0.0/0
  ImageId:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>
    Default: '/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2'
    Description: 'SSM path for latest Amazon Linux 2 AMI (resolves dynamically in AWS/LocalStack)'

Conditions:
  HasKeyPair: !Not [!Equals [!Ref KeyName, '']]

Resources:
  SSHSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Enable SSH access
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref SSHCidrIp
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: SSHSecurityGroup
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SG'

  MyEC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref ImageId
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      KeyName: !If [HasKeyPair, !Ref KeyName, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref SSHSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyEC2Instance
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2'

  MyEIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyEIP
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EIP'

  MyEIPAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIPAssociation
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !Ref MyEIP
      InstanceId: !Ref MyEC2Instance

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: The Instance ID of the EC2 instance
    Value: !Ref MyEC2Instance
  PublicIp:
    Description: Public IP for SSH access via EIP
    Value: !Ref MyEIP

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template that creates a single Elastic Network Interface (ENI) with two Elastic IPs (EIPs) and secondary private IPs which enables a single EC2 instance (not explicitly defined) to handle multiple public-facing IP addresses through one network interface.'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 0
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet'

  RouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RouteTable'

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable

  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for multi-IP ENI allowing HTTP/HTTPS inbound and all outbound
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for API Gateway REST API with Lambda non-proxy integration

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole

  HelloWorldFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Runtime: python3.12
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          def handler(event, context):
            return {
              "statusCode": 200,
              "body": "Hello from Lambda non-proxy!"
            }

  MyRestApi:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi
    Properties:
      Name: MyRestApi
      Description: REST API with Lambda non-proxy integration
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - REGIONAL

  ApiResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MyRestApi
      ParentId: !GetAtt MyRestApi.RootResourceId
      PathPart: hello

  HelloMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MyRestApi
      ResourceId: !Ref ApiResource
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub "arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:lambda:path/2015-03-31/functions/${HelloWorldFunction.Arn}/invocations"
        PassthroughBehavior: WHEN_NO_MATCH
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: |
            {
              "message": "Hello from API Gateway"
            }
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: '200'
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: "$input.json('$')"

  ApiGatewayInvokePermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref HelloWorldFunction
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: apigateway.amazonaws.com
      SourceArn: !Sub "${MyRestApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/*/*"

  ApiDeployment:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Deployment
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MyRestApi
    DependsOn: HelloMethod

  Prod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Stage
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MyRestApi
      DeploymentId: !Ref ApiDeployment
      StageName: Prod

Outputs:
  ApiEndpoint:
    Description: Invoke URL for the API
    Value: !Sub "${MyRestApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/Prod/hello"
  LambdaFunction:
    Description: Name of the Lambda function
    Value: !Ref HelloWorldFunction

              Service: glue.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sts:AssumeRole
              - sts:TagSession
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSGlueServiceRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: S3CloudTrailAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:GetObjectVersion
                Resource: "arn:aws:s3:::kk-admin/cloud-trail/AWSLogs/*"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource: "arn:aws:s3:::kk-admin"
                Condition:
                  StringLike:
                    "s3:prefix": "cloud-trail/AWSLogs/*"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetBucketVersioning
                Resource: "arn:aws:s3:::kk-admin"

  CloudTrailLogsDatabase:
    Type: AWS::Glue::Database
    Properties:
      CatalogId: !Ref AWS::AccountId
      DatabaseInput:
        Name: cloudtrail_logs
        Description: "Database for CloudTrail log metadata tables"

  CloudTrailCrawler:
    Type: AWS::Glue::Crawler
    Properties:
      Name: cloudtrail_crawler
      Role: !GetAtt GlueCloudTrailCrawlerRole.Arn
      DatabaseName: !Ref CloudTrailLogsDatabase
      Targets:
        S3Targets:
          - Path: "s3://kk-admin/cloud-trail/AWSLogs/"
      TablePrefix: "cloudtrail_"
      SchemaChangePolicy:
        UpdateBehavior: "LOG"
        DeleteBehavior: "DEPRECATE_IN_DATABASE"
      RecrawlPolicy:
        RecrawlBehavior: "CRAWL_EVENT_MODE"

Outputs:
  DatabaseName:
    Description: "Name of the Glue Database for CloudTrail logs"
    Value: !Ref CloudTrailLogsDatabase
  CrawlerName:
    Description: "Name of the Glue Crawler for CloudTrail logs"
    Value: !Ref CloudTrailCrawler
  RoleArn:
    Description: "ARN of the IAM Role used by the Glue Crawler"
    Value: !GetAtt GlueCloudTrailCrawlerRole.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Deploys multi-threshold CloudWatch billing alarms with SNS email notifications evaluated every 6 hours

Parameters:
  EmailAddress:
    Type: String
    Default: xxxxx@gmail.com
    Description: Email address to receive billing alerts (requires manual confirmation after deployment)

Resources:
  BillingAlertsTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      DisplayName: AWS Monthly Billing Alerts
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: BillingMonitoring
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  BillingSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      Protocol: email
      TopicArn: !GetAtt BillingAlertsTopic.TopicArn
      Endpoint: !Ref EmailAddress

  MonthlyBillingAlarm5USD:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: MonthlyBillingAlarm-5USD
      AlarmDescription: Alarm when estimated monthly charges exceed $5 USD
      Namespace: AWS/Billing
      MetricName: EstimatedCharges
      Dimensions:
        - Name: Currency
          Value: USD
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 21600
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      DatapointsToAlarm: 1
      Threshold: 5
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      AlarmActions:
        - !GetAtt BillingAlertsTopic.TopicArn
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: BillingMonitoring
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  MonthlyBillingAlarm10USD:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: MonthlyBillingAlarm-10USD
      AlarmDescription: Alarm when estimated monthly charges exceed $10 USD
      Namespace: AWS/Billing
      MetricName: EstimatedCharges
      Dimensions:
        - Name: Currency
          Value: USD
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 21600
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      DatapointsToAlarm: 1
      Threshold: 10
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      AlarmActions:
        - !GetAtt BillingAlertsTopic.TopicArn
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: BillingMonitoring
        - Key: Stack

        - Name: Currency

      DatapointsToAlarm: 1
      Threshold: 20
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      AlarmActions:
        - !GetAtt BillingAlertsTopic.TopicArn
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: BillingMonitoring
        - Key: Stack

  MonthlyBillingAlarm40USD:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: MonthlyBillingAlarm-40USD
      AlarmDescription: Alarm when estimated monthly charges exceed $40 USD
      Namespace: AWS/Billing

      Dimensions:
        - Name: Currency

        - !GetAtt BillingAlertsTopic.TopicArn

Outputs:

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for DynamoDB Streams to EventBridge integration via Pipes, filtering PNG avatar updates.'

Parameters:
  TablePartitionKeyName:
    Type: String
    Default: userId
    Description: 'Name of the partition key for the DynamoDB table'

Resources:
  UserTable:
    Type: 'AWS::DynamoDB::Table'
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-UserTable'
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: !Ref TablePartitionKeyName
          AttributeType: S
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: !Ref TablePartitionKeyName
          KeyType: HASH
      StreamSpecification:
        StreamViewType: NEW_AND_OLD_IMAGES

  AvatarEventsBus:
    Type: 'AWS::Events::EventBus'
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AvatarEventsBus'

  PipeRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PipeRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: pipes.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}'
              StringLike:
                'pipes:PipeName': !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AvatarPipe'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: PipePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - dynamodb:DescribeStream
                  - dynamodb:GetRecords
                  - dynamodb:GetShardIterator
                Resource: !GetAtt UserTable.StreamArn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - events:PutEvents
                Resource: !GetAtt AvatarEventsBus.Arn

  AvatarPipe:
    Type: 'AWS::Pipes::Pipe'
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AvatarPipe'
      RoleArn: !GetAtt PipeRole.Arn
      Source: !GetAtt UserTable.StreamArn
      Target: !GetAtt AvatarEventsBus.Arn
      SourceParameters:
        DynamoDBStreamParameters:
          BatchSize: 1
          StartingPosition: LATEST
      TargetParameters:
        EventBridgeEventBusParameters:
          Source: 'user.avatar.png.update'
          DetailType: 'AvatarUrlPngChange'

Outputs:
  UserTableArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the DynamoDB UserTable'
    Value: !GetAtt UserTable.Arn
  UserTableStreamArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the DynamoDB Stream'
    Value: !GetAtt UserTable.StreamArn
  AvatarEventsBusArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the custom EventBridge EventBus'
    Value: !GetAtt AvatarEventsBus.Arn
  AvatarPipeName:
    Description: 'Name of the EventBridge Pipe'
    Value: !Ref AvatarPipe
  AvatarPipeArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the EventBridge Pipe'
    Value: !GetAtt AvatarPipe.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template that creates an Amazon EventBridge custom event bus, a secure connection with API key authentication, and an API destination to route events to an external HTTPS webhook endpoint.

Parameters:
  ApiKeyName:
    Type: String
    Default: X-API-Key
  ApiKeyValue:
    Type: String
    Default: 'dummy-api-key-change-me'
    NoEcho: true
    Description: The API key value used for authenticating requests to the webhook endpoint.
  InvocationEndpoint:
    Type: String
    Default: https://webhook.site/testtest
    AllowedPattern: '^https://.*'
    ConstraintDescription: Endpoint must use HTTPS protocol (https://).

Resources:
  CustomEventBus:
    Type: AWS::Events::EventBus
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-eventbus'
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'

  WebhookConnection:
    Type: AWS::Events::Connection
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-connection'
      AuthorizationType: API_KEY
      AuthParameters:
        ApiKeyAuthParameters:
          ApiKeyName: !Ref ApiKeyName
          ApiKeyValue: !Ref ApiKeyValue

  WebhookApiDestination:
    Type: AWS::Events::ApiDestination
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-apidestination'
      ConnectionArn: !GetAtt WebhookConnection.Arn
      Description: Routes events to external webhook
      HttpMethod: POST
      InvocationEndpoint: !Ref InvocationEndpoint
      InvocationRateLimitPerSecond: 10

Outputs:
  EventBusArn:
    Description: ARN of the custom EventBus
    Value: !GetAtt CustomEventBus.Arn
  ConnectionArn:
    Description: ARN of the EventBridge Connection
    Value: !GetAtt WebhookConnection.Arn
  ApiDestinationArn:
    Description: ARN of the API Destination
    Value: !GetAtt WebhookApiDestination.Arn
  ApiDestinationInvocationEndpoint:
    Description: Invocation endpoint of the API Destination
    Value: !Ref InvocationEndpoint

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudWatch Dashboard and Logs Insights for AWS Client VPN usage monitoring

Parameters:
  ClientVPNLogGroupName:
    Type: String
    Default: /aws/vpn/endpoint/clientvpn
    Description: CloudWatch Logs log group containing Client VPN connection logs

Resources:
  ConnectionDurationsQuery:
    Type: AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition
    Properties:
      LogGroupNames:
        - !Ref ClientVPNLogGroupName
      Name: ClientVPN/Connections/Durations
      QueryString: !Sub |
        filter @logGroup = '${ClientVPNLogGroupName}' and @timestamp > now()-7d
        | parse @message as vpnlog
        | fields @timestamp, connectionDuration, endpointId, username
        | stats avg(connectionDuration), max(connectionDuration) by endpointId, username
  
  DataTransferIngressEgressQuery:
    Type: AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition
    Properties:
      LogGroupNames:
        - !Ref ClientVPNLogGroupName
      Name: ClientVPN/DataTransfer/Volumes
      QueryString: !Sub |
        filter @logGroup = '${ClientVPNLogGroupName}' and @timestamp > now()-7d
        | parse @message as vpnlog
        | fields @timestamp, bytesIn, bytesOut, endpointId
        | stats sum(bytesIn) as TotalIngress, sum(bytesOut) as TotalEgress by endpointId
  
  UserActivityQuery:
    Type: AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition
    Properties:
      LogGroupNames:
        - !Ref ClientVPNLogGroupName
      Name: ClientVPN/Users/Activity
      QueryString: !Sub |
        filter @logGroup = '${ClientVPNLogGroupName}' and @timestamp > now()-7d
        | parse @message as vpnlog
        | fields @timestamp, username, endpointId, connectionDuration
        | stats count() as Sessions, avg(connectionDuration) by username, endpointId
  
  EndpointUsageQuery:
    Type: AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition
    Properties:
      LogGroupNames:
        - !Ref ClientVPNLogGroupName
      Name: ClientVPN/Endpoints/Usage
      QueryString: !Sub |
        filter @logGroup = '${ClientVPNLogGroupName}' and @timestamp > now()-7d
        | parse @message as vpnlog
        | fields @timestamp, endpointId, bytesIn, bytesOut, connectionDuration
        | stats count() as Connections, avg(connectionDuration), sum(bytesIn + bytesOut) as TotalTransfer by endpointId
  
  DistinctUsersQuery:
    Type: AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition
    Properties:
      LogGroupNames:
        - !Ref ClientVPNLogGroupName
      Name: ClientVPN/Users/Distinct
      QueryString: !Sub |
        filter @logGroup = '${ClientVPNLogGroupName}' and @timestamp > now()-7d
        | parse @message as vpnlog
        | fields username, endpointId
        | stats count_distinct(username) as UniqueUsers by endpointId
  
  AuthADQuery:
    Type: AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition
    Properties:
      LogGroupNames:
        - !Ref ClientVPNLogGroupName
      Name: ClientVPN/Auth/AD-SAML
      QueryString: !Sub |
        filter @logGroup = '${ClientVPNLogGroupName}' and @timestamp > now()-7d
        | parse @message as vpnlog
        | fields @timestamp, username, endpointId
        | filter username like /@domain\.com/
        | stats count() by endpointId
  
  AuthMutualQuery:
    Type: AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition
    Properties:
      LogGroupNames:
        - !Ref ClientVPNLogGroupName
      Name: ClientVPN/Auth/Mutual
      QueryString: !Sub |
        filter @logGroup = '${ClientVPNLogGroupName}' and @timestamp > now()-7d
        | parse @message as vpnlog
        | fields @timestamp, username, commonName, endpointId
        | filter ispresent(commonName) and not username like /@domain\.com/
        | stats count() by endpointId
  
  AuthMixedQuery:
    Type: AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition
    Properties:
      LogGroupNames:
        - !Ref ClientVPNLogGroupName
      Name: ClientVPN/Auth/Mixed
      QueryString: !Sub |
        filter @logGroup = '${ClientVPNLogGroupName}' and @timestamp > now()-7d
        | parse @message as vpnlog
        | fields @timestamp, username, commonName, endpointId
        | filter ispresent(commonName) and username like /@domain\.com/
        | stats count() by endpointId
  
  AuthBreakdownQuery:
    Type: AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition
    Properties:
      LogGroupNames:
        - !Ref ClientVPNLogGroupName
      Name: ClientVPN/Auth/Breakdown
      QueryString: !Sub |
        filter @logGroup = '${ClientVPNLogGroupName}' and @timestamp > now()-7d
        | parse @message as vpnlog
        | fields username, commonName, endpointId
        | extend authType = case(
            ispresent(commonName) and username like /@domain\.com/, 'Mixed',
            ispresent(commonName), 'Mutual',
            username like /@domain\.com/, 'AD-SAML',
            'Unknown'
          )
        | stats count() by authType, endpointId
  
  ClientVPNMonitoringDashboard:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Dashboard
    Properties:
      DashboardName: !Sub ClientVPN-Monitoring-${AWS::StackName}
      DashboardBody: !Sub |
        {
          "widgets": [
            {
              "type": "text",
              "properties": {
                "markdown": "# Client VPN Usage Overview",
                "background": "transparent",

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "Timestream database and tables with configurable retention and magnetic store error handling via S3 rejected data location"

Parameters:
  DatabaseName:
    Type: String
    Default: "poc-timestream-db"
    Description: "Name of the Timestream database"
  BatchWriteMemoryHours:
    Type: Number
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 8760
    Default: 1
  BatchWriteMagneticDays:
    Type: Number
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 2557
    Default: 1
  MemOnlyMemoryHours:
    Type: Number
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 8760
    Default: 168
  MemOnlyMagneticDays:
    Type: Number
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 2557
    Default: 0
  MagneticMemoryHours:
    Type: Number
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 8760
    Default: 1
  MagneticMagneticDays:
    Type: Number
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 2557
    Default: 365
  CommonMemoryHours:
    Type: Number
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 8760
    Default: 24
  CommonMagneticDays:
    Type: Number
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 2557
    Default: 30

Resources:
  RejectedDataBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${DatabaseName}-rejected-data-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}"
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${DatabaseName}-rejected-data"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref RejectedDataBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          # poc-table-01-batch-write objects
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: timestream.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
            Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${RejectedDataBucket}/poc-table-01-batch-write/*"
          # poc-table-01-batch-write listbucket
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: timestream.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:ListBucket
            Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${RejectedDataBucket}"
            Condition:
              StringLike:
                "s3:prefix": "poc-table-01-batch-write/*"
          # poc-table-03-older-records-magnetic objects
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: timestream.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
            Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${RejectedDataBucket}/poc-table-03-older-records-magnetic/*"
          # poc-table-03-older-records-magnetic listbucket
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: timestream.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:ListBucket
            Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${RejectedDataBucket}"
            Condition:
              StringLike:
                "s3:prefix": "poc-table-03-older-records-magnetic/*"
          # poc-table-04-common-attributes objects
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: timestream.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
            Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${RejectedDataBucket}/poc-table-04-common-attributes/*"
          # poc-table-04-common-attributes listbucket
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: timestream.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:ListBucket
            Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${RejectedDataBucket}"
            Condition:
              StringLike:
                "s3:prefix": "poc-table-04-common-attributes/*"

  # cfn-lint: disable=W3697
  TimestreamDB:
    Type: AWS::Timestream::Database
    Properties:
      DatabaseName: !Ref DatabaseName
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${DatabaseName}-${AWS::StackName}"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  # cfn-lint: disable=W3697
  BatchWriteTable:
    Type: AWS::Timestream::Table
    Properties:
      DatabaseName: !Ref TimestreamDB
      TableName: "poc-table-01-batch-write"
      RetentionProperties:
        MemoryStoreRetentionPeriodInHours: !Ref BatchWriteMemoryHours
        MagneticStoreRetentionPeriodInDays: !Ref BatchWriteMagneticDays
      MagneticStoreWriteProperties:
        EnableMagneticStoreWrites: true
        MagneticStoreRejectedDataLocation:
          S3Configuration:
            BucketName: !Ref RejectedDataBucket
            ObjectKeyPrefix: "poc-table-01-batch-write/"
            EncryptionOption: "SSE_S3"
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "poc-table-01-batch-write"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
    DependsOn: BucketPolicy

  # cfn-lint: disable=W3697
  MemOnlyTable:
    Type: AWS::Timestream::Table
    Properties:
      DatabaseName: !Ref TimestreamDB
      TableName: "poc-table-02-older-records-memonly"
      RetentionProperties:
        MemoryStoreRetentionPeriodInHours: !Ref MemOnlyMemoryHours
        MagneticStoreRetentionPeriodInDays: !Ref MemOnlyMagneticDays
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "poc-table-02-older-records-memonly"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  # cfn-lint: disable=W3697
  MagneticTable:
    Type: AWS::Timestream::Table
    Properties:
      DatabaseName: !Ref TimestreamDB
      TableName: "poc-table-03-older-records-magnetic"
      RetentionProperties:
        MemoryStoreRetentionPeriodInHours: !Ref MagneticMemoryHours
        MagneticStoreRetentionPeriodInDays: !Ref MagneticMagneticDays
      MagneticStoreWriteProperties:
        EnableMagneticStoreWrites: true
        MagneticStoreRejectedDataLocation:
          S3Configuration:
            BucketName: !Ref RejectedDataBucket
            ObjectKeyPrefix: "poc-table-03-older-records-magnetic/"
            EncryptionOption: "SSE_S3"
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "poc-table-03-older-records-magnetic"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
    DependsOn: BucketPolicy

  # cfn-lint: disable=W3697
  CommonAttributesTable:
    Type: AWS::Timestream::Table
    Properties:
      DatabaseName: !Ref TimestreamDB
      TableName: "poc-table-04-common-attributes"
      RetentionProperties:
        MemoryStoreRetentionPeriodInHours: !Ref CommonMemoryHours
        MagneticStoreRetentionPeriodInDays: !Ref CommonMagneticDays
      MagneticStoreWriteProperties:
        EnableMagneticStoreWrites: true
        MagneticStoreRejectedDataLocation:
          S3Configuration:
            BucketName: !Ref RejectedDataBucket
            ObjectKeyPrefix: "poc-table-04-common-attributes/"
            EncryptionOption: "SSE_S3"
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "poc-table-04-common-attributes"
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
    DependsOn: BucketPolicy

Outputs:
  DatabaseName:
    Value: !Ref DatabaseName
  DatabaseArn:
    Value: !GetAtt TimestreamDB.Arn
  TableArns:
    Value:
      Fn::Join:
        - ","
        - - !GetAtt BatchWriteTable.Arn
          - !GetAtt MemOnlyTable.Arn
          - !GetAtt MagneticTable.Arn
          - !GetAtt CommonAttributesTable.Arn
  RejectedDataBucketName:
    Value: !Ref RejectedDataBucket
deploy_logs: None

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates a DynamoDB table with LSI and GSI for multi-attribute access.'

Resources:
  LeaderboardTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LeaderboardTable-${AWS::Region}'
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: userId
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: gameTitle
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: score
          AttributeType: N
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: userId
          KeyType: HASH
        - AttributeName: gameTitle
          KeyType: RANGE
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      LocalSecondaryIndexes:
        - IndexName: UserScoreIndex
          KeySchema:
            - AttributeName: userId
              KeyType: HASH
            - AttributeName: score
              KeyType: RANGE
          Projection:
            ProjectionType: KEYS_ONLY
      GlobalSecondaryIndexes:
        - IndexName: GameScoreIndex
          KeySchema:
            - AttributeName: gameTitle
              KeyType: HASH
            - AttributeName: score
              KeyType: RANGE
          Projection:
            ProjectionType: KEYS_ONLY
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
        SSEType: KMS
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Table'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

Outputs:
  TableName:
    Description: 'Name of the Leaderboard DynamoDB table for integration'
    Value: !Ref LeaderboardTable
  TableArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Leaderboard DynamoDB table for integration'
    Value: !GetAtt LeaderboardTable.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Creates a production-ready DynamoDB table with best practices for security, scalability, and durability.

Parameters:
  BillingMode:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues:
      - PROVISIONED
      - PAY_PER_REQUEST
    Default: PAY_PER_REQUEST
  ReadCapacityUnits:
    Type: Number
    Default: 5
    MinValue: 1
  WriteCapacityUnits:
    Type: Number
    Default: 5
    MinValue: 1

Conditions:
  IsProvisioned: !Equals
    - !Ref BillingMode
    - PROVISIONED

Resources:
  DynamoDBTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-table-${AWS::Region}"
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: PK
          AttributeType: S
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: PK
          KeyType: HASH
      BillingMode: !Ref BillingMode
      ProvisionedThroughput:
        Fn::If:
          - IsProvisioned
          - ReadCapacityUnits: !Ref ReadCapacityUnits
            WriteCapacityUnits: !Ref WriteCapacityUnits
          - !Ref AWS::NoValue
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
        SSEType: KMS
        KMSMasterKeyId: alias/aws/dynamodb
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
      DeletionProtectionEnabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-table-${AWS::Region}"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"

Outputs:
  TableName:
    Description: The name of the DynamoDB table
    Value: !Ref DynamoDBTable
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-TableName"
  TableArn:
    Description: The ARN of the DynamoDB table
    Value: !GetAtt DynamoDBTable.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-TableArn"
  BillingMode:
    Description: The billing mode of the DynamoDB table
    Value: !Ref BillingMode
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-BillingMode"

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: IoT Core to SQS via SNS data pipeline

Parameters:
  MainQueueName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'IoTDataQueue'
    Description: Name for the main SQS queue
  DlqName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'IoTDataDLQ'
    Description: Name for the dead-letter SQS queue
  MainTopicName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'IoTDataTopic'
    Description: Name for the main SNS topic
  ErrorTopicName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'IoTDataErrorTopic'
    Description: Name for the error SNS topic
  RuleName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'IoTDataRule'
    Description: Name for the IoT Topic Rule
  RoleName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'IoTRuleRole'
    Description: Name for the IAM role used by the IoT Rule

Resources:
  Dlq:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Ref DlqName
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sqs
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: IoTPipeline

  MainQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Ref MainQueueName
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sqs
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      RedrivePolicy:
        deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt Dlq.Arn
        maxReceiveCount: 5
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: IoTPipeline

  MainTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Ref MainTopicName
      DisplayName: IoT Data Pipeline Topic
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sns
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: IoTPipeline

  ErrorTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Ref ErrorTopicName
      DisplayName: IoT Data Error Topic
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sns
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: IoTPipeline

  MainSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      Protocol: sqs
      TopicArn: !Ref MainTopic
      Endpoint: !GetAtt MainQueue.Arn
      RawMessageDelivery: true

  ErrorSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      Protocol: sqs
      TopicArn: !Ref ErrorTopic
      Endpoint: !GetAtt Dlq.Arn
      RawMessageDelivery: true

  QueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref MainQueue
        - !Ref Dlq
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowMainSNSPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action: sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt MainQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !Ref MainTopic
          - Sid: AllowErrorSNSPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action: sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt Dlq.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !Ref ErrorTopic

  IoTRuleRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Ref RoleName
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: iot.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${RoleName}-Policy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - lambda:InvokeFunction
                Resource: !GetAtt LambdaFunction.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: IoTPipeline

  LambdaExecRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${RoleName}-LambdaExec'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${RoleName}-LambdaExec-Policy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sns:Publish
                Resource: !Ref MainTopic
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: IoTPipeline

  LambdaFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IoTToSNS'
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecRole.Arn
      Timeout: 30
      Code:
        ZipFile: !Sub |
          import json
          import boto3
          def handler(event, context):
              sns = boto3.client('sns')
              sns.publish(TopicArn='${MainTopic}', MessageAttributes={},
                          Message=json.dumps(event['payload']), Subject='IoT Message')
              return {'statusCode': 200}
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: IoTPipeline

  IoTDataRule:
    Type: AWS::IoT::TopicRule
    Properties:
      RuleName: !Ref RuleName
      TopicRulePayload:
        Sql: "SELECT * FROM 'device/data'"
        Description: Capture device/data messages and route to SNS
        Actions:
          - Lambda:
              FunctionArn: !GetAtt LambdaFunction.Arn
              RoleArn: !GetAtt IoTRuleRole.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: IoTPipeline

Outputs:
  MainQueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the main SQS queue to store messages
    Value: !Ref MainQueue
  MainQueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the main SQS queue
    Value: !GetAtt MainQueue.Arn
  DlqUrl:
    Description: URL of the dead-letter SQS queue
    Value: !Ref Dlq
  DlqArn:
    Description: ARN of the dead-letter SQS queue
    Value: !GetAtt Dlq.Arn
  MainTopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the main SNS topic
    Value: !Ref MainTopic
  ErrorTopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the error SNS topic for IoT Rule failures
    Value: !Ref ErrorTopic
  MainSubscriptionArn:
    Description: ARN of the SNS subscription from main topic to main queue
    Value: !Ref MainSubscription
  ErrorSubscriptionArn:
    Description: ARN of the SNS subscription from error topic to DLQ
    Value: !Ref ErrorSubscription
  IoTRuleName:
    Description: Name of the IoT Topic Rule
    Value: !Ref RuleName
  IoTRuleArn:
    Description: ARN of the IoT Topic Rule
    Value: !Sub 'arn:aws:iot:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:rule/${RuleName}'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: |
  Deploys an S3 bucket integrated with Amazon EventBridge and SNS to notify subscribers about object creation events. The bucket sends ObjectCreated:* events to EventBridge, which routes them to an SNS topic via a rule with customized input.

Parameters:
  BucketNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    AllowedPattern: '^$|^[a-z0-9]([a-z0-9-]*[a-z0-9])?$'
    MaxLength: 20
    Description: 'Optional prefix for the S3 bucket name (empty for default; lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens; no leading/trailing hyphen)'

Resources:
  NotificationBucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${BucketNamePrefix}${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-events-bkt-${AWS::StackName}'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      NotificationConfiguration:
        EventBridgeConfiguration:
          EventBridgeEnabled: true

  NotificationBucketPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::BucketPolicy'
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref NotificationBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${NotificationBucket}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${NotificationBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

  ObjectCreatedTopic:
    Type: 'AWS::SNS::Topic'
    Properties:
      DisplayName: S3 Object Created Notifications

  ObjectCreatedTopicPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy'
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref ObjectCreatedTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowEventBridgeToPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref ObjectCreatedTopic

  ObjectCreatedRule:
    Type: 'AWS::Events::Rule'
    Properties:
      Description: 'Rule to capture Object Created events from NotificationBucket and forward to SNS topic'
      State: ENABLED
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - aws.s3
        'detail-type':
          - Object Created
        resources:
          - !GetAtt NotificationBucket.Arn
      Targets:
        - Arn: !Ref ObjectCreatedTopic
          Id: SNSTarget
          InputTransformer:
            InputPathsMap:
              'bucketName': '$.detail.bucket.name'
              'objectKey': '$.detail.object.key'
              'eventName': '$.detail.eventName'
              'objectSize': '$.detail.object.size'
              'objectETag': '$.detail.object.eTag'
            InputTemplate: |
              {
                "subject": "S3 Object Created: <objectKey> in bucket <bucketName>",
                "default": "New object created:\nBucket: <bucketName>\nKey: <objectKey>\nEvent Name: <eventName>\nSize: <objectSize>\nETag: <objectETag>"
              }

Outputs:
  NotificationBucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the S3 bucket configured for EventBridge notifications'
    Value: !Ref NotificationBucket

  ObjectCreatedTopicArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the SNS topic for S3 object creation notifications'
    Value: !Ref ObjectCreatedTopic

  ObjectCreatedRuleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the EventBridge rule matching S3 Object Created events'
    Value: !Ref ObjectCreatedRule
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-2fd80f4a' on localstack", 'iac-god-eval-2fd80f4a: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'NotificationBucket: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'NotificationBucket: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'NotificationBucketPolicy: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'NotificationBucketPolicy: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'ObjectCreatedTopic: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'ObjectCreatedTopic: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'ObjectCreatedRule: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'ObjectCreatedRule: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'ObjectCreatedTopicPolicy: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'ObjectCreatedTopicPolicy: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-2fd80f4a: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A']

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Real-time data ingestion and storage pipeline using Kinesis Data Stream, Kinesis Data Firehose, and S3 bucket.

Parameters:
  ShardCount:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
    MinValue: 1
  RetentionPeriodHours:
    Type: Number
    Default: 24
  BufferSizeInMBs:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 128
  BufferIntervalInSeconds:
    Type: Number
    Default: 60

Resources:
  DataBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}-data-bucket"
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: MoveToGlacier
            Status: Enabled
            Transitions:
              - TransitionInDays: 30
                StorageClass: GLACIER

  RealTimeDataStream:
    Type: AWS::Kinesis::Stream
    Properties:
      Name: RealTimeDataStream
      ShardCount: !Ref ShardCount
      RetentionPeriodHours: !Ref RetentionPeriodHours
      StreamEncryption:
        EncryptionType: KMS
        KeyId: alias/aws/kinesis

  FirehoseDeliveryRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: FirehoseDeliveryRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: firehose.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: FirehosePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kinesis:DescribeStream
                  - kinesis:GetShardIterator
                  - kinesis:GetRecords
                  - kinesis:ListShards
                  - kinesis:SubscribeToShard
                Resource: !GetAtt RealTimeDataStream.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:PutObjectAcl
                  - s3:AbortMultipartUpload
                Resource: !Sub "${DataBucket.Arn}/*"

  DataIngestionFirehose:
    Type: AWS::KinesisFirehose::DeliveryStream
    Properties:
      DeliveryStreamType: KinesisStreamAsSource
      KinesisStreamSourceConfiguration:
        KinesisStreamARN: !GetAtt RealTimeDataStream.Arn
        RoleARN: !GetAtt FirehoseDeliveryRole.Arn
      S3DestinationConfiguration:
        BucketARN: !GetAtt DataBucket.Arn
        RoleARN: !GetAtt FirehoseDeliveryRole.Arn
        BufferingHints:
          IntervalInSeconds: !Ref BufferIntervalInSeconds
          SizeInMBs: !Ref BufferSizeInMBs
        CompressionFormat: GZIP
        Prefix: "year=!{timestamp:yyyy}/month=!{timestamp:MM}/day=!{timestamp:dd}/hour=!{timestamp:HH}/"

  DataBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref DataBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowFirehose
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: firehose.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:PutObjectAcl
              - s3:AbortMultipartUpload
            Resource: !Sub "${DataBucket.Arn}/*"
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Ref AWS::AccountId
              ArnEquals:
                'aws:SourceArn': !GetAtt DataIngestionFirehose.Arn

Outputs:
  KinesisStreamArn:
    Description: ARN of the Kinesis Data Stream
    Value: !GetAtt RealTimeDataStream.Arn
  FirehoseDeliveryStreamArn:
    Description: ARN of the Kinesis Data Firehose Delivery Stream
    Value: !GetAtt DataIngestionFirehose.Arn
  S3BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 Bucket
    Value: !Ref DataBucket
  FirehoseRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the Firehose Delivery Role
    Value: !GetAtt FirehoseDeliveryRole.Arn
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-b4e36e97' on localstack", 'iac-god-eval-b4e36e97: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'DataBucket: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'DataBucket: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'RealTimeDataStream: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'RealTimeDataStream: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'FirehoseDeliveryRole: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'FirehoseDeliveryRole: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'DataIngestionFirehose: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', "DataIngestionFirehose: CREATE_FAILED - Resource provider operation failed: 'DeliveryStreamName'", 'iac-god-eval-b4e36e97: CREATE_FAILED - N/A', 'DataBucketPolicy: CREATE_FAILED - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-b4e36e97: CREATE_FAILED - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-b4e36e97: ROLLBACK_COMPLETE - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-b4e36e97: CREATE_FAILED - N/A', "Unexpected error: 'reason'"]

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Automated monitoring and notification system for AWS Secrets Manager secret lifecycle events, which sends alerts via Amazon SNS when secrets are created, updated, or accessed.

Parameters:
  TrailName:
    Type: String
    Default: secretsmanagermonitoringtrail
    Description: Name for the CloudTrail trail
  SNSTopicName:
    Type: String
    Default: SecretsManagerAlerts
    Description: Name for the SNS topic
  BucketName:
    Type: String
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9.-]*[a-z0-9]$'
    MinLength: '3'
    MaxLength: '63'
    Description: Unique lowercase DNS-compliant S3 bucket name (a-z0-9.-, alphanumeric start/end, 3-63 chars; provide at deploy

Resources:
  CloudTrailBucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Ref BucketName
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled

  CloudTrailBucketPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::BucketPolicy'
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref CloudTrailBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AWSCloudTrailAclCheck
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: cloudtrail.amazonaws.com
            Action: s3:GetBucketAcl
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:s3:::${CloudTrailBucket}'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:cloudtrail:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:trail/${TrailName}'
          - Sid: AWSCloudTrailWrite
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: cloudtrail.amazonaws.com
            Action: s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:s3:::${CloudTrailBucket}/AWSLogs/${AWS::AccountId}/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                's3:x-amz-acl': bucket-owner-full-control
          - Sid: EnforceSSE
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: "*"
            Action: s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:s3:::${CloudTrailBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                's3:x-amz-server-side-encryption': 'AES256'

  SecretsManagerCloudTrail:
    Type: 'AWS::CloudTrail::Trail'
    DependsOn: CloudTrailBucketPolicy
    Properties:
      TrailName: !Ref TrailName
      S3BucketName: !Ref CloudTrailBucket
      IsMultiRegionTrail: true
      IsLogging: true
      EnableLogFileValidation: true
      EventSelectors:
        - IncludeManagementEvents: true
          ReadWriteType: All
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SecretsManagerMonitoring

  SecretsManagerSNSTopic:
    Type: 'AWS::SNS::Topic'
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Ref SNSTopicName
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sns
      DisplayName: Secrets Manager Lifecycle Alerts
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SecretsManagerMonitoring

  EventBridgeRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EventBridgeRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - 'sts:AssumeRole'
              - 'sts:TagSession'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublishToSNSPolicy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sns:Publish
                Resource: !Ref SecretsManagerSNSTopic
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SecretsManagerMonitoring

  SecretsManagerEventsRule:
    Type: 'AWS::Events::Rule'
    DependsOn: SecretsManagerCloudTrail
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SecretsEventsRule'
      State: ENABLED
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - aws.secretsmanager
        'detail-type':
          - AWS API Call via CloudTrail
        detail:
          eventSource:
            - secretsmanager.amazonaws.com
          eventName:
            - CreateSecret
            - UpdateSecret
            - PutSecretValue
            - GetSecretValue
      Targets:
        - Arn: !Ref SecretsManagerSNSTopic
          Id: SNSTarget
          RoleArn: !GetAtt EventBridgeRole.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SecretsManagerMonitoring

  SecretsManagerSNSTopicPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy'
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref SecretsManagerSNSTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref SecretsManagerSNSTopic
            Condition:
              ArnLike:
                aws:SourceArn: !GetAtt SecretsManagerEventsRule.Arn

Outputs:
  SNSTopicArn:
    Description: The ARN of the SNS topic to subscribe to for alerts
    Value: !Ref SecretsManagerSNSTopic
  CloudTrailTrailArn:
    Description: The ARN of the CloudTrail trail
    Value: !GetAtt SecretsManagerCloudTrail.Arn
  S3BucketName:
    Description: The name of the S3 bucket storing CloudTrail logs
    Value: !Ref CloudTrailBucket
  EventBridgeRuleArn:
    Description: The ARN of the EventBridge rule monitoring Secrets Manager events
    Value: !GetAtt SecretsManagerEventsRule.Arn
