final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Secure parameter storage and retrieval for serverless config management using SSM Parameter Store and Secrets Manager.'

Resources:
  DemoConfigParam:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '/${AWS::StackName}/config/demo'
      Type: String
      Value: 'This is A/B'

  AppVersionParam:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '/${AWS::StackName}/config/app-version'
      Type: String
      Value: '1.0.0'

  DemoSecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DemoSecret'
      GenerateSecretString:
        SecretStringTemplate: '{"username": "admin"}'
        GenerateStringKey: 'password'
        PasswordLength: 16
        ExcludeCharacters: '!@#$%^&*()_+-=[]{}|;:,.<>?'
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'

  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LambdaExecutionRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SSMReadPolicy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssm:GetParametersByPath
                  - ssm:GetParameter
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:ssm:*:*:parameter/${AWS::StackName}/*'
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SecretsReadPolicy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - secretsmanager:GetSecretValue
                  - secretsmanager:DescribeSecret
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:secretsmanager:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:secret:${DemoSecret}'
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'

  ParameterRetrievalFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ParameterRetrievalFunction'
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: lambda_function.lambda_handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Timeout: 30
      Environment:
        Variables:
          Namespace: !Sub '/${AWS::StackName}/'
          SecretArn: !Ref DemoSecret
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import boto3
          import os

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              ssm_client = boto3.client('ssm')
              secrets_client = boto3.client('secretsmanager')

              namespace = os.environ['Namespace']
              secret_arn = os.environ['SecretArn']

              # Fetch SSM parameters by path
              ssm_response = ssm_client.get_parameters_by_path(
                  Path=namespace,
                  Recursive=True,
                  WithDecryption=False
              )
              print("Retrieved SSM Parameters:")
              for param in ssm_response.get('Parameters', []):
                  print(f"  {param['Name']}: {param['Value']}")

              # Fetch and decrypt secret
              secret_response = secrets_client.get_secret_value(SecretId=secret_arn)
              secret_dict = json.loads(secret_response['SecretString'])
              print(f"Retrieved Secret - Username: {secret_dict['username']}, Password: {secret_dict.get('password', 'N/A')}")

              return {
                  'statusCode': 200,
                  'body': json.dumps('Parameters and secret retrieved successfully!')
              }
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'
    DependsOn:
      - DemoConfigParam
      - AppVersionParam

Outputs:
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Lambda function for parameter retrieval'
    Value: !Ref ParameterRetrievalFunction

  SSMConfigDemoParam:
    Description: 'Name of the demo SSM parameter'
    Value: !Ref DemoConfigParam

  SSMAppVersionParam:
    Description: 'Name of the app version SSM parameter'
    Value: !Ref AppVersionParam

  SecretsManagerSecretArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Secrets Manager secret'
    Value: !Sub 'arn:aws:secretsmanager:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:secret:${DemoSecret}'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Deploys an isolated MySQL RDS instance (db.r5.large) with io1 Provisioned IOPS storage in a dedicated VPC across two private subnets in different Availability Zones, with network isolation via security group restricting access to port 3306 for internal VPC traffic only.'

Parameters:
  DBName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'mydatabase'
  MasterUsername:
    Type: String
    Default: 'admin'
  MasterUserPassword:
    Type: String
    NoEcho: true
    Default: 'TempPass123!#'
  AllocatedStorage:
    Type: Number
    Default: 100
  Iops:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1000
  VpcCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
  SubnetCidr1:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24
  SubnetCidr2:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.2.0/24

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref SubnetCidr1
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-subnet-1'
        - Key: Type
          Value: private

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref SubnetCidr2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-subnet-2'
        - Key: Type
          Value: private

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-rt'

  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: !Sub 'DB Subnet Group for ${AWS::StackName}'
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-db-subnet-group'

  RDSSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: !Sub 'Security group for RDS DB instance in ${AWS::StackName}'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          CidrIp: !Ref VpcCidr
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-rds-sg'

  PasswordParam:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-db-master-password'
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref MasterUserPassword

  DBInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      Engine: mysql
      DBInstanceClass: db.r6i.large
      AllocatedStorage: !Ref AllocatedStorage
      StorageType: io1
      Iops: !Ref Iops
      MasterUsername: !Ref MasterUsername
      MasterUserPassword: !Sub '{{resolve:ssm:${PasswordParam}}}'
      DBName: !Ref DBName
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref RDSSecurityGroup
      MultiAZ: true
      StorageEncrypted: true
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 7
      DeletionProtection: true
      AutoMinorVersionUpgrade: false

Outputs:
  RDSEndpointAddress:
    Description: The endpoint address of the RDS MySQL instance
    Value: !GetAtt DBInstance.Endpoint.Address
  RDSEndpointPort:
    Description: The endpoint port of the RDS MySQL instance
    Value: !GetAtt DBInstance.Endpoint.Port

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Secure S3 buckets for replicas and access logs, compliant with AWS security best practices including encryption, public access blocks, HTTPS enforcement, versioning, and lifecycle management.'

Resources:
  ReplicaBucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-replicas-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      ObjectLockEnabled: false
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      LoggingConfiguration:
        DestinationBucketName: !Ref AccessLogBucket
        LogFilePrefix: replica-logs/
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  ReplicaBucketPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::BucketPolicy'
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref ReplicaBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: ForceSSL
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ReplicaBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Sid: ForceSSLBucket
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ReplicaBucket}'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

  AccessLogBucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-access-logs-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: MoveToGlacierAndExpire
            Status: Enabled
            Transitions:
              - TransitionInDays: 365
                StorageClass: GLACIER
            ExpirationInDays: 2555
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  AccessLogBucketPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::BucketPolicy'
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref AccessLogBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: ForceSSL
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${AccessLogBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Sid: ForceSSLBucket
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${AccessLogBucket}'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Sid: AllowLoggingFromReplicaBucket
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: logging.s3.amazonaws.com
            Action: 's3:PutObject'
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${AccessLogBucket}/replica-logs/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}'
              ArnLike:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ReplicaBucket}'

Outputs:
  ReplicaBucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the secure ReplicaBucket for storing replicas'
    Value: !Ref ReplicaBucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ReplicaBucketName'

  AccessLogBucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the secure AccessLogBucket for S3 server access logs'
    Value: !Ref AccessLogBucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AccessLogBucketName'
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-509015f4' on localstack", 'iac-god-eval-509015f4: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'AccessLogBucket: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'AccessLogBucket: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'ReplicaBucket: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'ReplicaBucket: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'AccessLogBucketPolicy: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'AccessLogBucketPolicy: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'ReplicaBucketPolicy: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'ReplicaBucketPolicy: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-509015f4: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A']

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: S3 Bucket with Lambda trigger for object creation events

Resources:
  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}-bucket"
      OwnershipControls:
        Rules:
          - ObjectOwnership: BucketOwnerPreferred
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              KMSMasterKeyID: alias/aws/s3
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      NotificationConfiguration:
        LambdaConfigurations:
          - Event: s3:ObjectCreated:*
            Function: !Sub "arn:aws:lambda:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:function:${AWS::StackName}-lambda-trigger"

  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: S3BucketAccessPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource:
                  - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}-bucket"
                  - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}-bucket/*"

  LambdaFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-lambda-trigger"
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              print(event)
              return {
                  'statusCode': 200,
                  'body': 'OK'
              }
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Runtime: python3.12
      Timeout: 30
      MemorySize: 128

  LambdaInvocationPermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      FunctionName: !Ref LambdaFunction
      Principal: s3.amazonaws.com
      SourceAccount: !Ref "AWS::AccountId"
      SourceArn: !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}-bucket"

Outputs:
  S3BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 Bucket
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-S3BucketName"

  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda Function
    Value: !GetAtt LambdaFunction.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-LambdaFunctionArn"

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for creating an Amazon ECR repository with repository policy, image scanning, lifecycle policy, and tags optimized for Kubernetes container image management.'

Parameters:
  RepoNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-zA-Z0-9\-]*$'
    MaxLength: 50
    Description: 'Optional prefix for the ECR repository name (alphanumeric and hyphens only).'

Resources:
  KubernetesECRRepo:
    Type: 'AWS::ECR::Repository'
    Properties:
      RepositoryName: !Sub '${RepoNamePrefix}${AWS::StackName}-kubernetes-repo'
      ImageScanningConfiguration:
        ScanOnPush: true
      LifecyclePolicy:
        LifecyclePolicyText: |
          {
            "rules": [
              {
                "rulePriority": 1,
                "description": "Expire untagged images older than 30 days",
                "selection": {
                  "tagStatus": "untagged",
                  "countType": "sinceImagePushed",
                  "countUnit": "days",
                  "countNumber": 30
                },
                "action": {
                  "type": "expire"
                }
              },
              {
                "rulePriority": 2,
                "description": "Keep only the last 10 tagged images",
                "selection": {
                  "tagStatus": "tagged",
                  "countType": "imageCountMoreThan",
                  "countNumber": 10
                },
                "action": {
                  "type": "expire"
                }
              }
            ]
          }
      RepositoryPolicyText:
        Fn::Sub:
          - |
            {
              "Version": "2012-10-17",
              "Statement": [
                {
                  "Sid": "DenyInsecureTransport",
                  "Effect": "Deny",
                  "Principal": "*",
                  "Action": "*",
                  "Resource": "${RepoArn}",
                  "Condition": {
                    "Bool": {
                      "aws:SecureTransport": "false"
                    }
                  }
                },
                {
                  "Sid": "AllowRootFullAccess",
                  "Effect": "Allow",
                  "Principal": {
                    "AWS": "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
                  },
                  "Action": [
                    "ecr:GetAuthorizationToken",
                    "ecr:BatchCheckLayerAvailability",
                    "ecr:GetDownloadUrlForLayer",
                    "ecr:BatchGetImage",
                    "ecr:PutImage",
                    "ecr:InitiateLayerUpload",
                    "ecr:UploadLayerPart",
                    "ecr:CompleteLayerUpload",
                    "ecr:DeleteRepository"
                  ],
                  "Resource": "${RepoArn}"
                }
              ]
            }
          - RepoArn: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:ecr:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:repository/${RepoNamePrefix}${AWS::StackName}-kubernetes-repo'
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Purpose'
          Value: 'KubernetesContainerImages'
        - Key: 'Environment'
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

Outputs:
  KubernetesRepositoryUri:
    Description: 'The URI of the ECR repository for Kubernetes container images.'
    Value: !GetAtt KubernetesECRRepo.RepositoryUri
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-KubernetesRepositoryUri'

  KubernetesRepositoryArn:
    Description: 'The ARN of the ECR repository.'
    Value: !GetAtt KubernetesECRRepo.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-KubernetesRepositoryArn'
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-fea3d4ac' on localstack", 'iac-god-eval-fea3d4ac: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'KubernetesECRRepo: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'KubernetesECRRepo: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-fea3d4ac: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A']

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: FIFO SQS Queue with DLQ and encryption for reliable messaging.

Parameters:
  QueueNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: my-fifo-queue

Resources:
  MainQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub "${QueueNamePrefix}.fifo"
      FifoQueue: true
      ContentBasedDeduplication: true
      DeduplicationScope: messageGroup
      FifoThroughputLimit: perMessageGroupId
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sqs
      RedrivePolicy: !Sub |
        {
          "deadLetterTargetArn": "${DLQ.Arn}",
          "maxReceiveCount": 5
        }

  DLQ:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub "${QueueNamePrefix}-DLQ.fifo"
      FifoQueue: true
      ContentBasedDeduplication: true
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600

Outputs:
  QueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the main FIFO SQS queue
    Value: !Ref MainQueue
  QueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the main FIFO SQS queue
    Value: !GetAtt MainQueue.Arn
  DLQUrl:
    Description: URL of the Dead Letter Queue
    Value: !Ref DLQ

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Deploys a secure, encrypted SQS Standard Queue with restricted access policy

Parameters:
  QueueName:
    Type: String
    Default: StandardQueue
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-zA-Z0-9-]{1,80}$'
    Description: Base name for the SQS queue (full name will be suffixed for uniqueness)

Resources:
  MyStandardQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub "${QueueName}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}"
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      MaximumMessageSize: 262144
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sqs
      ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds: 20
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref QueueName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  QueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref MyStandardQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyCrossAccountAccess
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: sqs:*
            Resource: !GetAtt MyStandardQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount:
                  - !Sub "${AWS::AccountId}"

Outputs:
  QueueUrl:
    Description: The URL of the created SQS Queue
    Value: !Ref MyStandardQueue
  QueueArn:
    Description: The ARN of the created SQS Queue
    Value: !GetAtt MyStandardQueue.Arn
  QueueName:
    Description: The name of the created SQS Queue
    Value: !Sub "${QueueName}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}"

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates a multi-AZ VPC with a pair of public subnets and one private subnet across two Availability Zones using a static RegionMap for consistent AZ placement.'

Mappings:
  RegionMap:
    us-east-1:
      AZ1: us-east-1a
      AZ2: us-east-1b
    us-east-2:
      AZ1: us-east-2a
      AZ2: us-east-2b
    us-west-2:
      AZ1: us-west-2a
      AZ2: us-west-2b
    us-west-1:
      AZ1: us-west-1a
      AZ2: us-west-1b
    eu-west-1:
      AZ1: eu-west-1a
      AZ2: eu-west-1b

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !FindInMap [!Ref AWS::Region, RegionMap, "AZ1"]
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub 'PublicSubnet1-${AWS::StackName}'

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !FindInMap [!Ref AWS::Region, RegionMap, "AZ2"]
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub 'PublicSubnet2-${AWS::StackName}'

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !FindInMap [!Ref AWS::Region, RegionMap, "AZ1"]
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub 'PrivateSubnet1-${AWS::StackName}'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub 'PublicRouteTable-${AWS::StackName}'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub 'PrivateRouteTable-${AWS::StackName}'

  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPCId'

  PublicSubnet1Id:
    Description: Public Subnet 1 ID (AZ1)
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet1
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet1Id'

  PublicSubnet2Id:
    Description: Public Subnet 2 ID (AZ2)
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet2
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet2Id'

  PrivateSubnet1Id:
    Description: Private Subnet 1 ID (AZ1)
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet1Id'

  AvailabilityZone1:
    Description: Availability Zone 1
    Value: !FindInMap [!Ref AWS::Region, RegionMap, "AZ1"]
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AvailabilityZone1'

  AvailabilityZone2:
    Description: Availability Zone 2
    Value: !FindInMap [!Ref AWS::Region, RegionMap, "AZ2"]
    Export:

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket with integrated AWS KMS encryption, lifecycle management, KMS key alias, and organizational tags.

Resources:
  S3KMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for S3 bucket encryption
      KeySpec: SYMMETRIC_DEFAULT
      Enabled: true
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy: !Sub |
        {
          "Version": "2012-10-17",
          "Id": "s3-kms-key-policy",
          "Statement": [
            {
              "Sid": "Enable root permissions",
              "Effect": "Allow",
              "Principal": {
                "AWS": "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
              },
              "Action": "kms:*",
              "Resource": "*"
            },
            {
              "Sid": "Allow S3 service to use key",
              "Effect": "Allow",
              "Principal": {
                "Service": "s3.amazonaws.com"
              },
              "Action": [
                "kms:Encrypt",
                "kms:Decrypt",
                "kms:ReEncrypt*",
                "kms:GenerateDataKey*",
                "kms:DescribeKey"
              ],
              "Resource": "*"
            }
          ]
        }
      Tags:
        - Key: KeyUsage
          Value: ENCRYPT_DECRYPT

  S3KMSAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: alias/my-s3-encryption-key
      TargetKeyId: !Ref S3KMSKey

  MyEncryptedBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !GetAtt S3KMSKey.Arn
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: DefaultLifecycleRule
            Status: Enabled
            NoncurrentVersionTransitions:
              - StorageClass: STANDARD_IA
                TransitionInDays: 30
              - StorageClass: GLACIER
                TransitionInDays: 90
            ExpirationInDays: 365
            NoncurrentVersionExpirationInDays: 90
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: EncryptedStorage

  BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref MyEncryptedBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Deny unencrypted uploads
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: s3:PutObject*
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${MyEncryptedBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                's3:x-amz-server-side-encryption': 'aws:kms'
          - Sid: Deny incorrect KMS key uploads
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: s3:PutObject*
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${MyEncryptedBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              ArnNotEquals:
                's3:x-amz-kms-key-id': !GetAtt S3KMSKey.Arn

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the encrypted S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref MyEncryptedBucket
  KMSKeyArn:
    Description: ARN of the KMS key used for S3 encryption
    Value: !GetAtt S3KMSKey.Arn
  KMSAliasArn:
    Description: ARN of the KMS key alias
    Value: !Ref S3KMSAlias
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-b78ef773' on localstack", 'iac-god-eval-b78ef773: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'S3KMSKey: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'S3KMSKey: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'MyEncryptedBucket: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'MyEncryptedBucket: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'BucketPolicy: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'BucketPolicy: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'S3KMSAlias: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'S3KMSAlias: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-b78ef773: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A']

Description: 'VPC with public/private subnets across AZs, IGW, managed NAT Gateways (one per AZ) for high availability outbound from private subnets'

  PrivateRouteTable1:

    Properties:

        - Key: Environment

  PrivateRoute1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:

    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:

      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable1

  PrivateRouteTable2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRouteTable2'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  PrivateRoute2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable2
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway2

  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation

Outputs:

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Amazon Data Firehose delivery stream with server-side encryption using AWS-owned KMS keys, S3 destination, and destination error logging enabled to a CloudWatch Log Group and Log Stream.

Resources:
  FirehoseBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-firehose-bucket-${AWS::Region}"
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              KMSMasterKeyID: aws/s3
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  FirehoseDeliveryRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-FirehoseDeliveryRole"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: firehose.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: FirehoseDeliveryPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:PutObjectAcl
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:DeleteObject
                Resource: !Sub "${FirehoseBucket.Arn}/*"

  FirehoseLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub "/aws/kinesis-firehose/${AWS::StackName}-errors"
      RetentionInDays: 30
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-errors"

  FirehoseLogStream:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogStream
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Ref FirehoseLogGroup
      LogStreamName: DeliveryErrors

  FirehoseLoggingRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-FirehoseLoggingRole"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: firehose.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: FirehoseLoggingPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:PutMetricFilter
                  - logs:DescribeLogGroups
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:*"

  FirehoseDeliveryStream:
    Type: AWS::KinesisFirehose::DeliveryStream
    Properties:
      DeliveryStreamName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-stream-${AWS::Region}"
      DeliveryStreamType: DirectPut
      DeliveryStreamEncryptionConfigurationInput:
        KeyType: AWS_OWNED_CMK
      ExtendedS3DestinationConfiguration:
        BucketARN: !GetAtt FirehoseBucket.Arn
        RoleARN: !GetAtt FirehoseDeliveryRole.Arn
        BufferingHints:
          IntervalInSeconds: 60
          SizeInMBs: 1
        CompressionFormat: GZIP
        CloudWatchLoggingOptions:
          Enabled: true
          LogGroupName: !Ref FirehoseLogGroup
          LogStreamName: !Ref FirehoseLogStream

Outputs:
  DeliveryStreamArn:
    Description: ARN of the Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream
    Value: !GetAtt FirehoseDeliveryStream.Arn
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket used as Firehose destination
    Value: !Ref FirehoseBucket
  LogGroupName:
    Description: Name of the CloudWatch Log Group for Firehose destination errors
    Value: !Ref FirehoseLogGroup
  FirehoseDeliveryRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the IAM role for Firehose delivery to S3
    Value: !GetAtt FirehoseDeliveryRole.Arn
  FirehoseLoggingRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the IAM role for Firehose logging to CloudWatch
    Value: !GetAtt FirehoseLoggingRole.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Deploys a resilient Jenkins CI/CD server on EC2 within a VPC, with static Elastic IP, SSM access, security group for HTTP/ICMP, and CloudWatch alarm for StatusCheckFailed_System monitoring with optional SNS notifications for alerts and recovery actions.'
Parameters:
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.medium
    Description: EC2 instance type for the Jenkins server
  KeyName:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Name of an existing EC2 KeyPair for SSH access (optional, SSM preferred)
Mappings:
  RegionMap:
    us-east-1:
      AMI: ami-1d3bd2e73d9c80e8c
    us-east-2:
      AMI: ami-0a0ad6b70e61be944
    us-west-1:
      AMI: ami-0d527addd967b5de7
    us-west-2:
      AMI: ami-0c02fb55956c7d316
    ca-central-1:
      AMI: ami-0d6eff73b8ce6b1d5
    eu-west-1:
      AMI: ami-0fe704e6d5f79d259
Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'
  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet'
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'
  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
  RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
  JenkinsSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Jenkins allowing HTTP and ICMP inbound, all outbound
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: icmp
          FromPort: 8
          ToPort: 0
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-JenkinsSecurityGroup'
  JenkinsEC2Role:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-JenkinsEC2Role'
  InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref JenkinsEC2Role
  JenkinsEC2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT20M
    DependsOn: RouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      ImageId: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AMI]
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      KeyName: !If [UseKeyName, !Ref KeyName, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref JenkinsSecurityGroup
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref InstanceProfile
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-JenkinsEC2'
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash -ex
          yum update -y
          yum install -y aws-cfn-bootstrap
          amazon-linux-extras install -y java-openjdk11
          wget -O /etc/yum.repos.d/jenkins.repo https://pkg.jenkins.io/redhat-stable/jenkins.repo
          rpm --import https://pkg.jenkins.io/redhat-stable/jenkins.io-2023.key
          yum install -y jenkins
          sed -i 's/^\(JENKINS_PORT\)=\(.*\)/\1="80"/' /etc/sysconfig/jenkins
          if ! grep -q "httpListenAddress" /etc/sysconfig/jenkins; then
            echo 'JENKINS_ARGS="--httpListenAddress=0.0.0.0"' >> /etc/sysconfig/jenkins
          else
            sed -i 's/^\(JENKINS_ARGS\)=\(.*\)--httpListenAddress\([^ ]*\)/\1="--httpListenAddress=0.0.0.0"/' /etc/sysconfig/jenkins
          fi
          firewall-cmd --permanent --add-port=80/tcp
          firewall-cmd --reload
          systemctl daemon-reload
          systemctl enable jenkins
          systemctl start jenkins
          timeout 600 bash -c 'while ! curl -f http://localhost:80/login?from=%2F >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 10; done' || true
          /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e $? --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource JenkinsEC2 --region ${AWS::Region}
  EIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-JenkinsEIP'
  EIPAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIPAssociation
    Properties:
      InstanceId: !Ref JenkinsEC2
      EIP: !Ref EIP
  JenkinsAlarmTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      DisplayName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-JenkinsStatusCheckFailed_System'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-JenkinsAlarmTopic'
  JenkinsStatusCheckFailedSystem:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-JenkinsStatusCheckFailed_System'
      AlarmDescription: 'Triggers on StatusCheckFailed_System to enable recovery actions (e.g., reboot via Lambda on this SNS topic)'
      ActionsEnabled: true
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref JenkinsAlarmTopic
      OKActions:
        - !Ref JenkinsAlarmTopic
      Namespace: AWS/EC2
      MetricName: StatusCheckFailed_System
      Dimensions:
        - Name: InstanceId
          Value: !Ref JenkinsEC2
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 2
      Statistic: Maximum
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold
      Threshold: 1.0
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-JenkinsStatusCheckFailed_System'
Conditions:
  UseKeyName: !Not [!Equals [!Ref KeyName, '']]
Outputs:
  JenkinsEC2InstanceId:
    Description: 'Jenkins EC2 Instance ID. Access via SSM Session Manager: aws ssm start-session --target <InstanceId>'
    Value: !Ref JenkinsEC2
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-JenkinsEC2InstanceId'
  JenkinsEIPAllocationId:
    Description: Elastic IP Allocation ID
    Value: !GetAtt EIP.AllocationId
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-JenkinsEIPAllocationId'
  JenkinsEIP:
    Description: 'Static Public IP for Jenkins HTTP access: http://<EIP>:80 . Subscribe to AlarmTopic for recovery alerts.'
    Value: !Ref EIP
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-JenkinsEIP'
  JenkinsAlarmTopicArn:
    Description: SNS Topic ARN for StatusCheckFailed_System alarm. Subscribe for notifications or Lambda for auto-recovery (e.g., reboot instance).
    Value: !Ref JenkinsAlarmTopic
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-JenkinsAlarmTopicArn'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'AWS Glue ETL job infrastructure: S3 bucket for scripts and logs, IAM role with least-privilege permissions, and Glue ETL job using version 4.0 with Python script.'

Resources:
  S3Bucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-glue-scripts-${AWS::StackName}'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled

  GlueETLJobRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      RoleName: GlueETLJobRole
      Path: '/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: glue.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - 'arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSGlueServiceRole'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: 'GlueS3BucketAccess'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:GetObjectVersion
                  - s3:DeleteObject
                Resource:
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}/scripts/*'
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}/logs/*'

  SampleConvertJob:
    Type: 'AWS::Glue::Job'
    Properties:
      Name: SampleConvertJob
      GlueVersion: '4.0'
      Command:
        Name: glueetl
        ScriptLocation: !Sub 's3://${S3Bucket}/gue_scripts/sample_convert.py'
        PythonVersion: '3'
      Role: !GetAtt GlueETLJobRole.Arn
      WorkerType: G.1X
      NumberOfWorkers: 2
      Timeout: 60
      MaxRetries: 0
      DefaultArguments:
        '--enable-metrics': ''
        '--enable-continuous-cloudwatch-log': 'true'
        '--Spark-event-logs-path': !Sub 's3://${S3Bucket}/logs/'
        '--TempDir': !Sub 's3://${S3Bucket}/temp/'
        '--job-bookmark-option': 'job-bookmark-disable'

Outputs:
  S3BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket for Glue scripts and logs
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket
  GlueJobName:
    Description: Name of the Glue ETL job
    Value: !Ref SampleConvertJob
  GlueRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the IAM role for the Glue job
    Value: !GetAtt GlueETLJobRole.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >-
  CloudFormation template for multi-region application failover architecture using Amazon Route 53 Application Recovery Controller (ARC).
  Configures a recovery cluster, control panel, routing controls for two regions (us-east-1 primary, us-west-2 secondary),
  a safety rule enforcing at least one active region, and Route 53 health checks for regional monitoring.
  Health check status can inform manual or automated toggling of routing controls via ARC APIs, console, or Route 53 failover policies.
  Deploy this stack in us-east-1 as ARC resources require it.

Parameters:
  PrimaryRegionName:
    Type: String
    Default: us-east-1
    Description: Region identifier for primary routing control name (e.g., us-east-1)
  SecondaryRegionName:
    Type: String
    Default: us-west-2
    Description: Region identifier for secondary routing control name (e.g., us-west-2)
  PrimaryEndpointFQDN:
    Type: String
    Default: app-primary.example.com
    Description: FQDN of the primary region (e.g., us-east-1) application endpoint for health check (e.g., app-primary.example.com)
  SecondaryEndpointFQDN:
    Type: String
    Default: app-secondary.example.com
    Description: FQDN of the secondary region (e.g., us-west-2) application endpoint for health check (e.g., app-secondary.example.com)

Resources:
  MultiRegionFailoverCluster:
    Type: AWS::Route53RecoveryControl::Cluster
    Properties:
      Name: MultiRegionFailoverCluster

  FailoverControlPanel:
    Type: AWS::Route53RecoveryControl::ControlPanel
    Properties:
      Name: FailoverControlPanel
      ClusterArn: !GetAtt MultiRegionFailoverCluster.ClusterArn

  PrimaryRoutingControl:
    Type: AWS::Route53RecoveryControl::RoutingControl
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${PrimaryRegionName}-RoutingControl"
      ClusterArn: !GetAtt MultiRegionFailoverCluster.ClusterArn

  SecondaryRoutingControl:
    Type: AWS::Route53RecoveryControl::RoutingControl
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${SecondaryRegionName}-RoutingControl"
      ClusterArn: !GetAtt MultiRegionFailoverCluster.ClusterArn

  AtLeastOneActiveSafetyRule:
    Type: AWS::Route53RecoveryControl::SafetyRule
    Properties:
      Name: AtLeastOneActiveRule
      ControlPanelArn: !GetAtt FailoverControlPanel.ControlPanelArn
      RuleConfig:
        Type: ATLEAST
        Threshold: 1
        Inverted: false

        GatingControls:

        TargetControls:
          - !Sub "${PrimaryRegionName}-RoutingControl"
          - !Sub "${SecondaryRegionName}-RoutingControl"

    DependsOn:

  PrimaryHealthCheck:
    Type: AWS::Route53::HealthCheck
    Properties:

        RequestInterval: 30
        FailureThreshold: 3

  SecondaryHealthCheck:

        Type: HTTP

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'EMR Serverless environment for Spark workloads with auto-start/auto-stop for cost optimization, including private S3 bucket, IAM roles, and Spark application.'

Parameters:
  BucketNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: 'emr-serverless'
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9-]{0,48}[a-z0-9]$'
    Description: 'Custom prefix (Max 50 chars, lowercase alnum/hyphen only; total bucket <=63 chars with AccountId) for unique bucket name'

Resources:
  EMRServerlessBucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${BucketNamePrefix}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      ObjectLockEnabled: false
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub 'EMRServerlessBucket-${AWS::StackName}'

  EMRServerlessBucketPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::BucketPolicy'
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref EMRServerlessBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: ForceSSL
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub '${EMRServerlessBucket.Arn}'
              - !Sub '${EMRServerlessBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

  EMRServerlessExecutionRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub 'EMRServerlessExecutionRole-${AWS::StackName}'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: emr-serverless.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: EMRServerlessExecutionPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                  - logs:DescribeLogGroups
                  - logs:DescribeLogStreams
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource: !Sub '${EMRServerlessBucket.Arn}'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:DeleteObject
                Resource: !Sub '${EMRServerlessBucket.Arn}/*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub 'EMRServerlessExecutionRole-${AWS::StackName}'

  EMRServerlessWorkerRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub 'EMRServerlessWorkerRole-${AWS::StackName}'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: emr-serverless.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: EMRServerlessWorkerPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                  - logs:DescribeLogGroups
                  - logs:DescribeLogStreams
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource: !Sub '${EMRServerlessBucket.Arn}'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:DeleteObject
                Resource: !Sub '${EMRServerlessBucket.Arn}/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: 's3:GetObject*'
                Resource: 'arn:aws:s3:::aws-glue-*/*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub 'EMRServerlessWorkerRole-${AWS::StackName}'

  SparkApp:
    Type: 'AWS::EMRServerless::Application'
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub 'SparkApp-${AWS::StackName}'
      ReleaseLabel: emr-6.15.0
      Type: SPARK
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub 'SparkApp-${AWS::StackName}'

Outputs:
  EMRApplicationName:
    Description: The name of the EMR Serverless Spark application
    Value: !Ref SparkApp
  EMRApplicationArn:
    Description: The ARN of the EMR Serverless Spark application
    Value: !GetAtt SparkApp.Arn
  S3BucketName:
    Description: The name of the private S3 bucket for scripts and data
    Value: !Ref EMRServerlessBucket
  ExecutionRoleArn:
    Description: The ARN of the EMR Serverless Execution Role
    Value: !GetAtt EMRServerlessExecutionRole.Arn
  WorkerRoleArn:
    Description: The ARN of the EMR Serverless Worker Role
    Value: !GetAtt EMRServerlessWorkerRole.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Centralized SNS Topic for aggregating AWS service alerts with secure email notifications

Parameters:
  EmailAddress:
    Type: String
    Description: 'The email address to subscribe to the SNS topic for alerts.'
    Default: 'admin@example.com'
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Description: 'Environment name (e.g., Prod, Dev)'
    Default: Dev
  SubscriptionFilterPolicy:
    Type: String
    Description: 'Optional JSON filter policy for the subscription (e.g., {"alertType": ["critical"]})'
    Default: '{}'

Resources:
  CentralAlertsKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub '${Environment} SNS Central Alerts KMS Key'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowSNSToUseKMSKey
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowRootToManageKey
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: DenyKeyAdminWithoutMFA
            Effect: Deny
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action:
              - kms:Create*
              - kms:Delete*
              - kms:Put*
              - kms:Revoke*
              - kms:ScheduleKeyDeletion
              - kms:CancelKeyDeletion
              - kms:UpdateKeyDescription
              - kms:EnableKeyRotation
              - kms:DisableKeyRotation
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              BoolIfExists:
                aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: false
      RotationPeriodInDays: 365
      KeySpec: SYMMETRIC_DEFAULT
      KeyUsage: ENCRYPT_DECRYPT
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CentralAlerts

  CentralAlertsKMSAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Sub 'alias/${Environment}-sns-central-alerts-key'
      TargetKeyId: !Ref CentralAlertsKMSKey

  CentralAlertsTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub '${Environment}-CentralAlertsTopic'
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref CentralAlertsKMSKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CentralAlerts

  CentralAlertsTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref CentralAlertsTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 'sns:*'
            Resource: !Ref CentralAlertsTopic
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Sid: AllowRootFullAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'sns:*'
            Resource: !Ref CentralAlertsTopic
          - Sid: AllowCloudWatchPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: cloudwatch.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref CentralAlertsTopic
          - Sid: AllowEventBridgePublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref CentralAlertsTopic
          - Sid: AllowConfigPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: config.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref CentralAlertsTopic
          - Sid: AllowGuardDutyPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: guardduty.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref CentralAlertsTopic
          - Sid: AllowHealthPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: health.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref CentralAlertsTopic

  CentralAlertsSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      Protocol: email
      Endpoint: !Ref EmailAddress
      TopicArn: !Ref CentralAlertsTopic
      FilterPolicy: !Ref SubscriptionFilterPolicy
    DependsOn: CentralAlertsTopicPolicy

Outputs:
  CentralAlertsTopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the centralized SNS topic for aggregating alerts
    Value: !Ref CentralAlertsTopic
  CentralAlertsSubscriptionArn:
    Description: ARN of the email subscription for central alerts
    Value: !Ref CentralAlertsSubscription
  CentralAlertsKMSKeyArn:
    Description: ARN of the KMS key used to encrypt the SNS topic messages at rest
    Value: !GetAtt CentralAlertsKMSKey.Arn
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-eacc2fc3' on localstack", 'iac-god-eval-eacc2fc3: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'CentralAlertsKMSKey: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'CentralAlertsKMSKey: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'CentralAlertsKMSAlias: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'CentralAlertsKMSAlias: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'CentralAlertsTopic: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'CentralAlertsTopic: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'CentralAlertsTopicPolicy: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'CentralAlertsTopicPolicy: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'CentralAlertsSubscription: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'CentralAlertsSubscription: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-eacc2fc3: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A']

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: Secure Amazon Cognito User Pool with administrator-controlled user provisioning and email-based authentication for centralized user management.

Parameters:
  UserPoolNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: SecureUserPool
    Description: Prefix for the User Pool name to ensure uniqueness.
  CallbackUrls:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Default: "https://example.com/callback"
    Description: Callback URLs for the User Pool Client.
  LogoutUrls:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Default: "https://example.com/"
    Description: Logout URLs for the User Pool Client.
  EmailVerificationSubject:
    Type: String
    Default: "Your verification code"
    Description: Subject for email verification messages.

Resources:
  SecureUserPool:
    Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPool
    Properties:
      UserPoolName: !Sub "${UserPoolNamePrefix}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}"
      UsernameConfiguration:
        CaseSensitive: false
      UsernameAttributes:
        - email
      AutoVerifiedAttributes:
        - email
      VerificationMessageTemplate:
        EmailSubject: !Ref EmailVerificationSubject
        EmailMessage: "Your verification code is {####}"
      Policies:
        PasswordPolicy:
          MinimumLength: 8
          RequireUppercase: true
          RequireLowercase: true
          RequireNumbers: true
          RequireSymbols: true
          TemporaryPasswordValidityDays: 7
      AdminCreateUserConfig:
        AllowAdminCreateUserOnly: true
        UnusedAccountValidityDays: 7
        InviteMessageTemplate:
          EmailMessage: "Welcome! Confirm your account by clicking the link ##Verify Email##."
          EmailSubject: "Account Invitation"
      AccountRecoverySetting:
        RecoveryMechanisms:
          - Name: email
            Priority: 1
      UserPoolAddOns:
        AdvancedSecurityMode: ENFORCED
      EmailConfiguration:
        EmailSendingAccount: COGNITO_DEFAULT

  AppClient:
    Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPoolClient
    Properties:
      UserPoolId: !Ref SecureUserPool
      ClientName: AppClient
      GenerateSecret: false
      AllowedOAuthFlowsUserPoolClient: true
      AllowedOAuthFlows:
        - code
        - implicit
      AllowedOAuthScopes:
        - email
        - openid
        - phone
        - profile
      CallbackURLs: !Ref CallbackUrls
      LogoutURLs: !Ref LogoutUrls
      RefreshTokenValidity: 30
      AccessTokenValidity: 3600
      IdTokenValidity: 3600

Outputs:
  UserPoolId:
    Description: The ID of the Cognito User Pool
    Value: !Ref SecureUserPool
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-UserPoolId"
  UserPoolClientId:
    Description: The Client ID of the Cognito User Pool App Client
    Value: !Ref AppClient
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-UserPoolClientId"
  UserPoolArn:
    Description: The ARN of the Cognito User Pool
    Value: !GetAtt SecureUserPool.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-UserPoolArn"

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Basic ECS Cluster with configurable Container Insights and CloudWatch alarms for foundational container workloads.'

Parameters:
  ClusterName:
    Type: String
    Default: BasicECSCluster
  EnableContainerInsights:
    Type: String
    Default: 'Yes'
    AllowedValues:
      - 'Yes'
      - 'No'
  CpuUtilizationAlarmThreshold:
    Type: Number
    Default: 80
  MemoryUtilizationAlarmThreshold:
    Type: Number
    Default: 80

Conditions:
  EnableCI: !Equals
    - !Ref EnableContainerInsights
    - 'Yes'

Resources:
  ECSCluster:
    Type: AWS::ECS::Cluster
    Properties:
      ClusterName: !Ref ClusterName
      ClusterSettings: !If
        - EnableCI
        - - Name: containerInsights
            Value: enabled
        - []
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  ClusterHighCPUAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub '${ClusterName}-HighCPU'
      AlarmDescription: 'Alarm when ECS cluster CPU utilization exceeds the threshold'
      Namespace: AWS/ECS
      MetricName: ClusterCPUUtilization
      Dimensions:
        - Name: ClusterName
          Value: !Ref ECSCluster
      Statistic: Average
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 2
      Threshold: !Ref CpuUtilizationAlarmThreshold
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      AlarmActions: []
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching

  ClusterHighMemoryAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub '${ClusterName}-HighMemory'
      AlarmDescription: 'Alarm when ECS cluster memory utilization exceeds the threshold'
      Namespace: AWS/ECS
      MetricName: ClusterMemoryUtilization
      Dimensions:
        - Name: ClusterName
          Value: !Ref ECSCluster
      Statistic: Average
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 2
      Threshold: !Ref MemoryUtilizationAlarmThreshold
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      AlarmActions: []
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching

Outputs:
  ECSClusterArn:
    Value: !GetAtt ECSCluster.Arn
  ECSClusterName:
    Value: !Ref ClusterName
  EnableContainerInsightsStatus:
    Value: !Ref EnableContainerInsights

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Scalable and monitored Amazon EFS file system with automated backups and performance safeguards for VPC-based shared storage. Includes CloudWatch alarms and conditional AWS Backup.'

Parameters:
  EnableBackups:
    Type: String
    Default: true
    AllowedValues: [true, false]
  BackupSchedule:
    Type: String
    Default: 'cron(0 5 ? * * *)'
  VpcCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
  SubnetCidrBase:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0
  NumberOfSubnets:
    Type: Number
    Default: 2
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 3
  EfsThroughputMode:
    Type: String
    Default: bursting
    AllowedValues: [bursting, provisioned]

Conditions:
  EnableAWSBackup: !Equals [!Ref EnableBackups, true]
  Has1Subnet: true
  Has2Subnets: !Or
    - !Equals [!Ref NumberOfSubnets, 2]
    - !Equals [!Ref NumberOfSubnets, 3]
  Has3Subnets: !Equals [!Ref NumberOfSubnets, 3]

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Condition: Has1Subnet
    Properties:

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for a real-time Kinesis Data Stream with CloudWatch alarms for read/write throughput exceeding provisioned limits.'
Metadata:
  Notes: |
    This template creates:
    - Parameters for customization (StreamName, ShardCount, thresholds, SNS ARN)
    - Provisioned Kinesis Stream with 7-day retention, SSE using managed KMS key, and tags
    - CloudWatch Alarms monitoring ReadProvisionedThroughputExceeded and WriteProvisionedThroughputExceeded metrics
    - Outputs for stream and alarm ARNs/Names
Parameters:
  StreamName:
    Type: String
    Default: RealTimeDataStream
    Description: 'Name tag for the Kinesis Stream'
  ShardCount:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 1000
    Description: 'Number of shards for the provisioned Kinesis Stream'
  AlarmThroughputThreshold:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
    Description: 'Threshold for throughput exceeded count (e.g., >0 means any exceedance)'
  EvaluationPeriods:
    Type: Number
    Default: 2
    Description: 'Number of periods to evaluate for the alarm'
  SnsTopicArn:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: 'Optional ARN of SNS topic for alarm notifications'
Conditions:
  SendNotifications: !Not
    - !Equals
      - !Ref SnsTopicArn
      - ''
Resources:
  DataStream:
    Type: AWS::Kinesis::Stream
    Properties:
      RetentionPeriodHours: 168
      ShardCount: !Ref ShardCount
      StreamEncryption:
        EncryptionType: KMS
        KeyId: alias/aws/kinesis
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${StreamName}'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
  WriteThroughputExceededAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub '${StreamName}-WriteThroughputExceeded'
      AlarmDescription: !Sub 'Alerts when ${StreamName} write throughput exceeds provisioned shards'
      Namespace: AWS/Kinesis
      MetricName: WriteProvisionedThroughputExceeded
      Dimensions:
        - Name: StreamName
          Value: !Ref DataStream
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 60
      EvaluationPeriods: !Ref EvaluationPeriods
      Threshold: !Ref AlarmThroughputThreshold
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching
      AlarmActions: !If [SendNotifications, [!Ref SnsTopicArn], []]
  ReadThroughputExceededAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub '${StreamName}-ReadThroughputExceeded'
      AlarmDescription: !Sub 'Alerts when ${StreamName} read throughput exceeds provisioned shards'
      Namespace: AWS/Kinesis
      MetricName: ReadProvisionedThroughputExceeded
      Dimensions:
        - Name: StreamName
          Value: !Ref DataStream
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 60
      EvaluationPeriods: !Ref EvaluationPeriods
      Threshold: !Ref AlarmThroughputThreshold
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching
      AlarmActions: !If [SendNotifications, [!Ref SnsTopicArn], []]
Outputs:
  DataStreamArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Kinesis Data Stream'
    Value: !Ref DataStream
  DataStreamName:
    Description: 'Name of the Kinesis Data Stream'
    Value: !Ref DataStream
  WriteAlarmArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Write Throughput Exceeded alarm'
    Value: !Ref WriteThroughputExceededAlarm
  ReadAlarmArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Read Throughput Exceeded alarm'
    Value: !Ref ReadThroughputExceededAlarm
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-113b9232' on localstack", 'iac-god-eval-113b9232: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'DataStream: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'DataStream: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'ReadThroughputExceededAlarm: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'ReadThroughputExceededAlarm: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'WriteThroughputExceededAlarm: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'WriteThroughputExceededAlarm: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-113b9232: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A']

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for centralized KMS encryption key with alias'

Parameters:
  AdminRoleArn:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: 'ARN of the IAM role authorized to use the key'

Resources:
  CentralEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      KeySpec: SYMMETRIC_DEFAULT
      KeyUsage: ENCRYPT_DECRYPT
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      Description: 'Centralized KMS key for encryption management across AWS services'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-CentralEncryptionKey'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action:
              - kms:DescribeKey
              - kms:CreateGrant
              - kms:RetireGrant
              - kms:RevokeGrant
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow admin role use of the key
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Ref AdminRoleArn
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:DescribeKey
              - kms:TagResource
              - kms:UntagResource
            Resource: '*'

  CentralEncryptionAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Sub 'alias/${AWS::StackName}-central-encryption-key'
      TargetKeyId: !Ref CentralEncryptionKey

Outputs:
  KeyId:
    Description: 'Key ID of the KMS key'
    Value: !Ref CentralEncryptionKey
  KeyArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the KMS key'
    Value: !GetAtt CentralEncryptionKey.Arn
  AliasArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the KMS key alias'
    Value: !Ref CentralEncryptionAlias
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-4d27f8eb' on localstack", 'iac-god-eval-4d27f8eb: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'CentralEncryptionKey: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'CentralEncryptionKey: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'CentralEncryptionAlias: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'CentralEncryptionAlias: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-4d27f8eb: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A']
