final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates a publicly accessible Amazon Aurora MySQL cluster with two db.t3.large instances for redundancy across Availability Zones, custom parameter groups enforcing time_zone and sql_mode, VPC with public subnets, DBSubnetGroup, and security group for public access.'

Parameters:
  MasterUsername:
    Type: String
    Default: admin
    MinLength: '1'
    MaxLength: '16'
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9]*$'
    Description: 'Master username for the Aurora cluster.'
  DBClusterIdentifier:
    Type: String
    Default: aurora-mysql-cluster
    MinLength: '1'
    MaxLength: '63'
    Description: 'Identifier for the Aurora DB cluster.'
  BackupRetentionPeriod:
    Type: Number
    Default: 7
    MinValue: '1'
    MaxValue: '35'
    Description: 'Backup retention period in days.'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  IGW:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  VGWA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref IGW

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet1'
        - Key: Tier
          Value: public

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet2'
        - Key: Tier
          Value: public

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref IGW

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  DBSG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Allow inbound MySQL traffic from anywhere
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          CidrIpv6: ::/0
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIpv6: ::/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DBSecurityGroup'

  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DBSubnetGroup'
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: Subnets for Aurora DB cluster
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DBSubnetGroup'

  AuroraClusterParamGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBClusterParameterGroup
    Properties:
      DBClusterParameterGroupName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AuroraClusterParamGroup'
      Family: aurora-mysql8.0
      Description: Custom cluster parameter group for Aurora MySQL
      Parameters:
        time_zone: UTC
        sql_mode: ONLY_FULL_GROUP_BY,STRICT_TRANS_TABLES,ERROR_FOR_DIVISION_BY_ZERO,NO_ENGINE_SUBSTITUTION,NO_AUTO_CREATE_USER
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AuroraClusterParamGroup'

  AuroraDBParamGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBParameterGroup
    Properties:
      DBParameterGroupName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AuroraDBParamGroup'
      Family: aurora-mysql8.0
      Description: Custom instance parameter group for Aurora MySQL
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AuroraDBParamGroup'

  MasterUserSecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-MasterUserSecret'
      Description: 'Master user secret for Aurora MySQL cluster'
      GenerateSecretString:
        SecretStringTemplate: !Sub '{"username": "${MasterUsername}"}'
        GenerateStringKey: password
        PasswordLength: 41
        ExcludeCharacters: '"@/\\\"'
        RequireEachIncludedType: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-MasterUserSecret'

  AuroraCluster:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBCluster
    Properties:
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Ref DBClusterIdentifier
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      EngineVersion: 8.0.mysql_aurora.3.08.0
      MasterUsername: !Ref MasterUsername
      MasterUserSecret:
        SecretArn: !Ref MasterUserSecret
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      VpcSecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref DBSG
      DBClusterParameterGroupName: !Ref AuroraClusterParamGroup
      StorageEncrypted: true
      DeletionProtection: true
      BackupRetentionPeriod: !Ref BackupRetentionPeriod
      PreferredBackupWindow: '03:00-04:00'
      PreferredMaintenanceWindow: 'Sun:05:00-Sun:06:00'
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain

  DBInstanceWriter:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub '${DBClusterIdentifier}-writer'
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Ref AuroraCluster
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.large
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      PubliclyAccessible: true
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref DBSG
      DBParameterGroupName: !Ref AuroraDBParamGroup

  DBInstanceReader:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub '${DBClusterIdentifier}-reader'
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Ref AuroraCluster
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.large
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      PubliclyAccessible: true
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref DBSG
      DBParameterGroupName: !Ref AuroraDBParamGroup
    DependsOn: DBInstanceWriter

Outputs:
  AuroraClusterEndpoint:
    Description: 'Endpoint address of the Aurora cluster (writer/primary)'
    Value: !GetAtt AuroraCluster.Endpoint.Address
  AuroraReaderEndpoint:
    Description: 'Reader endpoint address of the Aurora cluster'
    Value: !GetAtt AuroraCluster.ReadEndpoint.Address
  VPCId:
    Description: 'ID of the VPC created for the Aurora cluster'
    Value: !Ref VPC
  MasterUserSecretArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Secrets Manager secret containing master user credentials'
    Value: !Ref MasterUserSecret
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-ab020382' on localstack", 'iac-god-eval-ab020382: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'AuroraClusterParamGroup: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'AuroraClusterParamGroup: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'VPC: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'VPC: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'PublicSubnet1: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'PublicSubnet1: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'PublicSubnet2: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'PublicSubnet2: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'DBSubnetGroup: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'DBSubnetGroup: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'MasterUserSecret: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'MasterUserSecret: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'DBSG: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'DBSG: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'AuroraCluster: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'AuroraCluster: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'AuroraDBParamGroup: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'AuroraDBParamGroup: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'DBInstanceWriter: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'DBInstanceWriter: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'DBInstanceReader: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'DBInstanceReader: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'IGW: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'IGW: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'PublicRouteTable: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'PublicRouteTable: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'PublicRoute: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'PublicRoute: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'VGWA: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'VGWA: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-ab020382: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A']

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates an Amazon S3 bucket that can be made accessible to an entire AWS Organization or Organizational Unit (OU), with flexibility for single-account use when no Organization ID is provided. Includes server-side encryption, versioning, public access blocks, and conditional bucket policy.'

Parameters:
  BucketNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: shared-bucket
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9\-]*[a-z0-9]$'
    Description: 'Prefix for the S3 bucket name (alphanumeric and hyphens only).'
  OrganizationId:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: 'AWS Organizations ID (e.g., o-xxxxxxxxxx) for organization-wide access, or empty string for single-account mode.'
  OrganizationalUnitId:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: 'Organizational Unit ID (e.g., ou-xxxxxxxxxx) for OU-scoped access. Requires OrganizationId to be provided.'

Conditions:
  OrgWide:
    Fn::And:
      - Fn::Not:
          - Fn::Equals:
              - !Ref OrganizationId
              - ''
      - Fn::Equals:
          - !Ref OrganizationalUnitId
          - ''
  OUAccess:
    Fn::And:
      - Fn::Not:
          - Fn::Equals:
              - !Ref OrganizationId
              - ''
      - Fn::Not:
          - Fn::Equals:
              - !Ref OrganizationalUnitId
              - ''
  SingleAccount:
    Fn::Equals:
      - !Ref OrganizationId
      - ''

Resources:
  SharedBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${BucketNamePrefix}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::StackName}"
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      ObjectLockEnabled: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref BucketNamePrefix
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Shared

  SharedBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref SharedBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt SharedBucket.Arn
              - !Sub "${SharedBucket.Arn}/*"
          - !If
            - OrgWide
            - Effect: Allow
              Principal: '*'
              Action:
                - s3:GetObject
                - s3:ListBucket
                - s3:PutObject
              Resource:
                - !GetAtt SharedBucket.Arn
                - !Sub "${SharedBucket.Arn}/*"
              Condition:
                StringEquals:
                  'aws:PrincipalOrgID': !Ref OrganizationId
            - !Ref 'AWS::NoValue'
          - !If
            - OUAccess
            - Effect: Allow
              Principal: '*'
              Action:
                - s3:GetObject
                - s3:ListBucket
                - s3:PutObject
              Resource:
                - !GetAtt SharedBucket.Arn
                - !Sub "${SharedBucket.Arn}/*"
              Condition:
                "ForAnyValue:StringLike":
                  "aws:PrincipalOrgPaths": [!Sub "o-${OrganizationId}/ou-${OrganizationalUnitId}-*/*"]
            - !Ref 'AWS::NoValue'
          - Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt SharedBucket.Arn
              - !Sub "${SharedBucket.Arn}/*"
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the created S3 bucket.'
    Value: !Ref SharedBucket
  BucketArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the created S3 bucket.'
    Value: !GetAtt SharedBucket.Arn
  AccessMode:
    Description: 'Effective access scope based on parameters provided.'
    Value: !If
      - SingleAccount
      - 'Single Account Only'
      - !If
        - OUAccess
        - 'Organizational Unit'
        - 'Organization Wide'
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-96770141' on localstack", 'iac-god-eval-96770141: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'SharedBucket: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'SharedBucket: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'SharedBucketPolicy: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'SharedBucketPolicy: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-96770141: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A']

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Creates a secure VPC, Security Group with restricted outbound HTTPS, S3 Bucket with encryption, versioning, public access blocked, HTTPS-only policy, and DynamoDB Table with deletion protection, PITR, and encryption.

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group with no inbound rules and outbound HTTPS only to VPC CIDR
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: !GetAtt VPC.CidrBlock

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-secure-bucket-${AWS::StackName}"
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled

  S3BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Principal: "*"
            Action: "s3:*"
            Resource:
              - !Sub "${S3Bucket}"
              - !Sub "${S3Bucket}/*"
            Condition:
              Bool:
                "aws:SecureTransport": false

  DynamoDBTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-table"
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: "pk"
          AttributeType: "S"
        - AttributeName: "sk"
          AttributeType: "N"
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: "pk"
          KeyType: "HASH"
        - AttributeName: "sk"
          KeyType: "RANGE"
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      DeletionProtectionEnabled: true
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
        SSEType: KMS

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for an EC2 instance with HTTP access Security Group and a secure S3 bucket'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-InternetGateway'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group allowing HTTP inbound and all outbound
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SecurityGroup'

  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t3.micro
      ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2:1}}'
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref SecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2Instance'

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-bucket-${AWS::Region}'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-S3Bucket'

  BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: ForceSSL
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

Outputs:
  EC2InstanceId:
    Description: The ID of the EC2 instance
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2InstanceId'

  EC2PublicIp:
    Description: The public IP of the EC2 instance
    Value: !GetAtt EC2Instance.PublicIp
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2PublicIp'

  S3BucketName:
    Description: The name of the S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-S3BucketName'

  SecurityGroupId:
    Description: The ID of the Security Group
    Value: !Ref SecurityGroup
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SecurityGroupId'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >-
  CloudFormation template for a secure, web-based VS Code development environment
  using code-server on Ubuntu 22.04 EC2 with CloudFront for HTTPS access and caching.
  Designed for demo use with trade-offs (open HTTP origin, disabled auth); requires
  additional hardening for production.
Parameters:
  CodeServerVersion:
    Type: String
    Default: '4.22.1'
    Description: code-server version to install (e.g., 4.22.1)
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.medium
    Description: EC2 instance type
  CloudFrontIPRanges:
    Type: String
    Default: '0.0.0.0/0'
    Description: >-
      Comma-separated CloudFront regional CIDR ranges for Security Group rules
      (e.g., '13.32.0.0/15,52.94.249.0/24'). Demo default allows all for ease;
      replace with CloudFront IPs from https://ip-ranges.amazonaws.com/ip-ranges.json
      (service=CLOUDFRONT) for security. Add more ingress rules using !Select [1, ...]
      etc. as needed.
Mappings:
  RegionMap:
    us-east-1:
      Ubuntu2204: ami-0806e2a353e5062d7
    us-east-2:
      Ubuntu2204: ami-0a0ad6b70e61be944
    us-west-2:
      Ubuntu2204: ami-0d5d9fc993b47d4fb
    us-west-1:
      Ubuntu2204: ami-0b0dcb5067d06220e
    eu-west-1:
      Ubuntu2204: ami-053b0d1ba9ce05640
Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'
  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet'
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'
  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
  CodeServerSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for code-server on port 8080 from CloudFront and ephemeral for SSM
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 8080
          ToPort: 8080
          CidrIp: !Select [0, !Split [',', !Ref CloudFrontIPRanges]]
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 1024
          ToPort: 65535
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-CodeServerSG'
  InstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Path: /
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: CFNSignal
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: cloudformation:SignalResource
                Resource: '*'
  InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref InstanceRole
  CodeServerEC2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT15M
    Properties:
      ImageId: !FindInMap [!Ref 'AWS::Region', RegionMap, Ubuntu2204]
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref CodeServerSecurityGroup
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref InstanceProfile
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-CodeServer'
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash -ex
          apt-get update -y
          apt-get upgrade -y -o Dpkg::Options::="--force-confold"
          apt-get install -y curl wget tar gzip unzip python3-pip awscli jq
          # Install Node.js 20.x
          curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_20.x | bash -
          apt-get install -y nodejs
          # Install code-server
          CODE_SERVER_VER=${CodeServerVersion}
          cd /tmp
          wget https://github.com/coder/code-server/releases/download/v$CODE_SERVER_VER/code-server-$CODE_SERVER_VER-linux-amd64.tar.gz
          tar -xzf code-server-$CODE_SERVER_VER-linux-amd64.tar.gz
          rm -rf /opt/code-server
          mv code-server-$CODE_SERVER_VER-linux-amd64 /opt/code-server
          ln -sf /opt/code-server/bin/code-server /usr/local/bin/code-server
          chown -R ubuntu:ubuntu /opt/code-server
          # Systemd service
          cat > /etc/systemd/system/code-server.service << 'EOF'
          [Unit]
          Description=code-server
          After=network-online.target
          Wants=network-online.target
          [Service]
          Type=simple
          User=ubuntu
          WorkingDirectory=/opt/code-server
          ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/code-server --bind-addr 0.0.0.0:8080 --auth none
          Restart=always
          RestartSec=5
          [Install]
          WantedBy=multi-user.target
          EOF
          systemctl daemon-reload
          systemctl enable code-server
          systemctl start code-server
          # Wait for code-server to be healthy
          for i in {1..60}; do
            if curl -f -s http://localhost:8080/ 2>/dev/null; then
              break
            fi
            sleep 10
            systemctl restart code-server
          done
          # Install cfn-bootstrap for cfn-signal
          pip3 install --upgrade --user https://s3.amazonaws.com/cloudformation-examples/aws-cfn-bootstrap-py3-latest.tar.gz
          export PATH=/root/.local/bin:$PATH
          # Signal success
          cfn-signal -e 0 --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource CodeServerEC2 --region ${AWS::Region}
  CloudFrontDistribution:
    Type: AWS::CloudFront::Distribution
    Properties:
      DistributionConfig:
        Enabled: true
        Comment: !Sub 'code-server via ${CodeServerEC2.PublicDnsName}:8080'
        DefaultRootObject: index.html
        DefaultCacheBehavior:
          TargetOriginId: !Sub '${CodeServerEC2.PublicDnsName}:8080'
          ViewerProtocolPolicy: redirect-to-https
          AllowedMethods:
            - GET
            - HEAD
            - OPTIONS
          CachedMethods:
            - GET
            - HEAD
          Compress: true
          MinTTL: 0
          DefaultTTL: 31536000
          MaxTTL: 31536000
          ForwardedValues:
            Cookies:
              Forward: none
            Headers:
              - host
            QueryString: false
        Origins:
          - Id: !Sub '${CodeServerEC2.PublicDnsName}:8080'
            DomainName: !Sub '${CodeServerEC2.PublicDnsName}:8080'
            CustomOriginConfig:
              HTTPPort: 8080
              HTTPSPort: 443
              OriginProtocolPolicy: http-only
        PriceClass: PriceClass_100
Outputs:
  CloudFrontURL:
    Description: CloudFront URL for accessing code-server (https://...)
    Value: !Sub 'https://${CloudFrontDistribution.DomainName}'
  EC2InstanceId:
    Description: EC2 Instance ID
    Value: !Ref CodeServerEC2
  PublicIp:
    Description: EC2 Public IP
    Value: !GetAtt CodeServerEC2.PublicIp
  PublicDnsName:
    Description: EC2 Public DNS Name
    Value: !GetAtt CodeServerEC2.PublicDnsName
  SSMConnectCommand:
    Description: SSM Session Manager connect command
    Value: !Sub 'aws ssm start-session --target ${CodeServerEC2}'

          Value: enabled

        - Key: Environment

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Fargate NGINX demo with SSM Exec and logging'

Resources:
  FargateTaskExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: FargateTaskExecutionRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ecs-tasks.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AmazonECSTaskExecutionRolePolicy
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: nginx-fargate-demo
        - Key: Environment
          Value: demo

  FargateTaskRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: FargateTaskRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ecs-tasks.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: SSMExecuteCommandPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssmmessages:CreateControlChannel
                  - ssmmessages:CreateDataChannel
                  - ssmmessages:OpenControlChannel
                  - ssmmessages:OpenDataChannel
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: nginx-fargate-demo
        - Key: Environment
          Value: demo

  NginxDemoLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: /ecs/nginx-demo
      RetentionInDays: 7
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: nginx-fargate-demo
        - Key: Environment
          Value: demo

  NginxDemoTaskDefinition:
    Type: AWS::ECS::TaskDefinition
    Properties:
      Family: nginx-demo
      RequiresCompatibilities:
        - FARGATE
      NetworkMode: awsvpc
      Cpu: '256'
      Memory: '512'
      RuntimePlatform:
        CpuArchitecture: X86_64
        OperatingSystemFamily: LINUX
      ExecutionRoleArn: !Ref FargateTaskExecutionRole
      TaskRoleArn: !Ref FargateTaskRole
      ContainerDefinitions:
        - Name: nginx-container
          Image: nginx:alpine
          Essential: true
          PortMappings:
            - ContainerPort: 80
              Protocol: tcp
          LogConfiguration:
            LogDriver: awslogs
            Options:
              awslogs-group: !Ref NginxDemoLogGroup
              awslogs-region: !Ref AWS::Region
              awslogs-stream-prefix: nginx-demo
              awslogs-create-group: 'true'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: nginx-fargate-demo
        - Key: Environment
          Value: demo

Outputs:
  TaskDefinitionArn:
    Description: ARN of the ECS Task Definition
    Value: !Ref NginxDemoTaskDefinition
  FargateTaskRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the Fargate Task Role
    Value: !Ref FargateTaskRole
  FargateTaskExecutionRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the Fargate Task Execution Role
    Value: !Ref FargateTaskExecutionRole
  LogGroupArn:
    Description: ARN of the CloudWatch Log Group
    Value: !GetAtt NginxDemoLogGroup.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template provisioning a Windows Server 2019 EC2 instance for CPU stress testing with SSM integration, custom SSM document, and FIS IAM role.'

Parameters:
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues:
      - t3.nano
      - t3.micro
      - t3.small
      - t3.medium
      - t3.large
    Default: t3.micro
    Description: 'EC2 instance type for stress testing'
  VpcId:
    Type: String
    AllowedPattern: '^vpc-(([0-9a-fA-F]{8})|([0-9a-fA-F]{17}))$'
    Description: 'VPC ID (required if SubnetId specified; default VPC used otherwise)'
  SubnetId:
    Type: String
    AllowedPattern: '^(subnet-[0-9a-f]{17})?$'
    Default: ''
    Description: 'Optional subnet ID; leave empty for default VPC subnet'

Conditions:
  UseCustomSubnet: !Not [!Equals [!Ref SubnetId, '']]

Resources:
  LambdaSSMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: SSMGetParameterPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssm:GetParameter
                Resource: 'arn:aws:ssm:*:*:parameter/aws/service/ami-windows-latest/Windows_Server-2019-English-Full-Base'

  AmiResolverLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaSSMRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import boto3
          def handler(event, context):
              ssm = boto3.client('ssm')
              param_name = event['ResourceProperties']['SsmParameterName']
              try:
                  response = ssm.get_parameter(Name=param_name, WithDecryption=False)
                  ami_id = response['Parameter']['Value']
                  return {
                      'RequestId': context.aws_request_id,
                      'Status': 'SUCCESS',
                      'PhysicalResourceId': ami_id,
                      'Data': {'AmiId': ami_id}
                  }
              except Exception as e:
                  raise e
      Timeout: 30

  WindowsAmiResolver:
    Type: Custom::AmiResolver
    Properties:
      ServiceToken: !GetAtt AmiResolverLambda.Arn
      SsmParameterName: '/aws/service/ami-windows-latest/Windows_Server-2019-English-Full-Base'
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Delete
    DeletionPolicy: Delete

  AmiResolverInvoke:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref AmiResolverLambda
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: cfn.amazonaws.com
      SourceArn: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:cloudformation:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:stack/${AWS::StackName}/*'

  EC2SSMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/CloudWatchAgentServerPolicy

  EC2SSMInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2SSMRole

  CPUStressTestDocument:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Document
    Properties:
      DocumentType: Command
      Name: !Join ['', [!Ref 'AWS::StackName', '-CPUStressTest']]
      Content: |
        schemaVersion: '2.2'
        description: 'Custom SSM document to run CPU stress test on Windows instance'
        parameters:
          - name: durationMinutes
            type: Integer
            default: 5
            description: '(Required) Duration of stress test in minutes'
            allowedValues:
              - 1
              - 2
              - 3
              - 4
              - 5
              - 10
              - 15
              - 30
              - 60
        mainSteps:
          - action: aws:runPowerShellScript
            name: runCpuStressTest
            inputs:
              runCommand:
                - |
                  $numThreads = (Get-WmiObject -Class Win32_Processor | Measure-Object -Property NumberOfLogicalProcessors -Sum).Sum
                  Write-Output "Detected $numThreads logical processors. Starting CPU stress test for {{ durationMinutes }} minutes."
                  $jobs = @()
                  1..$numThreads | ForEach-Object {
                    $jobs += Start-Job -ScriptBlock {
                      $counter = 0
                      while ($true) {
                        $sum = 0.0
                        for ($i = 0; $i -lt 100000; $i++) {
                          $sum += [Math]::Pow(1.0001, $i) * [Math]::Sin($i * 0.01) * [Math]::Cos($i * 0.01)
                        }
                        $counter++
                        if ($counter % 1000 -eq 0) { [GC]::Collect() }
                      }
                    }
                  }
                  Write-Output "Spawned $numThreads CPU stress jobs."
                  Start-Sleep -Seconds ({{ durationMinutes }} * 60)
                  Write-Output "Stopping jobs after duration."
                  $jobs | ForEach-Object {
                    Stop-Job -Job $_ -PassThru | Remove-Job -Force
                    Receive-Job -Job $_ -Wait -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
                  }
                  Write-Output "CPU stress test completed."

  EC2StressSG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: 'Security group for CPU stress test EC2 instance (SSM only)'
      VpcId: !If [UseCustomSubnet, !Ref VpcId, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']

  EC2StressEgress:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupEgress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref EC2StressSG
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: 443
      ToPort: 443
      CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Description: 'Outbound HTTPS for SSM service'

  StressTestInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref WindowsAmiResolver
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2SSMInstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref EC2StressSG
      SubnetId: !If [UseCustomSubnet, !Ref SubnetId, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: |
          <powershell>
          # Ensure SSM Agent is running
          $service = Get-Service -Name AmazonSSMAgent -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
          if ($service -and $service.Status -ne 'Running') {
            Start-Service -Name AmazonSSMAgent
            Write-EventLog -LogName Application -Source 'CFN' -EventId 1234 -Message 'SSM Agent started.'
          }
          </powershell>
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-StressTestInstance'

  FISRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: FaultInjectionSimulatorRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: fis.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AWSFaultInjectionSimulatorSSMFISAccess
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Join ['', [!Ref 'AWS::StackName', '-FISInlinePolicy']]
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssm:SendCommand
                Resource:
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:ssm:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:document/${CPUStressTestDocument}'
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:ssm:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:managed-instance/*'
                  - '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ec2:DescribeInstances
                  - ec2:StopInstances
                  - ec2:StartInstances
                  - ec2:RebootInstances
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:ec2:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:instance/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - fis:CreateExperimentTemplate
                  - fis:GetExperimentTemplate
                Resource: '*'

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: 'EC2 Instance ID for stress testing'
    Value: !Ref StressTestInstance
  SSMDocumentName:
    Description: 'Name of the custom SSM document for CPU stress'
    Value: !Ref CPUStressTestDocument
  FISRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the FIS role for experiment injection'
    Value: !GetAtt FISRole.Arn
  InstancePublicDnsName:
    Description: 'Public DNS name of the instance (if public)'
    Value: !GetAtt StressTestInstance.PublicDnsName
deploy_logs: None

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Deploys an environment-specific DynamoDB table for SupporterProductData with tailored configurations for PROD (provisioned with auto-scaling) and CODE (on-demand), including SSE, TTL, PITR, and tags.

Parameters:
  Stage:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues:
      - PROD
      - CODE
    Default: CODE
    ConstraintDescription: "Environment stage: PROD for production, CODE for non-production."

Conditions:
  IsProd: !Equals [!Ref Stage, 'PROD']

Resources:
  SupporterProductDataTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub 'SupporterProductData-${Stage}'
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: supporterId
          KeyType: HASH
        - AttributeName: productSku
          KeyType: RANGE
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: supporterId
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: productSku
          AttributeType: S
      BillingMode:
        Fn::If:
          - IsProd
          - PROVISIONED
          - PAY_PER_REQUEST
      ProvisionedThroughput:
        Fn::If:
          - IsProd
          - ReadCapacityUnits: 20
            WriteCapacityUnits: 5
          - !Ref 'AWS::NoValue'
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
        SSEType: KMS
      TimeToLiveSpecification:
        Enabled: true
        AttributeName: expiryDate
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Stage
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Table'
        - Key: Backup
          Value: Enabled

  WriteCapacityScalableTarget:
    Type: AWS::ApplicationAutoScaling::ScalableTarget
    Condition: IsProd
    Properties:
      ServiceNamespace: dynamodb
      ResourceId: !Sub 'table/${SupporterProductDataTable}'
      ScalableDimension: dynamodb:table:WriteCapacityUnits
      MinCapacity: 5
      MaxCapacity: 500

  WriteCapacityTargetTrackingPolicy:
    Type: AWS::ApplicationAutoScaling::ScalingPolicy
    Condition: IsProd
    Properties:
      PolicyName: WriteUtilizationTargetTracking
      PolicyType: TargetTrackingScaling
      ScalingTargetId: !Ref WriteCapacityScalableTarget
      TargetTrackingScalingPolicyConfiguration:
        PredefinedMetricSpecification:
          PredefinedMetricType: DynamoDBWriteCapacityUtilization
        TargetValue: 70.0

Outputs:
  TableName:
    Description: The name of the DynamoDB table
    Value: !Ref SupporterProductDataTable
  TableArn:
    Description: The ARN of the DynamoDB table
    Value: !GetAtt SupporterProductDataTable.Arn
  Stage:
    Description: The deployed stage
    Value: !Ref Stage
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-a65b20ae' on localstack", 'iac-god-eval-a65b20ae: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'SupporterProductDataTable: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'SupporterProductDataTable: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-a65b20ae: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A']

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates three IAM managed policies: S3AccessPolicy for read/write access to ios-apps.sagebridge.org bucket for iOS app, DynamoDBProtectionPolicy denying DeleteTable and UpdateTable, and RDSProtectionPolicy denying DeleteDBInstance and DeleteDBCluster.'

Resources:
  S3AccessPolicy:

      Description: 'Grants iOS application read/write access to ios-apps.sagebridge.org S3 bucket'

        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:

            Resource: 'arn:aws:s3:::ios-apps.sagebridge.org'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject

              - s3:DeleteObject

  DynamoDBProtectionPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy'
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: DynamoDBProtectionPolicy
      Description: 'Denies deletion and schema modification actions on DynamoDB tables'
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny

              - dynamodb:DeleteTable
              - dynamodb:UpdateTable

        Statement:

            Action:
              - rds:DeleteDBInstance
              - rds:DeleteDBCluster

    Export:

    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RDSProtectionPolicyArn'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for secure ALB access log storage S3 bucket (ALBAccessLogsBucket) compliant with AWS logging requirements: encrypted, private access enforced, bucket owner enforced, 90-day retention policy for automatic deletion of old logs, and bucket policy allowing ELB accounts and delivery.logs.amazonaws.com to write logs while restricting public access.'

Parameters:
  ELBAccountIds:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Default: '127311923021,033776960186'
    Description: 'Comma-separated ELB service account IDs for the region (override with region-specific IDs as needed).'

Resources:
  ALBAccessLogsBucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-alb-accesslogs-bucket'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: DeleteOldLogs
            Status: Enabled
            ExpirationInDays: 90
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-alb-accesslogs-bucket'
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: ALBAccessLogs

  ALBAccessLogsBucketPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::BucketPolicy'
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref ALBAccessLogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowELBLogDelivery
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Ref ELBAccountIds
            Action: s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Sub '${ALBAccessLogsBucket}/*'
          - Sid: AllowDeliveryLogsService
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action: s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Sub '${ALBAccessLogsBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}'
          - Sid: RequireSSE
            Effect: Deny
            Principal:
              '*': '*'
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Sub '${ALBAccessLogsBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                's3:x-amz-server-side-encryption': 'AES256'
          - Sid: ForceSSL
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: s3:*
            Resource: !Sub '${ALBAccessLogsBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: 'The name of the ALBAccessLogsBucket S3 bucket for configuring ALB access logging.'
    Value: !Ref ALBAccessLogsBucket
  BucketArn:
    Description: 'The ARN of the ALBAccessLogsBucket S3 bucket.'
    Value: !GetAtt ALBAccessLogsBucket.Arn
  BucketEndpoint:
    Description: 'The HTTPS endpoint URL of the ALBAccessLogsBucket S3 bucket for ALB logging configuration.'
    Value: !Sub 'https://${ALBAccessLogsBucket}.s3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-1d9b2635' on localstack", 'iac-god-eval-1d9b2635: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'ALBAccessLogsBucket: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'ALBAccessLogsBucket: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'ALBAccessLogsBucketPolicy: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'ALBAccessLogsBucketPolicy: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-1d9b2635: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A']

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Secure and cost-optimized S3 bucket for storing CloudWatch export data with configurable versioning and automated lifecycle management.

Parameters:
  BucketNameSuffix:
    Type: String
    Default: "cw-export"
  VersioningEnabled:
    Type: String
    Default: "Yes"
    AllowedValues:
      - "Yes"
      - "No"
  TransitionToIA:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
  TransitionToGlacier:
    Type: Number
    Default: 90
  ExpirationDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 365

Conditions:
  VersioningEnabled: !Equals
    - !Ref VersioningEnabled
    - "Yes"

Resources:
  CloudWatchExportBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub ${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${BucketNameSuffix}-${AWS::StackName}
      ObjectLockEnabled: false
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: !If
          - VersioningEnabled
          - Enabled
          - Suspended
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: CloudWatchExportLifecycle
            Status: Enabled
            Transitions:
              - TransitionInDays: !Ref TransitionToIA
                StorageClass: STANDARD_IA
              - TransitionInDays: !Ref TransitionToGlacier
                StorageClass: GLACIER
            ExpirationInDays: !Ref ExpirationDays
            NoncurrentVersionExpiration:
              NoncurrentDays: 30
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CloudWatchExportData
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  CloudWatchExportBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref CloudWatchExportBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyUnsecureCommunications
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub ${CloudWatchExportBucket}
              - !Sub ${CloudWatchExportBucket}/*
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Sid: AllowCloudWatchLogsExport
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: logs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:PutObjectAcl
              - s3:GetBucketAcl
            Resource:
              - !Sub ${CloudWatchExportBucket}
              - !Sub ${CloudWatchExportBucket}/*
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Ref AWS::AccountId
              ArnLike:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:*
          - Sid: AllowCloudWatchMetricsExport
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: monitoring.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:PutObjectAcl
            Resource: !Sub ${CloudWatchExportBucket}/*

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: The name of the CloudWatch Export S3 Bucket
    Value: !Ref CloudWatchExportBucket
  BucketArn:
    Description: The ARN of the CloudWatch Export S3 Bucket
    Value: !GetAtt CloudWatchExportBucket.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template to provision a publicly accessible S3 bucket for Lambda artifacts and static assets distribution, encrypted with a customer-managed KMS key featuring automatic rotation, granular IAM policies for root and service role access, and a KMS key alias.'

Parameters:
  BucketNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: lambda-artifacts
    Description: Prefix for the S3 bucket name
  ServiceRoleArn:
    Type: String
    Description: ARN of the imported service role for KMS access
  KeyAliasName:
    Type: String
    Default: alias/lambda-artifacts-key
    Description: Name of the KMS key alias

Resources:
  LambdaArtifactsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for encrypting Lambda artifacts S3 bucket
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Allow root access
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow service role usage
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Ref ServiceRoleArn
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Require MFA for sensitive operations
            Effect: Deny
            Principal:
              AWS: '*'
            Action:
              - kms:ScheduleKeyDeletion
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LambdaArtifactsKey'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  LambdaArtifactsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${BucketNamePrefix}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: false
        BlockPublicPolicy: false
        IgnorePublicAcls: false
        RestrictPublicBuckets: false
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
        - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
            SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
            KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref LambdaArtifactsKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LambdaArtifactsBucket'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  LambdaArtifactsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref LambdaArtifactsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: PublicReadGetObject
            Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:GetObject'
            Resource: !Sub '${LambdaArtifactsBucket.Arn}/*'

  LambdaArtifactsKeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Ref KeyAliasName
      TargetKeyId: !Ref LambdaArtifactsKey

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket for Lambda artifacts
    Value: !Ref LambdaArtifactsBucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BucketName'
  KeyArn:
    Description: ARN of the KMS key used for S3 encryption
    Value: !Ref LambdaArtifactsKey
  AliasArn:
    Description: ARN of the KMS key alias
    Value: !Sub 'arn:aws:kms:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${KeyAliasName}'
deploy_logs: None

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "IAM role for AWS Service Catalog to enable secure provisioning and management of S3 and Lambda resources with granular permissions for related AWS services."

Resources:
  ServiceCatalogProvisioningRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: ServiceCatalogProvisioningRole
      Path: "/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: servicecatalog.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonS3FullAccess
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AWSLambdaExecute
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: ServiceCatalogOperations
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - servicecatalog:ProvisionProduct
                  - servicecatalog:UpdateProvisionedProduct
                  - servicecatalog:DescribeProvisionedProduct
                  - servicecatalog:TerminateProvisionedProduct
                Resource: "*"
        - PolicyName: IAMManagement
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - iam:CreateRole
                  - iam:DeleteRole
                  - iam:AttachRolePolicy
                  - iam:DetachRolePolicy
                  - iam:PutRolePolicy
                  - iam:UpdateRole
                  - iam:PassRole
                  - iam:GetRole
                Resource: "*"
        - PolicyName: LambdaLifecycle
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - lambda:CreateFunction
                  - lambda:UpdateFunctionCode
                  - lambda:UpdateFunctionConfiguration
                  - lambda:DeleteFunction
                  - lambda:InvokeFunction
                  - lambda:ListFunctions
                  - lambda:GetFunction
                Resource: "*"
        - PolicyName: CloudFormationOperations
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - cloudformation:CreateStack
                  - cloudformation:UpdateStack
                  - cloudformation:DeleteStack
                  - cloudformation:DescribeStacks
                  - cloudformation:DescribeStackEvents
                  - cloudformation:CreateChangeSet
                Resource: "*"
        - PolicyName: SNSIntegration
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sns:CreateTopic
                  - sns:DeleteTopic
                  - sns:Publish
                  - sns:Subscribe
                  - sns:Unsubscribe
                  - sns:GetTopicAttributes
                Resource: "*"
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: ServiceCatalogProvisioning

    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub 'imagebuilder-logs-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:

              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: alias/aws/s3

          Value: u12345678@anu.edu.au

    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: ImageBuilderLogsBucketAccessPolicy
      Description: 'Grants Image Builder EC2 instances read/write access to the logs bucket and basic S3 listing permissions.'
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:ListBucket
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${LogsBucket}'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${LogsBucket}/*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:ListAllMyBuckets
            Resource: '*'

    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: ImageBuilderEC2InstanceBuildPolicy
      Description: 'Equivalent policy for core Image Builder EC2 instance operations, including tagging capabilities.'
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - ec2:CreateTags
              - ec2:DeleteTags
            Resource: '*'

  ImageBuilderEC2InstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: ImageBuilderEC2InstanceRole
      Path: '/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
        - !Ref ImageBuilderEC2InstanceBuildPolicy
        - !Ref ImageBuilderLogsBucketAccessPolicy

  ImageBuilderEC2InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      InstanceProfileName: ImageBuilderEC2InstanceProfile
      Roles:
        - !Ref ImageBuilderEC2InstanceRole

    Value: !Ref LogsBucket

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: VPC flow logs S3 bucket with automated lifecycle management, AES256 encryption, versioning, strict access controls, and secure bucket policy for log delivery.
Parameters:
  BucketName:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Custom bucket name. Leave empty for auto-generated name.
  VersioningStatus:
    Type: String
    Default: Enabled
    AllowedValues:
      - Enabled
      - Suspended
    Description: Versioning status for the bucket.
  TransitionToGlacierDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
    MinValue: 1
    Description: Days after which to transition objects to Glacier.
  ExpirationDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 365000
    MinValue: 1
    Description: Days after which to expire objects.
Conditions:
  CustomNameProvided:
    Fn::Not:
      - Fn::Equals:
          - Ref: BucketName
          - ''
Resources:
  FlowLogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName:
        Fn::If:
          - CustomNameProvided
          - !Ref BucketName
          - !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-vpc-flow-logs-${AWS::StackName}'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: !Ref VersioningStatus
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: FlowLogsLifecycle
            Status: Enabled
            Prefix: ''
            Transitions:
              - TransitionInDays: !Ref TransitionToGlacierDays
                StorageClass: GLACIER
            ExpirationInDays: !Ref ExpirationDays
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: VPCFlowLogs
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: NetworkTrafficMonitoring
  FlowLogsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref FlowLogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Principal:
              AWS: '*'
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Sub '${FlowLogsBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                's3:x-amz-server-side-encryption': AES256
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:PutObjectAcl
            Resource: !Sub '${FlowLogsBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                's3:x-amz-acl': bucket-owner-full-control
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': true
Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the VPC Flow Logs S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref FlowLogsBucket
  BucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the VPC Flow Logs S3 bucket
    Value: !GetAtt FlowLogsBucket.Arn
  BucketId:
    Description: ID of the VPC Flow Logs S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref FlowLogsBucket

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Tag-driven automation for Nginx setup via SSM Automation document including OS updates with reboot checks, Nginx installation, and validation.'

Mappings:
  AmazonLinux2AMI:
    us-east-1:
      AMI: ami-0c02fb55956c7d316

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: "true"
      EnableDnsSupport: "true"
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'
        - Key: Project
          Value: NginxSSM

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: NginxSSM

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: "true"
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet'
        - Key: Project
          Value: NginxSSM

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-rt'
        - Key: Project
          Value: NginxSSM

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Nginx SSM demo instance
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-nginx-sg'
        - Key: Project
          Value: NginxSSM

  EC2SSMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonEC2ReadOnlyAccess
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: SendAutomationSignal
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: ssm:SendAutomationSignal
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: NginxSSM

  SSMInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2SSMRole

  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !FindInMap [AmazonLinux2AMI, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AMI]
      InstanceType: t3.micro
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref SSMInstanceProfile
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: |
          #cloud-config
          runcmd:
            - systemctl restart amazon-ssm-agent
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: NginxSSM
        - Key: nginx
          Value: "Yes"
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-nginx-instance'

  AutomationExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ssm.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: AutomationActions
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssm:SendCommand
                  - ec2:RebootInstances
                  - ec2:DescribeInstanceStatus
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: NginxSSM

  NginxSetupDocument:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Document
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-nginx-setup-doc'
      DocumentType: Automation
      DocumentFormat: "YAML"
      Content: |
        description: Multi-step process for OS updates with reboot checks, Nginx installation, and validation.
        schemaVersion: '0.3'
        parameters:
          AutomationExecutionRole:
            type: String
            description: '(Required) The ARN of the role that allows Automation to perform the actions.'
        assumeRole: '{{AutomationExecutionRole}}'
        mainSteps:
        - name: InstallTools
          action: aws:runShellScript
          description: Install required tools
          inputs:
            runCommand:
              - sudo yum install -y yum-utils awscli
          onFailure: Abort
          next: UpdateOS
        - name: UpdateOS
          action: aws:runShellScript
          description: Update OS packages
          inputs:
            runCommand:
              - sudo yum update -y
          onFailure: Abort
          next: RebootDecision
        - name: RebootDecision
          action: aws:runShellScript
          description: Check and handle reboot if needed
          inputs:
            runCommand:
              - sudo needs-restarting -r && sudo reboot
          onFailure: Abort
          next: InstallNginx
        - name: InstallNginx
          action: aws:runShellScript
          description: Install, enable, and start Nginx
          inputs:
            runCommand:
              - sudo amazon-linux-extras install -y nginx1
              - sudo systemctl enable nginx
              - sudo systemctl start nginx
          onFailure: Abort
          next: ValidateNginx
        - name: ValidateNginx
          action: aws:runShellScript
          description: Validate Nginx web server
          inputs:
            runCommand:
              - curl -f http://localhost || exit 1
          onFailure: Abort
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: NginxSSM

  NginxAutomationAssociation:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Association
    Properties:
      DocumentName: !Ref NginxSetupDocument
      Targets:
        - Key: tag:nginx
          Values:
            - "Yes"
      Parameters:
        AutomationExecutionRole: !GetAtt AutomationExecutionRole.Arn
      ScheduleExpression: rate(1 day)
      MaxConcurrency: '1'
      MaxErrors: '1'
      AssociationName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-nginx-association'

Outputs:
  EC2InstanceId:
    Description: ID of the EC2 instance
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2InstanceId'

  EC2PublicIp:
    Description: Public IP of the EC2 instance
    Value: !GetAtt EC2Instance.PublicIp
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2PublicIp'

  NginxSetupDocumentName:
    Description: Name of the SSM Automation document
    Value: !Ref NginxSetupDocument
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NginxSetupDocumentName'

  NginxAutomationAssociationId:
    Description: ID of the SSM Association
    Value: !Ref NginxAutomationAssociation
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NginxAutomationAssociationId'

  AutomationExecutionRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the Automation execution role
    Value: !GetAtt AutomationExecutionRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AutomationExecutionRoleArn'
deploy_logs: None
