final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Serverless pipeline to collect, store, and analyze AWS Organization data for centralized governance and reporting.

Parameters:
  ManagementAccountId:
    Type: String
    Default: '123456789012'
    Description: AWS Account ID of the Organization Management account for cross-account role assumption
  AthenaDatabaseName:
    Type: String
    Default: managementcur
    Description: Name of the Athena/Glue database to catalog the organizational data
  S3BucketName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'org-governance-data'
    Description: Prefix for the unique S3 bucket name (e.g., my-org-data)
  TagsToInclude:
    Type: String
    Default: 'Environment,CostCenter'
    Description: Comma-separated list of tag keys to include in the generated reports (e.g., Environment,CostCenter)

Resources:
  OrgDataBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${S3BucketName}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}"
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: ExpireNoncurrentVersions
            Status: Enabled
            NoncurrentVersionExpirationInDays: 90
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: OrgGovernancePipeline
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  OrgDataBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref OrgDataBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyUnsecuredTransports
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Ref OrgDataBucket
              - !Sub '${OrgDataBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Sid: DenyUnencryptedObjects
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:PutObject'
            Resource: !Sub '${OrgDataBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                's3:x-amz-server-side-encryption': AES256

  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Path: /service-role/
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: OrgGovernancePipeline

  LambdaOrganizationsPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LambdaOrganizationsPolicy'
      Roles:
        - !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - organizations:DescribeOrganization
              - organizations:ListAccounts
              - organizations:ListRoots
              - organizations:ListOrganizationalUnitsForParent
              - organizations:ListTagsForResource
            Resource: '*'

  LambdaSTSAssumePolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LambdaSTSAssumePolicy'
      Roles:
        - !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - sts:AssumeRole
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${ManagementAccountId}:role/OrganizationsReaderRole'

  LambdaS3Policy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LambdaS3Policy'
      Roles:
        - !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:ListBucket
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt OrgDataBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${OrgDataBucket.Arn}/*'

  OrganizationsDataCollector:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import boto3
          import os
          from datetime import datetime
          from botocore.exceptions import ClientError

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              s3_bucket = os.environ['S3Bucket']
              management_account_id = os.environ['ManagementAccountId']
              tags_to_include = os.environ['TagsToInclude'].split(',') if os.environ.get('TagsToInclude') else []
              role_arn = f"arn:aws:iam::{management_account_id}:role/OrganizationsReaderRole"

              sts_client = boto3.client('sts')
              assumed_role = sts_client.assume_role(
                  RoleArn=role_arn,
                  RoleSessionName='OrgDataCollectorSession'
              )
              credentials = assumed_role['Credentials']
              session = boto3.Session(
                  aws_access_key_id=credentials['AccessKeyId'],
                  aws_secret_access_key=credentials['SecretAccessKey'],
                  aws_session_token=credentials['SessionToken']
              )
              org_client = session.client('organizations')

              data = {
                  'timestamp': datetime.now().isoformat(),
                  'management_account_id': management_account_id
              }

              try:
                  org_info = org_client.describe_organization()
                  data['organization'] = org_info['Organization']
              except Exception as e:
                  print(f"Error describing organization: {e}")

              data['roots'] = []
              try:
                  roots_paginator = org_client.get_paginator('list_roots')
                  for page in roots_paginator.paginate():
                      for root in page['Roots']:
                          root_data = root.copy()
                          root_data['tags'] = get_tags(org_client, root['Id'], 'ROOT', tags_to_include)
                          root_data['children'] = get_ou_hierarchy(org_client, root['Id'], tags_to_include)
                          data['roots'].append(root_data)
              except Exception as e:
                  print(f"Error fetching roots: {e}")

              data['accounts'] = []
              try:
                  accounts_paginator = org_client.get_paginator('list_accounts')
                  for page in accounts_paginator.paginate():
                      for account in page['Accounts']:
                          account_data = account.copy()
                          account_data['tags'] = get_tags(org_client, account['Id'], 'ACCOUNT', tags_to_include)
                          data['accounts'].append(account_data)
              except Exception as e:
                  print(f"Error fetching accounts: {e}")

              timestamp_str = datetime.now().strftime('%Y/%m/%d/%H-%M-%S')
              key = f"org-data/{timestamp_str}/org-data.json"
              s3_client = boto3.client('s3')
              s3_client.put_object(
                  Bucket=s3_bucket,
                  Key=key,
                  Body=json.dumps(data, indent=2, default=str),
                  ContentType='application/json'
              )
              print(f"Data written to s3://{s3_bucket}/{key}")

          def get_tags(org_client, resource_id, resource_type, tags_to_include):
              if not tags_to_include:
                  return {}
              tags = []
              try:
                  paginator = org_client.get_paginator('list_tags_for_resource')
                  for page in paginator.paginate(ResourceId=resource_id, ResourceType=resource_type):
                      tags.extend(page.get('Tags', []))
                  return {tag['Key']: tag['Value'] for tag in tags if tag['Key'] in tags_to_include}
              except Exception as e:
                  print(f"Error getting tags for {resource_id} ({resource_type}): {e}")
                  return {}

          def get_ou_hierarchy(org_client, parent_id, tags_to_include):
              ous = []
              try:
                  ou_paginator = org_client.get_paginator('list_organizational_units_for_parent')
                  for page in ou_paginator.paginate(ParentId=parent_id):
                      for ou in page['OrganizationalUnits']:
                          ou_data = ou.copy()
                          ou_data['tags'] = get_tags(org_client, ou['Id'], 'ORGANIZATIONAL_UNIT', tags_to_include)
                          ou_data['children'] = get_ou_hierarchy(org_client, ou['Id'], tags_to_include)
                          ous.append(ou_data)
              except Exception as e:
                  print(f"Error fetching OUs for parent {parent_id}: {e}")
              return ous
      Description: Collects AWS Organizations data and stores as JSON in S3
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Runtime: python3.12
      Timeout: 900
      MemorySize: 512
      Environment:
        Variables:
          S3Bucket: !Ref OrgDataBucket
          ManagementAccountId: !Ref ManagementAccountId
          TagsToInclude: !Ref TagsToInclude
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: OrgGovernancePipeline

  WeeklyOrgDataRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      Description: Weekly trigger for Organizations data collection
      ScheduleExpression: rate(7 days)
      State: ENABLED
      Targets:
        - Arn: !GetAtt OrganizationsDataCollector.Arn
          Id: OrgDataTarget
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: OrgGovernancePipeline

  LambdaInvokePermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      FunctionName: !Ref OrganizationsDataCollector
      Principal: events.amazonaws.com
      SourceArn: !GetAtt WeeklyOrgDataRule.Arn

  OrgDataDatabase:
    Type: AWS::Glue::Database
    Properties:
      CatalogId: !Ref AWS::AccountId
      DatabaseInput:
        Name: !Ref AthenaDatabaseName
        Description: Database for cataloging AWS Organizations data from S3

  GlueCrawlerRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: glue.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSGlueServiceRole
      Path: /service-role/
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: OrgGovernancePipeline

  GlueS3Policy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-GlueS3Policy'
      Roles:
        - !Ref GlueCrawlerRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:ListBucket
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt OrgDataBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${OrgDataBucket.Arn}/*'

  OrgDataCrawler:
    Type: AWS::Glue::Crawler
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-OrgDataCrawler'
      Role: !GetAtt GlueCrawlerRole.Arn
      DatabaseName: !Ref AthenaDatabaseName
      Description: Crawls S3 org-data for Athena table creation
      Targets:
        S3Targets:
          - Path: !Sub 's3://${OrgDataBucket}/org-data/'
      SchemaChangePolicy:
        UpdateBehavior: LOG
        DeleteBehavior: LOG
      RecrawlPolicy:
        RecrawlBehavior: CRAWL_NEW_FOLDERS_ONLY
      Schedule:
        ScheduleExpression: rate(1 day)
      Configuration: '{"Version":1.0,"CrawlerOutput":{"Partitions":{"AddOrUpdateBehavior":"InheritFromTable"},"Tables":{"AddOrUpdateBehavior":"MergeNewColumns"}}}'

Outputs:
  S3BucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the S3 bucket storing organizational data
    Value: !GetAtt OrgDataBucket.Arn
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda function collecting Organizations data
    Value: !GetAtt OrganizationsDataCollector.Arn
  GlueCrawlerArn:
    Description: ARN of the Glue Crawler cataloging S3 data
    Value: !Sub 'arn:aws:glue:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:crawler/${OrgDataCrawler}'
  AthenaDatabaseName:
    Description: Name of the Athena database for querying org data
    Value: !Ref AthenaDatabaseName
  EventBridgeRuleArn:
    Description: ARN of the EventBridge rule scheduling weekly collection
    Value: !GetAtt WeeklyOrgDataRule.Arn
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-2de9730b' on localstack", 'iac-god-eval-2de9730b: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'GlueCrawlerRole: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'GlueCrawlerRole: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'OrgDataBucket: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'OrgDataBucket: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'GlueS3Policy: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'GlueS3Policy: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'LambdaExecutionRole: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'LambdaExecutionRole: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'OrganizationsDataCollector: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'OrganizationsDataCollector: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'WeeklyOrgDataRule: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'WeeklyOrgDataRule: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'LambdaInvokePermission: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'LambdaInvokePermission: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'LambdaOrganizationsPolicy: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'LambdaOrganizationsPolicy: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'LambdaS3Policy: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'LambdaS3Policy: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'LambdaSTSAssumePolicy: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'LambdaSTSAssumePolicy: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'OrgDataBucketPolicy: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'OrgDataBucketPolicy: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'OrgDataCrawler: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'OrgDataCrawler: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'OrgDataDatabase: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'OrgDataDatabase: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-2de9730b: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A']

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for AWS Amplify TodoApp with production branch hosting'

Parameters:
  AppName:
    Type: String
    Default: TodoApp
    Description: 'Name of the Amplify App'
  ProductionBranchName:
    Type: String
    Default: main
    Description: 'Name of the production branch'
  Platform:
    Type: String
    Default: WEB
    AllowedValues:
      - WEB
      - WEB_DYNAMIC
      - WEB_COMPUTE
    Description: 'Amplify hosting platform'

Resources:
  TodoApp:
    Type: AWS::Amplify::App
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref AppName
      Platform: !Ref Platform
      EnableBranchAutoDeletion: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: TodoApp
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TodoApp'

  ProductionBranch:
    Type: AWS::Amplify::Branch
    DependsOn: TodoApp
    Properties:
      AppId: !Ref TodoApp
      BranchName: !Ref ProductionBranchName
      EnableAutoBuild: true
      Framework: React
      Stage: PRODUCTION
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TodoApp'

Outputs:
  AmplifyAppId:
    Description: 'ID of the Amplify App'
    Value: !Ref TodoApp
  AppDefaultDomain:
    Description: 'Default hosting domain for TodoApp'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Deploys a secure, multi-AZ VPC architecture with public and private subnets across two Availability Zones, NAT Gateways for private subnet outbound internet access, and controlled traffic flow following AWS Well-Architected Framework security best practices.

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-VPC"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: "Production"

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-IGW"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: "Production"

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value:
            !Sub
            - "${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet${AZSuffix}"
            - AZSuffix: !Select [0, ["A", "B"]]
        - Key: Environment
          Value: "Production"
        - Key: Tier
          Value: "Public"

  PublicSubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value:
            !Sub
            - "${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet${AZSuffix}"
            - AZSuffix: !Select [1, ["A", "B"]]
        - Key: Environment
          Value: "Production"
        - Key: Tier
          Value: "Public"

  PrivateSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value:
            !Sub
            - "${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet${AZSuffix}"
            - AZSuffix: !Select [0, ["A", "B"]]
        - Key: Environment
          Value: "Production"
        - Key: Tier
          Value: "Private"

  PrivateSubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.4.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value:
            !Sub
            - "${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet${AZSuffix}"
            - AZSuffix: !Select [1, ["A", "B"]]
        - Key: Environment
          Value: "Production"
        - Key: Tier
          Value: "Private"

  EIPA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value:
            !Sub
            - "${AWS::StackName}-EIP${AZSuffix}"
            - AZSuffix: !Select [0, ["A", "B"]]
        - Key: Environment
          Value: "Production"

  EIPB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value:
            !Sub
            - "${AWS::StackName}-EIP${AZSuffix}"
            - AZSuffix: !Select [1, ["A", "B"]]
        - Key: Environment
          Value: "Production"

  NATGatewayA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIPA.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetA
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value:
            !Sub
            - "${AWS::StackName}-NAT${AZSuffix}"
            - AZSuffix: !Select [0, ["A", "B"]]
        - Key: Environment
          Value: "Production"

  NATGatewayB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIPB.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetB
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value:
            !Sub
            - "${AWS::StackName}-NAT${AZSuffix}"
            - AZSuffix: !Select [1, ["A", "B"]]
        - Key: Environment
          Value: "Production"

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicRT"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: "Production"
        - Key: Tier
          Value: "Public"

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetARouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnetBRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetB

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for provisioning a VPC with Flow Logs delivered to a secure S3 bucket, enforcing SSL and minimal permissions for AWS log delivery services. Supports optional prefixes and comprehensive traffic metadata.'

Metadata:
  Overview: 'VPC with Flow Logging to hardened S3 bucket. Includes security best practices: public access block, versioning enabled, SSL enforcement, least-privilege policy.'

Parameters:
  VpcCidrBlock:
    Type: String
    Default: '10.0.0.0/16'
    Description: 'CIDR block for the VPC.'
  LogPrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: 'Optional prefix for the S3 log file path (e.g., logs/).'
    MinLength: 0

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidrBlock
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: 'FlowLogsDemo'
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: 'Demo'

  FlowLogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-flowlogs-bucket'
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: 'Demo'

  BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref FlowLogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyUnsecuredTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${FlowLogsBucket}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${FlowLogsBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Sid: AllowFlowLogDelivery
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 'delivery.logs.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - 's3:PutObject'
              - 's3:PutObjectAcl'
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${FlowLogsBucket}/${LogPrefix}AWSLogs/${AWS::AccountId}/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                's3:x-amz-acl': 'bucket-owner-full-control'
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Ref AWS::AccountId
              ArnLike:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:aws:ec2:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:vpc-flow-log/*'

  VPCFlowLog:
    Type: AWS::EC2::FlowLog
    Properties:
      LogDestination: !GetAtt FlowLogsBucket.Arn
      LogDestinationType: 's3'
      ResourceId: !Ref VPC
      ResourceType: 'VPC'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc-flowlog'
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: 'Demo'

Outputs:
  FlowLogsBucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the S3 bucket storing VPC Flow Logs. Use for downstream integration.'
    Value: !Ref FlowLogsBucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-FlowLogsBucketName'
  VpcId:
    Description: 'ID of the VPC with Flow Logs enabled.'
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VpcId'
  FlowLogId:
    Description: 'ID of the VPC Flow Log resource.'
    Value: !Ref VPCFlowLog
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-FlowLogId'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for AWS Workloads Risk Management System integrating DynamoDB for data storage, Lambda functions for risk data ingestion and querying, IAM roles with least-privilege permissions, and SNS for notifications with SSM OpsCenter integration.'

Resources:
  RiskManagementTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RiskTable-${AWS::Region}'
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: workload_id
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: question_id
          AttributeType: S
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: workload_id
          KeyType: HASH
        - AttributeName: question_id
          KeyType: RANGE
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true

  LambdaRiskManagementRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LambdaRiskManagementRole-${AWS::Region}'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'lambda:FunctionVersion': '$LATEST'
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DynamoDBAccessPolicy-${AWS::Region}'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - dynamodb:PutItem
                  - dynamodb:GetItem
                  - dynamodb:UpdateItem
                  - dynamodb:DeleteItem
                  - dynamodb:Query
                  - dynamodb:Scan
                  - dynamodb:BatchGetItem
                  - dynamodb:BatchWriteItem
                Resource: !GetAtt RiskManagementTable.Arn

  RiskNotificationsTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RiskTopic-${AWS::Region}'
      DisplayName: 'Risk Management Alerts'

  RiskNotificationsTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref RiskNotificationsTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Id: RiskNotificationsTopicPolicy
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowSSMOpCenterPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ssm.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref RiskNotificationsTopic
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}'

  RiskDataIngestionFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RiskDataIngestionFunction-${AWS::Region}'
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.handler
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import os
          def handler(event, context):
              dynamodb_table = os.environ.get('DYNAMODB_TABLE', 'not-set')
              sns_topic_arn = os.environ.get('SNS_TOPIC_ARN', 'not-set')
              print(f"RiskDataIngestionFunction: Table={dynamodb_table}, Topic={sns_topic_arn}")
              return {'statusCode': 200, 'body': json.dumps('Risk data ingestion placeholder executed successfully')}
      Timeout: 30
      MemorySize: 256
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaRiskManagementRole.Arn
      Environment:
        Variables:
          DYNAMODB_TABLE: !Ref RiskManagementTable
          SNS_TOPIC_ARN: !Ref RiskNotificationsTopic
      Description: 'Lambda function for ingesting risk data into DynamoDB for workload risk management.'

  RiskQueryFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RiskQueryFunction-${AWS::Region}'
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.handler
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import os
          def handler(event, context):
              dynamodb_table = os.environ.get('DYNAMODB_TABLE', 'not-set')
              sns_topic_arn = os.environ.get('SNS_TOPIC_ARN', 'not-set')
              print(f"RiskQueryFunction: Table={dynamodb_table}, Topic={sns_topic_arn}")
              return {'statusCode': 200, 'body': json.dumps('Risk data query placeholder executed successfully')}
      Timeout: 30
      MemorySize: 256
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaRiskManagementRole.Arn
      Environment:
        Variables:
          DYNAMODB_TABLE: !Ref RiskManagementTable
          SNS_TOPIC_ARN: !Ref RiskNotificationsTopic
      Description: 'Lambda function for querying risk data from DynamoDB for workload risk management.'

Outputs:
  DynamoDBTableName:
    Description: 'Name of the DynamoDB table for storing workload and risk data.'
    Value: !Ref RiskManagementTable
  RiskDataIngestionFunctionArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Lambda function for risk data ingestion.'
    Value: !GetAtt RiskDataIngestionFunction.Arn
  RiskQueryFunctionArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Lambda function for querying risk data.'
    Value: !GetAtt RiskQueryFunction.Arn
  RiskNotificationsTopicArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the SNS topic for risk management notifications.'
    Value: !Ref RiskNotificationsTopic
  LambdaRiskManagementRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the IAM role used by the Lambda functions.'
    Value: !GetAtt LambdaRiskManagementRole.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Lab environment for testing EC2 instance scheduling automation with Instance Scheduler, including VPC, managed instances, and admin instance.'

Parameters:
  VpcCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: '10.0.0.0/16'
    Description: 'CIDR block for VPC'
  SubnetCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: '10.0.1.0/24'
    Description: 'CIDR block for public subnet'
  LatestAmiId:
    Type: 'AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>'
    Default: '/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2'

Resources:
  InstanceSchedulerLabVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: InstanceSchedulerLabVPC
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: InstanceSchedulerLabIGW
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref InstanceSchedulerLabVPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref InstanceSchedulerLabVPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref SubnetCidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicSubnet
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref InstanceSchedulerLabVPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicRouteTable
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: '0.0.0.0/0'
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Instance Scheduler lab instances
      VpcId: !Ref InstanceSchedulerLabVPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: '0.0.0.0/0'
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: '0.0.0.0/0'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: InstanceSchedulerLabSG
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev

  SSMInstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Tags:
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev

  SSMInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref SSMInstanceRole

  AdminInstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: LambdaInvokePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - lambda:InvokeFunction
                Resource: '*'
        - PolicyName: CloudFormationDescribePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - cloudformation:DescribeStacks
                  - cloudformation:DescribeStackResources
                  - cloudformation:GetTemplate
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev

  AdminInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref AdminInstanceRole

  ManagedInstance1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
      InstanceType: t3.nano
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref SSMInstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ManagedInstance1
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SchedulingLab
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e $? --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource ManagedInstance1 || /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e 1 --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource ManagedInstance1
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT15M
    DependsOn:
      - VPCGatewayAttachment
      - PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation

  ManagedInstance2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
      InstanceType: t3.nano
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref SSMInstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ManagedInstance2
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SchedulingLab
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e $? --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource ManagedInstance2 || /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e 1 --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource ManagedInstance2
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT15M
    DependsOn:
      - VPCGatewayAttachment
      - PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation

  ManagedInstance3:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
      InstanceType: t3.nano
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref SSMInstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ManagedInstance3
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SchedulingLab
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e $? --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource ManagedInstance3 || /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e 1 --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource ManagedInstance3
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT15M
    DependsOn:
      - VPCGatewayAttachment
      - PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation

  ManagedInstance4:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
      InstanceType: t3.nano
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref SSMInstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ManagedInstance4
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SchedulingLab
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e $? --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource ManagedInstance4 || /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e 1 --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource ManagedInstance4
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT15M
    DependsOn:
      - VPCGatewayAttachment
      - PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation

  ManagedInstance5:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
      InstanceType: t3.nano
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref SSMInstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ManagedInstance5
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SchedulingLab
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e $? --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource ManagedInstance5 || /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e 1 --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource ManagedInstance5
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT15M
    DependsOn:
      - VPCGatewayAttachment
      - PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation

  AdminInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
      InstanceType: t3.micro
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref AdminInstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: InstanceSchedulerAdmin
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SchedulingLab
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash -x
          yum update -y
          curl "https://awscli.amazonaws.com/awscli-exe-linux-x86_64.zip" -o "awscliv2.zip"
          unzip awscliv2.zip
          ./aws/install
          yum install -y python3 python3-pip
          pip3 install instance-scheduler --upgrade
          aws configure set aws_access_key_id "" --profile default
          aws configure set aws_secret_access_key "" --profile default
          aws configure set default.region ${AWS::Region}
          instance-scheduler --help
          /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e $? --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource AdminInstance || /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e 1 --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource AdminInstance
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT20M
    DependsOn:
      - VPCGatewayAttachment
      - PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation
      - AdminInstanceRole

Outputs:
  VpcId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref InstanceSchedulerLabVPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VpcId'

  SubnetId:
    Description: Public Subnet ID
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SubnetId'

  AdminInstanceId:
    Description: Admin Instance ID
    Value: !Ref AdminInstance
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AdminInstanceId'

  AdminSSMStartSessionURL:
    Description: SSM Session Manager URL for Admin Instance
    Value: !Sub 'https://${AWS::Region}.ssm.${AWS::URLSuffix}/session-manager/start-session?target=${AdminInstance}'
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AdminSSMURL'

  ManagedInstanceIds:
    Description: Array of Managed Instance IDs
    Value: !Join [',', [!Ref ManagedInstance1, !Ref ManagedInstance2, !Ref ManagedInstance3, !Ref ManagedInstance4, !Ref ManagedInstance5]]
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ManagedInstanceIds'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket with event-driven notifications to an SNS topic for s3:ObjectCreated:* events, including security best practices.

Resources:
  SNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: S3ObjectCreatedTopic
      DisplayName: S3 Object Created Notifications
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  SNSTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sns:Publish
            Resource: !GetAtt SNSTopic.TopicArn
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}'
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:s3:::${AWS::StackName}-bucket-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::Partition}'
      Topics:
        - !Ref SNSTopic

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-bucket-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::Partition}'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      NotificationConfiguration:
        TopicConfigurations:
          - Topic: !Ref SNSTopic
            Event: s3:ObjectCreated:*

Outputs:
  S3BucketName:
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket
  SNSTopicArn:
    Value: !Ref SNSTopic
  SNSEndpoint:
    Value: !Sub
      - 'https://sns.${Region}.${URLSuffix}/${TopicName}'
      - Region: !Ref 'AWS::Region'
        URLSuffix: !Ref 'AWS::URLSuffix'
        TopicName: !GetAtt SNSTopic.TopicName

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'API Gateway REST API integrated with SQS for HTTP-based message retrieval'

Resources:
  Queue:
    Type: 'AWS::SQS::Queue'
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}Queue'
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds: 20

  QueuePolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy'
    Properties:
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal: 'apigateway.amazonaws.com'
            Action: 'sqs:ReceiveMessage'
            Resource:
              - '*'
            Condition:
              ArnLike:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:aws:execute-api:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${RestApi}/*/*/*'
      Queues:
        - !Ref Queue

  ApiGatewaySqsExecutionRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 'apigateway.amazonaws.com'
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
              ArnLike:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:aws:execute-api:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${RestApi}/*/*/*'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: 'sqs-receive'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: 'sqs:ReceiveMessage'
                Resource: !GetAtt Queue.Arn

  RestApi:
    Type: 'AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi'
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Api'
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - REGIONAL
      BinaryMediaTypes:
        - '*/*'

  MessagesResource:
    Type: 'AWS::ApiGateway::Resource'
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ParentId: !GetAtt RestApi.RootResourceId
      PathPart: messages

  GetMessagesMethod:
    Type: 'AWS::ApiGateway::Method'
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ResourceId: !Ref MessagesResource
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: '200'
          ResponseParameters:
            'method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin': true
            'method.response.header.Content-Type': true
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:sqs:action/ReceiveMessage'
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewaySqsExecutionRole.Arn
        PassthroughBehavior: NEVER
        RequestTemplates:
          'application/x-www-form-urlencoded': |
            Action=ReceiveMessage&QueueUrl=$util.urlEncode($input.params('QueueUrl'))#if( $input.params().querystring != "" )&$input.params().querystring#end
        Variables:
          QueueUrl: !Ref Queue
      IntegrationResponses:
        - StatusCode: '200'
          ResponseTemplates:
            'application/json': |
              #set($xmlResponse = $util.xml.parse($input.body))
              #if( $xmlResponse.ReceiveMessageResponse.ReceiveMessageResult.Messages.Message )
              #set($messages = $xmlResponse.ReceiveMessageResponse.ReceiveMessageResult.Messages.Message)
              {
                "messages": [
                  #foreach($message in $messages)
                  {
                    "messageId": "$message.MessageId",
                    "receiptHandle": "$message.ReceiptHandle",
                    "body": "$util.escapeJavaScript($util.base64Decode($message.Body))",
                    "md5OfBody": "$message.MD5OfBody"
                  }#if($foreach.hasNext),#end
                  #end
                ]
              }

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Secure admin-managed Cognito User Pool with hosted UI, OAuth support, email verification, and strong password policy.'

Parameters:
  DomainPrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: myapp
    Description: Prefix for the Cognito User Pool domain (must be unique).
  PoolName:
    Type: String
    Default: SecureUserPool
    Description: Base name for the User Pool.
  EmailVerificationSubject:
    Type: String
    Default: 'Verify your email address'
    Description: Subject line for email verification messages.

Resources:
  SecureUserPool:
    Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPool
    Properties:
      UserPoolName: !Sub '${PoolName}-${AWS::StackName}'
      UsernameAttributes:
        - email
      AutoVerifiedAttributes:
        - email
      EmailVerificationMessage: 'Your verification code is {####}.'
      EmailVerificationSubject: !Ref EmailVerificationSubject
      AdminCreateUserConfig:
        AllowAdminCreateUserOnly: true
        UnusedAccountValidityDays: 7
      Policies:
        PasswordPolicy:
          MinimumLength: 8
          RequireUppercase: true
          RequireLowercase: true
          RequireNumbers: true
          RequireSymbols: true
      Schema:
        -
          Name: email
          Mutable: false
          Required: true
          StringAttributeConstraints:
            MinLength: '1'
            MaxLength: '2048'

  SecureUserPoolDomain:
    Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPoolDomain
    Properties:
      Domain: !Sub '${DomainPrefix}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}'
      UserPoolId: !Ref SecureUserPool

  SecureAppClient:
    Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPoolClient
    Properties:
      ClientName: SecureAppClient
      UserPoolId: !Ref SecureUserPool
      ExplicitAuthFlows:
        - ALLOW_USER_PASSWORD_AUTH
        - ALLOW_REFRESH_TOKEN_AUTH
        - ALLOW_USER_SRP_AUTH
      GenerateSecret: false
      AllowedOAuthFlowsUserPoolClient: true
      AllowedOAuthFlows:
        - code
        - implicit
      AllowedOAuthScopes:
        - email
        - openid
        - phone
        - profile
        - aws.cognito.signin.user.admin
      CallbackURLs:
        - https://localhost/callback
      LogoutURLs:
        - https://localhost
      AccessTokenValidity: 1
      RefreshTokenValidity: 30
      TokenValidityUnits:
        AccessToken: hours
        RefreshToken: days

Outputs:
  UserPoolId:
    Description: Cognito User Pool ID
    Value: !Ref SecureUserPool
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-UserPoolId'

  UserPoolClientId:
    Description: Cognito User Pool App Client ID
    Value: !Ref SecureAppClient
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-UserPoolClientId'

  UserPoolDomain:
    Description: 'Cognito User Pool Domain prefix (Hosted UI endpoint: https://{UserPoolDomain}.auth.{AWS::Region}.amazoncognito.com)'
    Value: !Ref SecureUserPoolDomain
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-UserPoolDomain'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Private cross-account API Gateway with Lambda backend, VPC endpoint restrictions, custom domain, and secure IAM roles'

Parameters:
  VpcEndpointId:
    Type: String
    Description: 'VPC Endpoint ID for private access, e.g., vpce-12345678'
    Default: 'vpce-12345678'
  CustomDomainName:
    Type: String
    Description: 'Custom domain name, e.g., api.example.private'
    Default: 'api.example.private'
  AcmCertificateArn:
    Type: String
    Description: 'ARN of ACM certificate for custom domain'
    Default: 'arn:aws:acm:us-east-1:123456789012:certificate/12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012'

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      MaxSessionDuration: 3600
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: LambdaCloudWatchLogsPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: arn:aws:logs:*:*:*

  SimpleLambdaFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SimpleLambda'
      Runtime: nodejs20.x
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Handler: index.handler
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          exports.handler = async (event) => {
            return {
              statusCode: 200,
              body: JSON.stringify({
                message: 'Hello from private Lambda via API Gateway'
              })
            };
          };
      Timeout: 30
      MemorySize: 128

  ApiGatewayInvokePermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !GetAtt SimpleLambdaFunction.Arn
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: apigateway.amazonaws.com

  PrivateApiGateway:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateAPI'
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - PRIVATE
      Policy: !Sub |
        {
          "Version": "2012-10-17",
          "Statement": [
            {
              "Effect": "Allow",
              "Principal": "*",
              "Action": "execute-api:Invoke",
              "Resource": "arn:aws:execute-api:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:*/*/*",
              "Condition": {
                "StringEquals": {
                  "aws:SourceVpce": "${VpcEndpointId}"
                }
              }
            },
            {
              "Effect": "Deny",
              "Principal": "*",
              "Action": "execute-api:Invoke",
              "Resource": "arn:aws:execute-api:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:*/*/*",
              "Condition": {
                "StringNotEquals": {
                  "aws:SourceVpce": "${VpcEndpointId}"
                }
              }
            }
          ]
        }

  ApiGatewayRootMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref PrivateApiGateway
      ResourceId: !GetAtt PrivateApiGateway.RootResourceId
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      Integration:
        Type: AWS_PROXY
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:lambda:path/2015-03-31/functions/${SimpleLambdaFunction.Arn}/invocations'
    DependsOn: ApiGatewayInvokePermission

  ApiGatewayDeployment:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Deployment
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref PrivateApiGateway
      Description: Initial deployment for private API
    DependsOn: ApiGatewayRootMethod

  ApiGatewayStage:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Stage
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref PrivateApiGateway
      DeploymentId: !Ref ApiGatewayDeployment
      StageName: prod

  PrivateCustomDomain:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::DomainName
    Properties:
      DomainName: !Ref CustomDomainName
      CertificateArn: !Ref AcmCertificateArn
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - PRIVATE
    DependsOn: ApiGatewayStage

  BasePathMapping:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::BasePathMapping
    Properties:
      DomainName: !Ref PrivateCustomDomain
      Stage: prod
    DependsOn: ApiGatewayStage

Outputs:
  ApiGatewayId:
    Description: 'API Gateway ID for cross-account VPC endpoint integration'
    Value: !Ref PrivateApiGateway
  CustomDomainNameEndpoint:
    Description: 'Regional domain name endpoint for the custom domain'
    Value: !GetAtt PrivateCustomDomain.RegionalDomainName
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Lambda function'
    Value: !Ref SimpleLambdaFunction
  InvokeUrl:
    Description: 'Invoke URL for the private API via custom domain'
    Value: !Sub 'https://${CustomDomainName}/'

    Properties:

      AuthorizationType: API_KEY

      HttpMethod: POST
      InvocationRateLimitPerSecond: 100

  DataDogDLQ:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: DataDogEventBridgeIntegration
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  EventBridgeApiInvokeRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Path: /
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: DataDogDLQAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sqs:SendMessage
                  - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
                  - sqs:GetQueueUrl
                Resource: !GetAtt DataDogDLQ.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: DataDogEventBridgeIntegration
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  DataDogRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      Name: DataDogRule
      EventBusName: !Ref DataDogEventBus
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - MyDataDogApp
      Targets:
        - Id: SendToDataDog
          Arn: !GetAtt DataDogApiDestination.Arn
          DeadLetterConfig:
            Arn: !GetAtt DataDogDLQ.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: DataDogEventBridgeIntegration
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  DataDogDLQPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref DataDogDLQ
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
              - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
              - sqs:GetQueueUrl
            Resource: !GetAtt DataDogDLQ.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !Sub '${DataDogRule}/*'

Outputs:
  EventBusArn:
    Description: ARN of the DataDog EventBus
    Value: !GetAtt DataDogEventBus.Arn
  ApiDestinationArn:
    Description: ARN of the DataDog ApiDestination
    Value: !GetAtt DataDogApiDestination.Arn
  RuleArn:
    Description: ARN of the DataDog Rule
    Value: !GetAtt DataDogRule.Arn
  DLQUrl:
    Description: URL of the DataDog Dead-Letter Queue
    Value: !Ref DataDogDLQ

Description: CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket and SQS queue configured for event-driven object upload notifications.

Parameters:
  BucketName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'my-s3-bucket'
    Description: Base name for the S3 bucket
    MinLength: '3'
    MaxLength: '20'
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-z0-9]([a-z0-9-]*[a-z0-9])?$'
    ConstraintDescription: must begin and end with alphanumeric character, contain only alphanumeric characters and hyphens
  QueueNameSuffix:

    Default: ''
    Description: Suffix for the SQS queue name
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-zA-Z0-9-_]*$'
    MaxLength: '50'

  S3Bucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${BucketName}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      NotificationConfiguration:
        QueueConfigurations:
          - Event: s3:ObjectCreated:*
            Queue: !GetAtt SQSQueue.Arn

  SQSQueue:
    Type: 'AWS::SQS::Queue'
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${QueueNameSuffix}-${AWS::StackName}'
      VisibilityTimeout: 300
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600

  SQSQueuePolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy'
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref SQSQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt SQSQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnLike:
                'aws:SourceArn': !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn

Outputs:
  S3BucketName:
    Description: S3 Bucket Name for event-driven integration reference
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket
  SQSQueueUrl:
    Description: SQS Queue URL for event-driven integration reference
    Value: !Ref SQSQueue
  SQSQueueArn:
    Description: SQS Queue ARN for event-driven integration reference
    Value: !GetAtt SQSQueue.Arn

    Type: String
    Default: +1-555-0123
    Description: Phone number of the business contact for the profile
  TransformerName:
    Type: String
    Default: X12_214ToJsonTransformer
    Description: Name of the B2BI Transformer
  BucketPrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: b2bi-pipeline
    Description: Prefix for S3 bucket names
  EdiVersion:
    Type: String
    Default: 00401
    Description: EDI version for X12 (e.g., 00401)
  KmsKeyId:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Optional KMS Key ID (ARN or alias) for S3 bucket encryption. Leave empty to use SSE-S3 (AES256).

Conditions:
  UseKmsEncryption: !Not [!Equals [!Ref KmsKeyId, '']]

Resources:
  InputBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${BucketPrefix}-input-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: !If [UseKmsEncryption, aws:kms, AES256]
              KMSMasterKeyID: !If [UseKmsEncryption, !Ref KmsKeyId, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: EDI Input

  OutputBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${BucketPrefix}-output-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: !If [UseKmsEncryption, aws:kms, AES256]
              KMSMasterKeyID: !If [UseKmsEncryption, !Ref KmsKeyId, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: JSON Output

  TransformerRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${TransformerName}-Role'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: b2bi.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${TransformerName}-S3Policy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:ListBucket
                  - s3:GetBucketLocation
                Resource: !GetAtt InputBucket.Arn
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                Resource: !Sub '${InputBucket.Arn}/*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource: !GetAtt OutputBucket.Arn
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:PutObjectAcl
                Resource: !Sub '${OutputBucket.Arn}/*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId

  B2BIProfile:
    Type: AWS::B2BI::Profile
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref ProfileName
      BusinessName: !Ref BusinessContactName
      Email: !Ref BusinessContactEmail
      Phone: !Ref BusinessContactPhone
      Logging: ENABLED
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: B2BI Partner Profile

  B2BITransformer:
    Type: AWS::B2BI::Transformer
    Properties:
      Status: active
      Name: !Ref TransformerName
      EdiType:
        X12Details:
          Version: !Ref EdiVersion
      MappingTemplate: |
        {
          "shipmentId": "${B1/01}",
          "hierarchicalId": "${B1/02}",
          "shipmentStatusCode": "${L11/02}",
          "statusDate": "${L10/02}",
          "shipperName": "${lookup N1 \"02\" \"N101=SH\"}",
          "shipperAddress": "${N3/01 \"N101=SH\"}",
          "shipperCity": "${N4/01 \"N101=SH\"}",
          "shipperState": "${N4/02 \"N101=SH\"}",
          "shipperPostalCode": "${N4/03 \"N101=SH\"}"
        }
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: X12_214 to JSON Transformer

Outputs:
  InputBucketName:
    Description: Name of the input S3 bucket for raw EDI files
    Value: !Ref InputBucket
  OutputBucketName:
    Description: Name of the output S3 bucket for transformed JSON files
    Value: !Ref OutputBucket
  ProfileId:
    Description: ID of the B2BI Profile
    Value: !Ref B2BIProfile
  TransformerArn:
    Description: ARN of the B2BI Transformer
    Value: !GetAtt B2BITransformer.TransformerArn
  RoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the IAM Role for the B2BI Transformer
    Value: !GetAtt TransformerRole.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Automated monitoring for AWS Secrets Manager with email alerts via EventBridge and SNS

Parameters:
  EmailAddress:
    Type: String
    Description: Email address for Secrets Manager alerts
    Default: 'change-me@example.com'

Resources:
  SecretsManagerAlertsTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-secrets-alerts"
      DisplayName: Secrets Manager Critical Events
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sns

  SecretsManagerAlertsSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      Protocol: email
      TopicArn: !Ref SecretsManagerAlertsTopic
      Endpoint: !Ref EmailAddress
      FilterPolicy:
        apiName:
          - CreateSecret
          - DeleteSecret
          - UpdateSecret
          - StartSecretRotation
          - FinishSecretRotation

  SecretsManagerEventBridgeRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: PublishToSNSPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sns:Publish
                Resource: !Ref SecretsManagerAlertsTopic

  SecretsManagerApiCallsRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-secrets-events"
      State: ENABLED
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - aws.secretsmanager
        'detail-type':
          - AWS API Call via CloudTrail
        detail:
          apiName:
            - CreateSecret
            - DeleteSecret
            - UpdateSecret
            - StartSecretRotation
            - FinishSecretRotation
      Targets:
        - Id: SecretsManagerSNSTarget
          Arn: !Ref SecretsManagerAlertsTopic
          RoleArn: !GetAtt SecretsManagerEventBridgeRole.Arn
          InputTransformer:
            InputPathsMap:
              apiName: '$.detail.apiName'
              source: '$.source'
              userArn: '$.detail.userIdentity.arn'
              requestParameters: '$.detail.requestParameters'
              awsRegion: '$.detail.awsRegion'
              eventTime: '$.time'
            InputTemplate: |
              {
                "Subject": "Secrets Manager Alert: <apiName>",
                "Message": "Critical Secrets Manager event detected.\n\nAPI: <apiName>\nSource: <source>\nUser ARN: <userArn>\nRequest Parameters: <requestParameters>\nRegion: <awsRegion>\nTime: <eventTime>",
                "MessageAttributes": {
                  "apiName": {
                    "DataType": "String",
                    "StringValue": "<apiName>"
                  }
                }
              }

Outputs:
  SNSTopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the SNS topic for Secrets Manager alerts
    Value: !Ref SecretsManagerAlertsTopic
  EventBridgeRuleArn:
    Description: ARN of the EventBridge rule
    Value: !Ref SecretsManagerApiCallsRule
  SubscriptionArn:
    Description: ARN of the email subscription, confirm via email
    Value: !Ref SecretsManagerAlertsSubscription

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'SNS-to-SQS fanout system with filtered message routing, which enables scalable and selective message processing for different metric types (e.g., temperature, humidity). Includes central SNS topic, three SQS queues (all metrics and filtered), DLQs, policies, and subscriptions.'

Parameters:
  StackName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'MetricsFanoutStack'
    Description: Used for naming resources

Resources:
  CentralSNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub '${StackName}-MetricsTopic'
      DisplayName: !Sub '${StackName}-MetricsTopic'
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sns
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${StackName}-MetricsTopic'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: MetricsFanout

  AllMetricsDLQ:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${StackName}-AllMetricsDLQ'
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sqs
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: MetricsFanout

  TemperatureDLQ:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${StackName}-TemperatureDLQ'
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sqs
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: MetricsFanout

  HumidityDLQ:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${StackName}-HumidityDLQ'
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sqs
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: MetricsFanout

  AllMetricsQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${StackName}-AllMetricsQueue'
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sqs
      RedrivePolicy:
        deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt AllMetricsDLQ.Arn
        maxReceiveCount: 4
      ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds: 20
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: MetricsFanout

  TemperatureSqsQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${StackName}-TemperatureSqsQueue'
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sqs
      RedrivePolicy:
        deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt TemperatureDLQ.Arn
        maxReceiveCount: 4
      ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds: 20
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: MetricsFanout

  HumiditySqsQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${StackName}-HumiditySqsQueue'
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sqs
      RedrivePolicy:
        deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt HumidityDLQ.Arn
        maxReceiveCount: 4
      ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds: 20
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: MetricsFanout

  AllMetricsQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
              - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
            Resource: !GetAtt AllMetricsQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !Ref CentralSNSTopic
      Queues:
        - !Ref AllMetricsQueue

  TemperatureSqsQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
              - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
            Resource: !GetAtt TemperatureSqsQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !Ref CentralSNSTopic
      Queues:
        - !Ref TemperatureSqsQueue

  HumiditySqsQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
              - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
            Resource: !GetAtt HumiditySqsQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !Ref CentralSNSTopic
      Queues:
        - !Ref HumiditySqsQueue

  SubscriptionAllMetrics:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    DependsOn: AllMetricsQueuePolicy
    Properties:
      TopicArn: !Ref CentralSNSTopic
      Protocol: sqs
      Endpoint: !GetAtt AllMetricsQueue.Arn

  SubscriptionTemperature:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    DependsOn: TemperatureSqsQueuePolicy
    Properties:
      TopicArn: !Ref CentralSNSTopic
      Protocol: sqs
      Endpoint: !GetAtt TemperatureSqsQueue.Arn
      FilterPolicy:
        MetricType:
          - Temperature

  SubscriptionHumidity:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    DependsOn: HumiditySqsQueuePolicy
    Properties:
      TopicArn: !Ref CentralSNSTopic
      Protocol: sqs
      Endpoint: !GetAtt HumiditySqsQueue.Arn
      FilterPolicy:
        MetricType:
          - Humidity

Outputs:
  MetricsTopicArn:
    Value: !Ref CentralSNSTopic
    Description: ARN of the central Metrics SNS Topic
  AllMetricsQueueUrl:
    Value: !Ref AllMetricsQueue
    Description: URL of the All Metrics SQS Queue
  AllMetricsQueueArn:
    Value: !GetAtt AllMetricsQueue.Arn
    Description: ARN of the All Metrics SQS Queue
  TemperatureSqsQueueUrl:
    Value: !Ref TemperatureSqsQueue
    Description: URL of the Temperature SQS Queue
  TemperatureSqsQueueArn:
    Value: !GetAtt TemperatureSqsQueue.Arn
    Description: ARN of the Temperature SQS Queue
  HumiditySqsQueueUrl:
    Value: !Ref HumiditySqsQueue
    Description: URL of the Humidity SQS Queue
  HumiditySqsQueueArn:
    Value: !GetAtt HumiditySqsQueue.Arn
    Description: ARN of the Humidity SQS Queue
  SubscriptionAllMetricsArn:
    Value: !Ref SubscriptionAllMetrics
    Description: ARN of the All Metrics SNS Subscription
  SubscriptionTemperatureArn:
    Value: !Ref SubscriptionTemperature
    Description: ARN of the Temperature SNS Subscription
  SubscriptionHumidityArn:
    Value: !Ref SubscriptionHumidity
    Description: ARN of the Humidity SNS Subscription

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template that creates an event-driven integration between DynamoDB streams and EventBridge, which routes real-time database changes (inserts and updates) to a centralized event bus for downstream processing.

Resources:
  OrdersTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      TableName: OrdersTable
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: orderId
          AttributeType: S
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: orderId
          KeyType: HASH
      StreamSpecification:
        StreamViewType: NEW_AND_OLD_IMAGES
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
        SSEType: KMS
        KMSMasterKeyId: alias/aws/dynamodb
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: OrderEvents
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  CentralOrdersEventBus:
    Type: AWS::Events::EventBus
    Properties:
      Name: CentralOrdersEventBus
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: OrderEvents
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  InsertPipeRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: pipes.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: InsertPipePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - dynamodb:DescribeStream
                  - dynamodb:GetRecords
                  - dynamodb:GetShardIterator
                Resource: !GetAtt OrdersTable.StreamArn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - events:PutEvents
                Resource: !GetAtt CentralOrdersEventBus.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/events/Pipes/InsertPipe:*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: OrderEvents
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  ModifyPipeRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: pipes.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: ModifyPipePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - dynamodb:DescribeStream
                  - dynamodb:GetRecords
                  - dynamodb:GetShardIterator
                Resource: !GetAtt OrdersTable.StreamArn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - events:PutEvents
                Resource: !GetAtt CentralOrdersEventBus.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/events/Pipes/ModifyPipe:*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: OrderEvents
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  InsertPipe:
    Type: AWS::Pipes::Pipe
    Properties:
      Name: InsertPipe
      Source: !GetAtt OrdersTable.StreamArn
      RoleArn: !GetAtt InsertPipeRole.Arn
      Target: !GetAtt CentralOrdersEventBus.Arn
      Tags:
        Project: OrderEvents
        Environment: Production

  ModifyPipe:
    Type: AWS::Pipes::Pipe
    Properties:
      Name: ModifyPipe
      Source: !GetAtt OrdersTable.StreamArn
      RoleArn: !GetAtt ModifyPipeRole.Arn
      Target: !GetAtt CentralOrdersEventBus.Arn
      Tags:
        Project: OrderEvents
        Environment: Production

Outputs:
  OrdersTableArn:
    Description: ARN of the Orders DynamoDB table
    Value: !GetAtt OrdersTable.Arn
  StreamArn:
    Description: ARN of the DynamoDB Stream
    Value: !GetAtt OrdersTable.StreamArn
  EventBusArn:
    Description: ARN of the CentralOrdersEventBus
    Value: !GetAtt CentralOrdersEventBus.Arn
  InsertPipeArn:
    Description: ARN of the InsertPipe
    Value: !Ref InsertPipe
  ModifyPipeArn:
    Description: ARN of the ModifyPipe
    Value: !Ref ModifyPipe
