      AuthorizationType: API_KEY
      AuthParameters:
        ApiKeyAuthParameters:
          ApiKeyName: X-Api-Key
          ApiKeyValue: 'dummy'

  ZippopotamApiDestination:
    Type: AWS::Events::ApiDestination
    Properties:
      Name: ZippopotamApiDestination
      ConnectionArn: !GetAtt ZippopotamNoAuthConnection.Arn
      HttpMethod: GET
      InvocationEndpoint: 'https://api.zippopotam.us/us/'
      InvocationRateLimitPerSecond: 10

  PipesRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PipesRole'
      Path: /
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: pipes.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PipesPolicy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sqs:ReceiveMessage
                  - sqs:DeleteMessage
                  - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
                Resource: !GetAtt SQSQueue.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: !GetAtt EnrichedLogs.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: events:InvokeApiDestination
                Resource: !GetAtt ZippopotamApiDestination.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sqs:SendMessage
                Resource: !GetAtt TargetSQSQueue.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: EventBridgePipesEnrichment

  EnrichPipe:
    Type: AWS::Pipes::Pipe
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EnrichPipe'
      RoleArn: !GetAtt PipesRole.Arn
      Source: !GetAtt SQSQueue.Arn
      Target: !GetAtt TargetSQSQueue.Arn
      SourceParameters:
        SqsQueueParameters:
          BatchSize: 1
          MaximumBatchingWindowInSeconds: 1

Outputs:
  PipeArn:
    Description: ARN of the EventBridge Pipe
    Value: !GetAtt EnrichPipe.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PipeArn'
  SQSQueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the SQS Queue
    Value: !Ref SQSQueue
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SQSQueueUrl'
  SQSQueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the SQS Queue
    Value: !GetAtt SQSQueue.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SQSQueueArn'
  TargetSQSQueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the Target SQS Queue
    Value: !Ref TargetSQSQueue
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TargetSQSQueueUrl'
  TargetSQSQueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the Target SQS Queue
    Value: !GetAtt TargetSQSQueue.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TargetSQSQueueArn'
  LogGroupArn:
    Description: ARN of the CloudWatch Log Group
    Value: !GetAtt EnrichedLogs.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LogGroupArn'
  ApiDestinationArn:
    Description: ARN of the EventBridge API Destination
    Value: !GetAtt ZippopotamApiDestination.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ApiDestinationArn'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template that creates an EventBridge-to-Kinesis integration for real-time event streaming, which routes application-generated events from the "my-application" source to a Kinesis data stream for scalable processing or analytics.

Resources:
  EventBus:
    Type: AWS::Events::EventBus
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-EventBus"
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: EventBridgeKinesisIntegration
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  EventStream:
    Type: AWS::Kinesis::Stream
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-EventStream"
      ShardCount: 1
      RetentionPeriodHours: 24
      StreamEncryption:
        EncryptionType: KMS
        KeyId: alias/aws/kinesis
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: EventBridgeKinesisIntegration
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  EventBridgeKinesisRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-EventBridgeKinesisRole"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-KinesisPolicy"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kinesis:PutRecord
                  - kinesis:PutRecords
                  - kinesis:DescribeStream
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:kinesis:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:stream/${EventStream}"
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: EventBridgeKinesisIntegration
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  ApplicationEventsRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      EventBusName: !Ref EventBus
      State: ENABLED
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - my-application
      Targets:
        - Id: KinesisTarget
          Arn: !GetAtt EventStream.Arn
          RoleArn: !GetAtt EventBridgeKinesisRole.Arn
          KinesisParameters:
            PartitionKeyPath: "$.id"
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: EventBridgeKinesisIntegration
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

Outputs:
  EventBusArn:
    Description: ARN of the EventBridge EventBus
    Value: !GetAtt EventBus.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-EventBusArn"
  EventStreamArn:
    Description: ARN of the Kinesis Data Stream
    Value: !GetAtt EventStream.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-EventStreamArn"
  RuleArn:
    Description: ARN of the EventBridge Rule
    Value: !GetAtt ApplicationEventsRule.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-RuleArn"
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-1b9f811a' on localstack", 'iac-god-eval-1b9f811a: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'EventBus: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'EventBus: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'EventStream: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'EventStream: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'EventBridgeKinesisRole: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'EventBridgeKinesisRole: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'ApplicationEventsRule: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'ApplicationEventsRule: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-1b9f811a: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A']

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Event-driven AWS Batch job processing pipeline integrated with SQS and EventBridge Pipes for containerized tasks triggered by specific messages like OrderCreated.

Parameters:
  StackName:
    Type: String
    Default: batch-pipeline
  ContainerImageUri:
    Type: String
    Default: public.ecr.aws/aws-batch/batch-examples:latest
    Description: URI of the container image for the Batch job
  VpcCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR block for the VPC
  PublicSubnetCidrA:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24
  PublicSubnetCidrB:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.2.0/24
  PrivateSubnetCidrA:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.10.0/24
  PrivateSubnetCidrB:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.11.0/24

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${StackName}-VPC"

  IGW:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${StackName}-IGW"

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref IGW

  PublicSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnetCidrA
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${StackName}-PublicA"

  PublicSubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnetCidrB
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${StackName}-PublicB"

  PrivateSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnetCidrA
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${StackName}-PrivateA"

  PrivateSubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnetCidrB
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${StackName}-PrivateB"

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${StackName}-PublicRT"

  PublicSubnetARouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnetBRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetB
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref IGW

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${StackName}-PrivateRT"

  PrivateSubnetARouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  PrivateSubnetBRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetB
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  NATGatewayEIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${StackName}-NAT-EIP"

  NATGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NATGatewayEIP.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetA

  PrivateNatRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NATGateway

  BatchComputeSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for AWS Batch Fargate compute environment
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${StackName}-BatchComputeSG"

  OrderQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub "${StackName}-OrderQueue"
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sqs
      VisibilityTimeout: 900
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600

  BatchServiceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: batch.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSBatchServiceRole

  ECSTaskExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ecs-tasks.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AmazonECSTaskExecutionRolePolicy

  JobSubmissionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ecs-tasks.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole

  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub "${StackName}-LambdaBatchPolicy"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - batch:SubmitJob
                  - batch:DescribeJobs
                Resource:
                  - !Ref JobQueue
                  - !Ref OrderProcessorJobDef

  ECSBatchLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub "/ecs/${StackName}-OrderProcessor"
      RetentionInDays: 30

  FargateComputeEnv:
    Type: AWS::Batch::ComputeEnvironment
    Properties:
      Type: MANAGED
      State: ENABLED
      ComputeEnvironmentName: !Sub "${StackName}-FargateComputeEnv"
      ServiceRole: !GetAtt BatchServiceRole.Arn
      ComputeResources:
        Type: FARGATE
        Subnets:
          - !Ref PrivateSubnetA
          - !Ref PrivateSubnetB
        SecurityGroupIds:
          - !Ref BatchComputeSecurityGroup
        MaxvCpus: 16

  JobQueue:
    Type: AWS::Batch::JobQueue
    Properties:
      JobQueueName: !Sub "${StackName}-JobQueue"
      Priority: 1
      State: ENABLED
      ComputeEnvironmentOrder:
        - Order: 1
          ComputeEnvironment: !Ref FargateComputeEnv

  OrderProcessorJobDef:
    Type: AWS::Batch::JobDefinition
    Properties:
      JobDefinitionName: !Sub "${StackName}-OrderProcessorJobDef"
      Type: container
      PlatformCapabilities:
        - FARGATE
      ContainerProperties:
        Image: !Ref ContainerImageUri
        JobRoleArn: !GetAtt JobSubmissionRole.Arn
        ExecutionRoleArn: !GetAtt ECSTaskExecutionRole.Arn
        ResourceRequirements:
          - Type: VCPU
            Value: '1'
          - Type: MEMORY
            Value: '2048'
        LogConfiguration:
          LogDriver: awslogs
          Options:
            awslogs-group: !Sub "/ecs/${StackName}-OrderProcessor"
            awslogs-region: !Ref 'AWS::Region'
            awslogs-stream-prefix: batch
        Environment:
          - Name: MESSAGE_TYPE
            Value: OrderCreated

  OrderProcessingLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: !Sub |
          import json
          import boto3
          import os

          batch = boto3.client('batch')
          job_queue = '${JobQueue}'
          job_def = '${OrderProcessorJobDef}'

          def handler(event, context):
              for record in event['Records']:
                  body = record['body']
                  if 'OrderCreated' in body:  # Filter logic
                      batch.submit_job(
                          jobName=os.environ.get('AWS_BATCH_JOB_NAME', 'order-job'),
                          jobQueue=job_queue,
                          jobDefinition=job_def,
                          containerOverrides={
                              'environment': [
                                  {'name': 'MESSAGE_BODY', 'value': body},
                                  {'name': 'MESSAGE_TYPE', 'value': 'OrderCreated'}
                              ]
                          }
                      )
              return {'statusCode': 200}
      Timeout: 30
      Environment:
        Variables:
          AWS_BATCH_JOB_NAME: !Sub "${StackName}-order-processing-job"

  SqsLambdaEventSource:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::EventSourceMapping
    Properties:
      EventSourceArn: !GetAtt OrderQueue.Arn
      FunctionName: !Ref OrderProcessingLambda
      Enabled: true
      BatchSize: 1
      MaximumBatchingWindowInSeconds: 1
      StartingPosition: LATEST

Outputs:
  SQSQueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the SQS Order Queue
    Value: !Ref OrderQueue
  SQSQueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the SQS Order Queue
    Value: !GetAtt OrderQueue.Arn
  JobQueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the AWS Batch Job Queue
    Value: !Ref JobQueue
  ComputeEnvironmentArn:
    Description: ARN of the Fargate Compute Environment
    Value: !Ref FargateComputeEnv
  PrivateSubnetIds:
    Description: Ids of the private subnets
    Value:
      Fn::Join:
        - ','
        - - !Ref PrivateSubnetA
          - !Ref PrivateSubnetB

Resources:

          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'

  InternetGateway:

    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name

      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24

        - Key: Name

  PublicRouteTable:

    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-rt'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  InstanceSecurityGroup:

      GroupDescription: Security group for EC2 instances allowing outbound SSM traffic

      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1

  EC2Role:

    Properties:

        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonS3FullAccess
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ec2-role'

  InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2Role

  LinuxInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2:1}}'
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref InstanceProfile
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-linux'
        - Key: HelloWorld
          Value: 'true'
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment

  WindowsInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-windows-latest/Windows_Server-2019-English-Full-Base:1}}'
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref InstanceProfile
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-windows'
        - Key: HelloWorld
          Value: 'true'
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ssm-logs-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-logs-bucket'

  S3BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ssm.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
            Resource: !Sub '${S3Bucket.Arn}/*'

  HelloWorldDocument:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Document
    Properties:
      DocumentType: Command
      Name: HelloWorldScript
      DocumentFormat: YAML
      Content:
        schemaVersion: '2.2'
        description: Echo Hello World to file on Linux/Windows
        platformTypes:
          - Linux
          - Windows
        mainSteps:
          - action: aws:executeShellScript
            name: linuxEcho
            inputs:
              runCommand:
                - echo "Hello World!" > /tmp/hello.txt
          - action: aws:executePowerShellScript
            name: windowsEcho
            inputs:
              runCommand:
                - Write-Output "Hello World!" | Out-File -FilePath C:\temp\hello.txt -Encoding utf8

  HelloWorldAssociation:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Association
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref HelloWorldDocument
      Targets:
        - Key: tag:HelloWorld
          Values:
            - 'true'
      OutputLocation:
        S3Location:
          OutputS3BucketName: !Ref S3Bucket
          OutputS3KeyPrefix: logs/
      AssociationName: HelloWorldAssociation

  SchedulerRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: scheduler.scheduling.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'scheduler.scheduling.amazonaws.com/ExternalId': !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-scheduler-policy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssm:StartAssociationsOnce
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:ssm:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:association/${HelloWorldAssociation}/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssm:DescribeAssociation
                  - ssm:ListAssociations
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:DeleteObject
                Resource:
                  - !Sub '${S3Bucket.Arn}/*'

  HelloWorldSchedule:
    Type: AWS::Scheduler::Schedule
    Properties:
      Name: HelloWorldSchedule
      ScheduleExpression: cron(0/15 * * * ? *)
      FlexibleTimeWindow:
        Mode: FLEXIBLE
        MaximumWindowInMinutes: 5
      Target:
        Arn: !Sub 'arn:aws:ssm:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:.'
        RoleArn: !GetAtt SchedulerRole.Arn
        Input: !Sub '{ "AssociationId": "${HelloWorldAssociation}" }'

Outputs:
  LinuxInstanceId:
    Description: ID of the Linux EC2 instance
    Value: !Ref LinuxInstance
  WindowsInstanceId:
    Description: ID of the Windows EC2 instance
    Value: !Ref WindowsInstance
  LogBucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket for SSM execution logs
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket
  ScheduleArn:
    Description: ARN of the EventBridge Scheduler schedule for monitoring
    Value: !GetAtt HelloWorldSchedule.Arn

Description: "EventBridge integration for automating Shopify product updates via MyShopifyApp events"

Parameters:
  ShopifyShopName:
    Type: String
    Default: "testanu"
    Description: "Shopify store name for myshopify.com domain"
  ShopifyApiVersion:
    Type: String
    Default: "2023-10"
    Description: "Shopify Admin API version"
  ShopifyAdminApiKey:
    Type: String
    NoEcho: true
    Description: "Shopify Admin API access token for authentication"

Resources:
  ShopifyApiKeySecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    Properties:
      SecretString: !Ref ShopifyAdminApiKey
      Tags:
        - Key: "Purpose"
          Value: "ShopifyEventBridgeIntegration"

  ShopifyConnection:
    Type: AWS::Events::Connection
    Properties:
      AuthorizationType: "API_KEY"
      AuthConfiguration:
        ApiKeyAuth:
          ApiKeyName: "X-Shopify-Access-Token"
          SecretArn: !GetAtt ShopifyApiKeySecret.Arn

  ShopifyEventBus:
    Type: AWS::Events::EventBus
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-ShopifyEventBus"
      Tags:
        - Key: "Purpose"
          Value: "ShopifyEventBridgeIntegration"

  ShopifyProductApiDestination:
    Type: AWS::Events::ApiDestination
    Properties:
      ConnectionArn: !Ref ShopifyConnection
      HttpMethod: "POST"
      InvocationEndpoint: !Sub "https://${ShopifyShopName}.myshopify.com/admin/api/${ShopifyApiVersion}/products.json"
      InvocationRateLimitPerSecond: 10

  CaptureMyShopifyAppEventsRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      EventBusName: !Ref ShopifyEventBus
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - "MyShopifyApp"
      Targets:
        - Arn: !GetAtt ShopifyProductApiDestination.Arn
          Id: "ShopifyApiTarget"
      Tags:
        - Key: "Purpose"
          Value: "ShopifyEventBridgeIntegration"

Outputs:
  EventBusArn:
    Value: !GetAtt ShopifyEventBus.Arn
  ApiDestinationArn:
    Value: !Ref ShopifyProductApiDestination
  ConnectionArn:
    Value: !Ref ShopifyConnection

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'EventBridge integration with Stripe''s product API to automate product creation based on PartnerApp events.'
Metadata:
  Overview: 'CloudFormation template provisioning a custom EventBridge EventBus, Connection for API key auth, ApiDestination to Stripe /v1/products endpoint, and Rule to route matching PartnerApp events via POST requests.'

Parameters:
  StripeApiKey:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<String>
    Default: '/stripe/api-key'
    Description: 'SSM Parameter path containing Stripe secret API key (e.g., /myorg/stripe/sk_live_...).'
  EventBusName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'StripeProductEventBus'
    Description: 'Name of the custom EventBridge EventBus.'
  PartnerAppSource:
    Type: String
    Default: 'PartnerApp'
    Description: 'Event source to match (default: PartnerApp).'
  PartnerAppDetailType:
    Type: String
    Default: 'PartnerAppDetailType'
    Description: 'Event detail-type to match (default: PartnerAppDetailType).'

Resources:
  StripeEventBus:
    Type: AWS::Events::EventBus
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref EventBusName
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Project'
          Value: 'StripeEventBridgeIntegration'
        - Key: 'Environment'
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::Region'
        - Key: 'Stack'
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  StripeConnection:
    Type: AWS::Events::Connection
    Properties:
      AuthorizationType: 'API_KEY'
      AuthParameters:
        ApiKeyAuthParameters:
          ApiKeyName: 'Authorization'
          ApiKeyValue: !Sub 'Bearer ${StripeApiKey}'

  StripeApiDestination:
    Type: AWS::Events::ApiDestination
    Properties:
      ConnectionArn: !GetAtt StripeConnection.Arn
      InvocationEndpoint: 'https://api.stripe.com/v1/products'
      HttpMethod: 'POST'
      InvocationRateLimitPerSecond: 10

  StripeProductRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      EventBusName: !Ref StripeEventBus
      Description: 'Route PartnerApp events to Stripe product creation API.'
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - !Ref PartnerAppSource
        'detail-type':
          - !Ref PartnerAppDetailType
      State: 'ENABLED'
      Targets:
        - Id: 'StripeApiTarget'
          Arn: !GetAtt StripeApiDestination.Arn

Outputs:
  EventBusArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Stripe EventBus for PartnerApp events.'
    Value: !Ref StripeEventBus
  ConnectionArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the EventBridge Connection for Stripe API authentication.'
    Value: !GetAtt StripeConnection.Arn
  ApiDestinationArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the ApiDestination targeting Stripe products endpoint.'
    Value: !Ref StripeApiDestination
  RuleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the EventBridge Rule routing events to Stripe ApiDestination.'
    Value: !Ref StripeProductRule

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Secure REST API Gateway integrated with DynamoDB for managing music data (CRUD Create/Read by artist)

Parameters:
  ApiName:
    Type: String
    Default: MusicAPI
    Description: Name of the API Gateway REST API
  TableNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Prefix for the DynamoDB table name (combine with StackName-Region for uniqueness)

Resources:
  MusicTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub "${TableNamePrefix}${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::Region}-Music"
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: pk
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: artist
          AttributeType: S
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: pk
          KeyType: HASH
      GlobalSecondaryIndexes:
        - IndexName: Artist-Index
          KeySchema:
            - AttributeName: artist
              KeyType: HASH
          Projection:
            ProjectionType: ALL

  ApiGatewayDynamoDBRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: apigateway.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: ApiGatewayDynamoDBAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - dynamodb:PutItem
                  - dynamodb:Query
                Resource: !GetAtt MusicTable.Arn

  MusicAPI:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref ApiName
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - REGIONAL

  MusicResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MusicAPI
      ParentId: !GetAtt MusicAPI.RootResourceId
      PathPart: music

  MusicArtistResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MusicAPI
      ParentId: !Ref MusicResource
      PathPart: artist

  MusicPostMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MusicAPI
      ResourceId: !Ref MusicResource
      HttpMethod: POST
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      ApiKeyRequired: true
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: '200'
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:dynamodb:action/PutItem'
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayDynamoDBRole.Arn
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: !Sub |
            {
              "TableName": "${MusicTable}",
              "Item": {
                "pk": {"S": "$input.path('$.artist')-$input.path('$.album')"},
                "artist": {"S": "$input.path('$.artist')"},
                "album": {"S": "$input.path('$.album')"}
              }
            }
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: '200'
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: |
                $util.toJson($input.path('$.Attributes'))

  MusicArtistGetMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MusicAPI
      ResourceId: !Ref MusicArtistResource
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      ApiKeyRequired: true
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: '200'
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:dynamodb:action/Query'
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayDynamoDBRole.Arn
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: !Sub |
            {
              "TableName": "${MusicTable}",
              "IndexName": "Artist-Index",
              "KeyConditionExpression": "artist = :a",
              "ExpressionAttributeValues": {
                ":a": {"S": "$input.params('artist')"}
              }
            }
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: '200'
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: |
                $util.toJson($input.path('$.Items'))

  Deployment:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Deployment
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MusicAPI
    DependsOn:
      - MusicPostMethod
      - MusicArtistGetMethod

  MusicStage:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Stage
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MusicAPI
      DeploymentId: !Ref Deployment
      StageName: prod
      MethodSettings:
        - HttpMethod: '*'
          LoggingLevel: INFO
          MetricsEnabled: true
          DataTraceEnabled: true

  MusicAPIKey:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::ApiKey
    Properties:
      Name: MusicAPIKey
      Enabled: true

  MusicUsagePlan:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::UsagePlan
    Properties:
      UsagePlanName: MusicUsagePlan
      ApiStages:
        - ApiId: !Ref MusicAPI
          Stage: prod
      Throttle:
        BurstLimit: 200
        RateLimit: 100
      Quota:
        Limit: 10000
        Offset: 0
        Period: DAY

  MusicUsagePlanKey:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::UsagePlanKey
    Properties:
      UsagePlanId: !Ref MusicUsagePlan
      KeyId: !Ref MusicAPIKey
      KeyType: API_KEY

Outputs:
  MusicAPIEndpoint:
    Description: Invoke this URL for the music resource (e.g., POST /music, GET /music/{artist})
    Value: !Sub 'https://${MusicAPI}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/prod/music'
  MusicStageArn:
    Description: ARN of the prod stage
    Value: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}::/restapis/${MusicAPI}/stages/prod'
  MusicAPIKeyId:
    Description: ID of the API Key
    Value: !Ref MusicAPIKey
  MusicTableName:
    Description: Name of the DynamoDB table
    Value: !Ref MusicTable

            Action: sts:AssumeRole

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Basic EFS file system for testing in us-east-1a'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Test
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Test
  VGWAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet-us-east-1a'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Test
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Test
  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
  RTAssoc:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
  EfsSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: 'Security group for EFS mount targets allowing NFS from VPC CIDR'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 2049
          ToPort: 2049
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EfsSG'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Test
  FileSystem:
    Type: AWS::EFS::FileSystem
    Properties:
      PerformanceMode: generalPurpose
      ThroughputMode: bursting
      Encrypted: true
      FileSystemTags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EFS-Test'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Test
  MountTarget:
    Type: AWS::EFS::MountTarget
    Properties:
      FileSystemId: !Ref FileSystem
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref EfsSecurityGroup

Outputs:
  FileSystemId:
    Description: 'EFS File System ID for testing shared storage'
    Value: !Ref FileSystem
  MountTargetIpAddress:
    Description: 'Mount Target IP address in us-east-1a for testing connectivity'
    Value: !GetAtt MountTarget.IpAddress
  MountTargetDnsName:
    Description: 'Mount Target DNS name in us-east-1a for mounting the EFS file system'
    Value: !Sub '${FileSystem}.efs.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for an automated solution to manage AWS Security Hub controls. Deploys a Lambda function to selectively disable specified CIS Benchmarks and AWS Foundational Security Best Practices controls based on parameters.'
Parameters:
  CisStandardsArn:
    Type: String
    Default: cis-aws-foundations-benchmark/v/1.4.0
    Description: 'Standard identifier for CIS AWS Foundations Benchmark (e.g., cis-aws-foundations-benchmark/v/1.4.0)'
  FsbpStandardsArn:
    Type: String
    Default: aws-foundational-security-best-practices/v/1.0.0
    Description: 'Standard identifier for AWS Foundational Security Best Practices (e.g., aws-foundational-security-best-practices/v/1.0.0)'
  DisableCISControls:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Default: ''
    Description: 'Comma-delimited list of CIS control IDs to disable (e.g., 1.1,1.2,3.9)'
  DisableFSBPControls:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Default: ''
    Description: 'Comma-delimited list of FSBP control IDs to disable (e.g., IAM.6,EC2.8)'
  LogRetentionInDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 3653
    Description: 'Retention period in days for CloudWatch Logs'
  PermissionsBoundaryArn:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: '(Optional) ARN of IAM permissions boundary to apply to the Lambda execution role'
Conditions:
  UsePermissionsBoundary: !Not [!Equals [!Ref PermissionsBoundaryArn, '']]
Resources:
  SecurityHubControlManagerLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub '/aws/lambda/${AWS::StackName}-SecurityHubControlManagerFunction'
      RetentionInDays: !Ref LogRetentionInDays
  SecurityHubControlManagerRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Path: /
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: SecurityHubControlPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sts:GetCallerIdentity
                  - securityhub:UpdateStandardsControl
                  - securityhub:DescribeStandardsControls
                  - securityhub:DescribeStandards
                  - securityhub:ListEnabledProductsForImport
                Resource: '*'
      PermissionsBoundary: !If [UsePermissionsBoundary, !Ref PermissionsBoundaryArn, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
  SecurityHubControlManagerFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SecurityHubControlManagerFunction'
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import urllib.request
          import urllib.error
          import boto3
          import os

          def send_response(event, context, response_status, response_data, physical_resource_id):
            response_url = event['ResponseURL']
            response_body = {
              'Status': response_status,
              'Reason': f'See the details in CloudWatch Log Group: {os.environ.get("AWS_LAMBDA_LOG_GROUP_NAME", "N/A")}.',
              'PhysicalResourceId': physical_resource_id,
              'StackId': event['StackId'],
              'RequestId': event['RequestId'],
              'LogicalResourceId': event['LogicalResourceId'],
              'Data': response_data
            }
            json_body = json.dumps(response_body)
            headers = {
              'content-type': 'application/json',
              'content-length': str(len(json_body))
            }
            try:
              req = urllib.request.Request(
                url=response_url,
                data=json_body.encode('utf-8'),
                headers=headers,
                method='PUT'
              )
              with urllib.request.urlopen(req) as response:
                print(f'Response status: {response_status} sent to {response_url}')
            except Exception as e:
              print(f'Failed to send response: {str(e)}')

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
            physical_resource_id = event.get('PhysicalResourceId', 'SecurityHubControlsManager')
            try:
              request_type = event['RequestType']
              if request_type == 'Delete':
                send_response(event, context, 'SUCCESS', {}, physical_resource_id)
                return
              cis_controls = event['ResourceProperties'].get('CISControlsToDisable', [])
              fsbp_controls = event['ResourceProperties'].get('FSBPControlsToDisable', [])
              region = os.environ['AWS_REGION']
              cis_std = os.environ['CIS_STANDARDS_ARN']
              fsbp_std = os.environ['FSBP_STANDARDS_ARN']
              sts_client = boto3.client('sts')
              account_id = sts_client.get_caller_identity()['Account']
              client = boto3.client('securityhub')
              all_controls = []
              for control_id in cis_controls:
                stripped_id = control_id.strip()
                if stripped_id:
                  arn = f"arn:aws:securityhub:{region}:{account_id}:control/{cis_std}/{stripped_id}"
                  all_controls.append(arn)
              for control_id in fsbp_controls:
                stripped_id = control_id.strip()
                if stripped_id:
                  arn = f"arn:aws:securityhub:{region}:{account_id}:control/{fsbp_std}/{stripped_id}"
                  all_controls.append(arn)
              total_controls = len(all_controls)
              if total_controls == 0:
                send_response(event, context, 'SUCCESS', {'DisabledCount': 0, 'TotalControlsChecked': 0}, physical_resource_id)
                return
              needing_disable = []
              for control_arn in all_controls:
                resp = client.describe_standards_controls(StandardsControlArns=[control_arn])
                if resp['Controls'] and not resp['Controls'][0].get('Disabled', False):
                  needing_disable.append(control_arn)
              disabled_count = 0
              if needing_disable:
                for control_arn in needing_disable:
                  client.update_standards_control(
                    StandardsControlArn=control_arn,
                    Disabled=True
                  )
                disabled_count = len(needing_disable)
              response_data = {
                'DisabledCount': disabled_count,
                'TotalControlsChecked': total_controls
              }
              send_response(event, context, 'SUCCESS', response_data, physical_resource_id)
            except Exception as e:
              print(f'Error processing request: {str(e)}')
              send_response(event, context, 'FAILED', {'Error': str(e)}, physical_resource_id)
      Handler: lambda_function.lambda_handler
      Role: !GetAtt SecurityHubControlManagerRole.Arn
      Runtime: python3.12
      Timeout: 300
      MemorySize: 256
      Environment:
        Variables:
          CIS_STANDARDS_ARN: !Ref CisStandardsArn
          FSBP_STANDARDS_ARN: !Ref FsbpStandardsArn
  SecurityHubControlsManager:
    Type: AWS::CloudFormation::CustomResource
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      ServiceToken: !GetAtt SecurityHubControlManagerFunction.Arn
      CISControlsToDisable: !Ref DisableCISControls
      FSBPControlsToDisable: !Ref DisableFSBPControls
Outputs:
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Lambda function for Security Hub controls management'
    Value: !GetAtt SecurityHubControlManagerFunction.Arn
  IAMRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the IAM role used by the Lambda function'
    Value: !Ref SecurityHubControlManagerRole
  LogGroupName:
    Description: 'Name of the CloudWatch Logs group for the Lambda function'
    Value: !Ref SecurityHubControlManagerLogGroup
  DisabledControlsCount:
    Description: 'Number of controls that were disabled during deployment'
    Value: !GetAtt SecurityHubControlsManager.DisabledCount
  TotalControlsChecked:
    Description: 'Total number of controls checked for disabling'
    Value: !GetAtt SecurityHubControlsManager.TotalControlsChecked

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Centralized SNS Alerting System with Fallback

Parameters:
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Default: Production
    Description: Environment tag value
  CommaDelimitedEmailList:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Comma-separated list of email addresses for subscriptions (e.g., email1@example.com,email2@example.com)
  CommaDelimitedHttpsEndpoints:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Comma-separated list of HTTPS endpoints for subscriptions (e.g., https://example.com/webhook1,https://example.com/webhook2)
  FallbackEmail:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Fallback email address for redundancy notifications
  AlarmThreshold:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
    MinValue: 0
    Description: Threshold for NumberOfNotificationsFailed metric (Sum over 5min)
  KMSKeyArn:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Optional KMS Key ARN for server-side encryption (leave empty to disable)

Conditions:
  UseKMS: !Not [!Equals [!Ref KMSKeyArn, '']]
  FallbackSubscriptionEnabled: !Not [!Equals [!Ref FallbackEmail, '']]

Resources:
  CentralAlertingTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-CentralAlertingTopic'
      DisplayName: Centralized AWS Alerts
      KmsMasterKeyId: !If [UseKMS, !Ref KMSKeyArn, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CentralizedAlerting
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  FallbackAlertingTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-FallbackAlertingTopic'
      DisplayName: Fallback Alerts
      KmsMasterKeyId: !If [UseKMS, !Ref KMSKeyArn, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CentralizedAlerting
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  FallbackSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Condition: FallbackSubscriptionEnabled
    Properties:
      TopicArn: !Ref FallbackAlertingTopic
      Protocol: email
      Endpoint: !Ref FallbackEmail
      FilterPolicy: {}

  CentralTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref CentralAlertingTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Id: CentralAlertingPolicy
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal:
              AWS: '*'
            Action: 'sns:*'
            Resource: !Ref CentralAlertingTopic
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Sid: AllowCloudWatchAlarms
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: cloudwatch.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref CentralAlertingTopic
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
              ArnLike:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:cloudwatch:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:alarm:*'
          - Sid: AllowRDSEvents
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: monitoring.rds.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref CentralAlertingTopic
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
          - Sid: AllowS3Events
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref CentralAlertingTopic
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
          - Sid: AllowBudgets
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: budgets.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref CentralAlertingTopic
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'

  LambdaRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: SNSSubscribePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sns:Subscribe
                Resource: !Ref CentralAlertingTopic

  SubscriptionsLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import boto3
          import urllib.request
          import cfnresponse
          import traceback

          def handler(event, context):
            try:
              request_type = event['RequestType']
              props = event['ResourceProperties']
              topic_arn = props['TopicArn']
              emails_str = props.get('Emails', '')
              https_str = props.get('HttpsEndpoints', '')
              sns = boto3.client('sns')

              if request_type == 'Delete':
                cfnresponse.send(event, context, cfnresponse.SUCCESS, {})
                return

              emails = [e.strip() for e in emails_str.split(',') if e.strip()]
              https_endpoints = [u.strip() for u in https_str.split(',') if u.strip()]

              # Email subscriptions
              for email in emails:
                sns.subscribe(
                  TopicArn=topic_arn,
                  Protocol='email',
                  Endpoint=email
                )

              # HTTPS subscriptions with retry policy
              delivery_policy = {
                'http': {
                  'defaultHealthyRetryPolicy': {
                    'minDelayTarget': 250,
                    'maxDelayTarget': 30000,
                    'numRetries': 100000,
                    'numMaxDelayRetries': 3,
                    'numNoDelayRetries': 0,
                    'numMinDelayRetries': 0
                  }
                }
              }
              attributes = {
                'RawMessageDelivery': 'true',
                'DeliveryPolicy': json.dumps(delivery_policy)
              }
              for endpoint in https_endpoints:
                sns.subscribe(
                  TopicArn=topic_arn,
                  Protocol='https',
                  Endpoint=endpoint,
                  Attributes=attributes
                )

              response_data = {'SubscriptionsCreated': len(emails) + len(https_endpoints) > 0}
              cfnresponse.send(event, context, cfnresponse.SUCCESS, response_data)
            except Exception as e:
              print(traceback.format_exc())
              cfnresponse.send(event, context, cfnresponse.FAILED, {'Error': str(e)})
      Runtime: python3.12
      Timeout: 60
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CentralizedAlerting
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  SubscriptionsCustomResource:
    Type: AWS::CloudFormation::CustomResource
    Properties:
      ServiceToken: !GetAtt SubscriptionsLambda.Arn
      TopicArn: !Ref CentralAlertingTopic
      Emails: !Ref CommaDelimitedEmailList
      HttpsEndpoints: !Ref CommaDelimitedHttpsEndpoints

  SnsFailedNotificationsAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SnsFailedNotificationsAlarm'
      AlarmDescription: Triggers when notifications to CentralAlertingTopic fail (fallback redundancy)
      Namespace: AWS/SNS
      MetricName: NumberOfNotificationsFailed
      Dimensions:
        - Name: TopicName
          Value: !GetAtt CentralAlertingTopic.TopicName
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: !Ref AlarmThreshold
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref FallbackAlertingTopic
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CentralizedAlerting
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

Outputs:
  CentralTopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the primary centralized alerting SNS topic
    Value: !Ref CentralAlertingTopic
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-CentralTopicArn'
  FallbackTopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the fallback SNS topic for failed notifications
    Value: !Ref FallbackAlertingTopic
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-FallbackTopicArn'
  AlarmArn:
    Description: ARN of the CloudWatch Alarm monitoring SNS failed notifications
    Value: !Ref SnsFailedNotificationsAlarm
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AlarmArn'
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-e58d9dde' on localstack", 'iac-god-eval-e58d9dde: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'CentralAlertingTopic: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'CentralAlertingTopic: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'CentralTopicPolicy: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'CentralTopicPolicy: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'FallbackAlertingTopic: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'FallbackAlertingTopic: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'LambdaRole: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'LambdaRole: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'SnsFailedNotificationsAlarm: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'SnsFailedNotificationsAlarm: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'SubscriptionsLambda: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'SubscriptionsLambda: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'SubscriptionsCustomResource: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'SubscriptionsCustomResource: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-e58d9dde: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A']

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'AWS Batch environment for scalable containerized data processing tasks with S3 integration, including VPC, compute environment, job queue, and job definition.'

Parameters:
  BucketName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'test-batch-bucket'
    MinLength: 3
    MaxLength: 63
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-z0-9]([a-z0-9-]*[a-z0-9])?$'
    ConstraintDescription: 'Must be a valid, unique S3 bucket name (3-63 chars, lowercase letters, numbers, periods, hyphens; no IP; not starting/ending with hyphen/period).'
  ContainerImage:
    Type: String
    Default: 'amazonlinux:2'
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: 'm5.large'
  VpcCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: '10.0.0.0/16'
  SubnetCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: '10.0.1.0/24'
  MinVCpus:
    Type: Number
    Default: 0
  MaxVCpus:
    Type: Number
    Default: 16
  DesiredVCpus:
    Type: Number
    Default: 2

Mappings:
  RegionMap:
    us-east-1:
      ECSOptimizedAMI: 'ami-0c02fb55956c7d316'
    us-east-2:
      ECSOptimizedAMI: 'ami-0d0290b849ed2c5a5'
    us-west-2:
      ECSOptimizedAMI: 'ami-0d1cd67c26f5fca19'
    eu-west-1:
      ECSOptimizedAMI: 'ami-0eb69d1ebb9f0b4a9'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-igw'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: !Ref SubnetCidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-rt'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: '0.0.0.0/0'
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  BatchSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: 'Security group for AWS Batch EC2 instances'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: '-1'
          CidrIp: '0.0.0.0/0'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-batch-sg'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Ref BucketName
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-batch-bucket'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  BatchServiceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub 'BatchServiceRole-${AWS::StackName}'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: batch.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSBatchServiceRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-batch-service-role'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  EC2InstanceRoleForBatch:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub 'EC2InstanceRoleForBatch-${AWS::StackName}'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AmazonEC2ContainerServiceforEC2Role
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ec2-instance-role'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  JobExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub 'JobExecutionRole-${AWS::StackName}'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ecs-tasks.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-s3-access'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${BucketName}'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject*
                  - s3:PutObject*
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${BucketName}/*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-job-execution-role'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  ComputeEnvironment:
    Type: AWS::Batch::ComputeEnvironment
    DependsOn:
      - BatchServiceRole
      - EC2InstanceRoleForBatch
    Properties:
      Type: MANAGED
      ServiceRole: !GetAtt BatchServiceRole.Arn
      ComputeResources:
        Type: EC2
        Ec2Configuration:
          - ImageIdOverride: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', ECSOptimizedAMI]
            ImageType: ECS_OPTIMIZED_AMAZON_LINUX_2
        InstanceRole: !GetAtt EC2InstanceRoleForBatch.Arn
        InstanceTypes:
          - !Ref InstanceType
        MinvCpus: !Ref MinVCpus
        MaxvCpus: !Ref MaxVCpus
        DesiredvCpus: !Ref DesiredVCpus
        SecurityGroupIds:
          - !Ref BatchSecurityGroup
        Subnets:
          - !Ref PublicSubnet

  JobQueue:
    Type: AWS::Batch::JobQueue
    Properties:
      Priority: 1
      ComputeEnvironmentOrder:
        - Order: 1
          ComputeEnvironment: !Ref ComputeEnvironment

  JobDefinition:
    Type: AWS::Batch::JobDefinition
    DependsOn: JobQueue
    Properties:
      Type: container
      ContainerProperties:
        Image: !Ref ContainerImage
        Vcpus: 2
        Memory: 3584
        JobRoleArn: !GetAtt JobExecutionRole.Arn
        Environment:
          - Name: INPUT_BUCKET
            Value: !Ref BucketName
        Command:
          - /bin/sh
          - -c
          - |
              yum update -y &&
              yum install -y aws-cli &&
              aws s3 cp s3/$INPUT_BUCKET/input.txt /tmp/output.txt &&
              aws s3 cp /tmp/output.txt s3/$INPUT_BUCKET/output.txt

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the S3 bucket for input/output data'
    Value: !Ref Bucket
  ComputeEnvironmentArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the AWS Batch Compute Environment'
    Value: !Ref ComputeEnvironment
  JobQueueArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the AWS Batch Job Queue'
    Value: !Ref JobQueue
  JobDefinitionArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the AWS Batch Job Definition'
    Value: !Ref JobDefinition
deploy_logs: None
latest_error_cfn-lint: None

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for a self-contained web server environment provisioning VPC, public subnet, Internet Gateway, Route Table, Security Group, IAM Role, and EC2 t2.micro instance with Amazon Linux 2, Apache, PHP, S3 content deployment via UserData, and CreationPolicy wait condition.'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-WebServerVPC'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  WebServerSG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: 'Security group for web server allowing HTTP inbound and all outbound traffic'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-WebServerSG'

  EC2Role:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonS3ReadOnlyAccess
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2Role'

  EC2InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2Role

  WebServerInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: 'resolve:{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2:1}}'
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2InstanceProfile
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-WebServer'
      NetworkInterfaces:
        - DeviceIndex: '0'
          SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
          GroupSet:
            - !Ref WebServerSG
          AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: |
          #!/bin/bash
          yum update -y
          yum install -y httpd php unzip aws-cfn-bootstrap
          systemctl start httpd
          systemctl enable httpd
          mkdir -p /var/www/html
          aws s3 cp s3://my-sample-content/webcontent.zip /tmp/webcontent.zip
          unzip /tmp/webcontent.zip -d /var/www/html/
          chown -R apache:apache /var/www/html
          rm -f /tmp/webcontent.zip
          /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e $? -r "Web server setup complete"
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT5M
    DependsOn:
      - PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: 'EC2 Instance ID of the web server'
    Value: !Ref WebServerInstance
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-InstanceId'

  PublicIP:
    Description: 'Public IP address of the web server'
    Value: !GetAtt WebServerInstance.PublicIp
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicIP'

  SecurityGroupId:
    Description: 'Security Group ID for the web server'
    Value: !Ref WebServerSG
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SecurityGroupId'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Basic AWS Lambda function with Node.js code that logs event details and returns a value from the input event. Includes IAM execution role for CloudWatch Logs.'

Resources:
  BasicLambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      Path: "/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole

  BasicLambdaFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Runtime: nodejs20.x
      Handler: index.handler
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          exports.handler = async (event) => {
              console.log('Received event:', JSON.stringify(event, null, 2));
              return {
                  statusCode: 200,
                  body: event.value || 'No value provided'
              };
          };
      Role: !GetAtt BasicLambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Timeout: 3
      MemorySize: 128

Outputs:
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda function
    Value: !GetAtt BasicLambdaFunction.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-LambdaFunctionArn"

  LambdaFunctionName:
    Description: Name of the Lambda function
    Value: !Ref BasicLambdaFunction
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-LambdaFunctionName"

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: "CloudFront distribution fronting a regional API Gateway REST API with mock /hello GET endpoint returning {\"message\": \"Hello World\"} JSON. Configured with no caching, HTTPS to origin, and viewer redirect to HTTPS."

Resources:
  HelloWorldApi:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi
    Properties:
      Name: HelloWorldApi
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - REGIONAL

  HelloResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref HelloWorldApi
      ParentId: !GetAtt HelloWorldApi.RootResourceId
      PathPart: hello

  HelloMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref HelloWorldApi
      ResourceId: !Ref HelloResource
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: '200'
      Integration:
        Type: MOCK
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: '{}'
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: '200'
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: '{"message": "Hello World"}'

  HelloDeployment:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Deployment
    DependsOn: HelloMethod
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref HelloWorldApi

  ProdStage:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Stage
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref HelloWorldApi
      DeploymentId: !Ref HelloDeployment
      StageName: prod

  CloudFrontDistribution:
    Type: AWS::CloudFront::Distribution
    DependsOn: ProdStage
    Properties:
      DistributionConfig:
        Enabled: true
        PriceClass: PriceClass_100
        Origins:
          - Id: ApiGatewayOrigin
            DomainName: !Sub "${HelloWorldApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com"
            OriginPath: /prod
            CustomOriginConfig:
              OriginProtocolPolicy: https-only
        DefaultCacheBehavior:
          TargetOriginId: ApiGatewayOrigin
          ViewerProtocolPolicy: redirect-to-https
          AllowedMethods:
            - GET
            - HEAD
            - OPTIONS
            - PUT
            - POST
            - PATCH
            - DELETE
          Compress: true
          CachePolicyId: Managed-CachingDisabled20240815
        ViewerCertificate:
          CloudFrontDefaultCertificate: true

Outputs:
  CloudFrontDomainName:
    Description: Domain name of the CloudFront distribution
    Value: !GetAtt CloudFrontDistribution.DomainName
  ApiGatewayInvokeUrl:
    Description: Invoke URL for the API Gateway /hello endpoint
    Value: !Sub "${HelloWorldApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/prod/hello"
  ProdStageArn:
    Description: ARN of the prod stage
    Value: !Ref ProdStage
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-d79ea671' on localstack", 'iac-god-eval-d79ea671: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'HelloWorldApi: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'HelloWorldApi: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'HelloResource: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'HelloResource: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'HelloMethod: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'HelloMethod: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'HelloDeployment: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'HelloDeployment: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'ProdStage: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'ProdStage: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'CloudFrontDistribution: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'CloudFrontDistribution: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-d79ea671: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A']

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Metadata:
  Description: 'Serverless Pet Inventory GraphQL API with Lambda backend providing mock pet data'
Resources:
  PetInventoryLambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: LambdaLogsPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: PetShop

  PetInventoryLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: PetInventoryLambda
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt PetInventoryLambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Runtime: nodejs24.x
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          exports.handler = async (event) => {
            const pets = [
              {"id": "1", "name": "Fido", "type": "Dog"},
              {"id": "2", "name": "Whiskers", "type": "Cat"},
              {"id": "3", "name": "Tweety", "type": "Bird"}
            ];
            return pets;
          };
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: PetShop

  AppSyncLambdaServiceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: appsync.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: LambdaInvokePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - lambda:InvokeFunction
                Resource: !GetAtt PetInventoryLambda.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: PetShop

  PetShopAPI:
    Type: AWS::AppSync::GraphQLApi
    Properties:
      Name: PetShopAPI
      AuthenticationType: API_KEY
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: PetShop

  PetShopGraphQLSchema:
    Type: AWS::AppSync::GraphQLSchema
    DependsOn: PetShopAPI
    Properties:
      ApiId: !Ref PetShopAPI
      Definition: |
        type Pet {
          id: ID!
          name: String!
          type: String!
        }

        type Query {
          getPets: [Pet]
        }

  LambdaDataSource:
    Type: AWS::AppSync::DataSource
    DependsOn: PetShopGraphQLSchema
    Properties:
      ApiId: !Ref PetShopAPI
      Name: PetInventoryDataSource
      Type: AWS_LAMBDA
      LambdaConfig:
        LambdaFunctionArn: !GetAtt PetInventoryLambda.Arn
      ServiceRoleArn: !GetAtt AppSyncLambdaServiceRole.Arn

  GetPetsResolver:
    Type: AWS::AppSync::Resolver
    DependsOn:
      - PetShopGraphQLSchema
      - LambdaDataSource
    Properties:
      ApiId: !Ref PetShopAPI
      DataSourceName: !Ref LambdaDataSource
      FieldName: getPets
      TypeName: Query
      RequestMappingTemplate: "$util.lambda(null)"
      ResponseMappingTemplate: "$util.toJson($ctx.result)"

  PetShopAPIKey:
    Type: AWS::AppSync::ApiKey
    Properties:
      ApiId: !Ref PetShopAPI
      Expires: '365'

Outputs:
  GraphQLURL:
    Description: GraphQL API endpoint
    Value: !GetAtt PetShopAPI.GraphQLUrl
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-GraphQLURL"
  APIKey:
    Description: AppSync API Key for authentication
    Value: !Ref PetShopAPIKey
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-APIKey"
  LambdaARN:
    Description: Lambda function ARN
    Value: !GetAtt PetInventoryLambda.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-LambdaARN"
deploy_logs: None
